authors_text: Ravin Kumar
title: APTx: better activation function than MISH, SWISH, and ReLU's variants used in deep learning
title_zh: APTx：比深度学习中使用的 MISH、SWISH 和 ReLU 变体更好的激活函数
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Activation Functions introduce non-linearity in the deep neural networks. This nonlinearity helps the neural networks learn faster and efficiently from the dataset. In deep learning, many activation functions are developed and used based on the type of problem statement. ReLU's variants, SWISH, and MISH are goto activation functions. MISH function is considered having similar or even better performance than SWISH, and much better than ReLU. In this paper, we propose an activation function named APTx which behaves similar to MISH, but requires lesser mathematical operations to compute. The lesser computational requirements of APTx does speed up the model training, and thus also reduces the hardware requirement for the deep learning model. Source code: https://github.com/mr-ravin/aptx_activation
summary: Activation Functions introduce non-linearity in the deep neural networks. This nonlinearity helps the neural networks learn faster and efficiently from the dataset. In deep learning, many activation functions are developed and used based on the type of problem statement. ReLU's variants, SWISH, and MISH are goto activation functions. MISH function is considered having similar or even better performance than SWISH, and much better than ReLU. In this paper, we propose an activation function named APTx which behaves similar to MISH, but requires lesser mathematical operations to compute. The lesser computational requirements of APTx does speed up the model training, and thus also reduces the hardware requirement for the deep learning model. Source code: https://github.com/mr-ravin/aptx_activation
abstract_zh: 激活函数在深度神经网络中引入了非线性。这种非线性有助于神经网络更快、更有效地从数据集中学习。在深度学习中，许多激活函数是根据问题陈述的类型开发和使用的。 ReLU 的变体 SWISH 和 MISH 是 goto 激活函数。 MISH 函数被认为具有与 SWISH 类似甚至更好的性能，并且比 ReLU 好得多。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 APTx 的激活函数，其行为类似于 MISH，但需要较少的数学运算来计算。 APTx 较少的计算要求确实加快了模型训练的速度，从而也降低了深度学习模型的硬件要求。源代码：https://github.com/mr-ravin/aptx_activation

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为APTx的激活函数，旨在以更少的计算量替代MISH、SWISH及ReLU变体，提升深度学习模型的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有激活函数如MISH虽性能优异，但计算复杂度较高，增加了硬件需求和训练时间，需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计APTx激活函数，通过简化MISH的数学运算步骤，降低计算开销，并在深度学习模型中进行实验验证。
AI.result: APTx在保持与MISH相近性能的同时，显著减少计算量，加速模型训练并降低硬件需求。
AI.conclusion: APTx是一种计算效率更高的激活函数，适合对资源敏感的深度学习应用场景。

search_text: APTx: better activation function than MISH, SWISH, and ReLU's variants used in deep learning APTx：比深度学习中使用的 MISH、SWISH 和 ReLU 变体更好的激活函数 Activation Functions introduce non-linearity in the deep neural networks. This nonlinearity helps the neural networks learn faster and efficiently from the dataset. In deep learning, many activation functions are developed and used based on the type of problem statement. ReLU's variants, SWISH, and MISH are goto activation functions. MISH function is considered having similar or even better performance than SWISH, and much better than ReLU. In this paper, we propose an activation function named APTx which behaves similar to MISH, but requires lesser mathematical operations to compute. The lesser computational requirements of APTx does speed up the model training, and thus also reduces the hardware requirement for the deep learning model. Source code: https://github.com/mr-ravin/aptx_activation 激活函数在深度神经网络中引入了非线性。这种非线性有助于神经网络更快、更有效地从数据集中学习。在深度学习中，许多激活函数是根据问题陈述的类型开发和使用的。 ReLU 的变体 SWISH 和 MISH 是 goto 激活函数。 MISH 函数被认为具有与 SWISH 类似甚至更好的性能，并且比 ReLU 好得多。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 APTx 的激活函数，其行为类似于 MISH，但需要较少的数学运算来计算。 APTx 较少的计算要求确实加快了模型训练的速度，从而也降低了深度学习模型的硬件要求。源代码：https://github.com/mr-ravin/aptx_activation 本文提出一种名为APTx的激活函数，旨在以更少的计算量替代MISH、SWISH及ReLU变体，提升深度学习模型的训练效率。 Ravin Kumar cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Binhang Qi,Hailong Sun,Xiang Gao,Hongyu Zhang
title: Patching Weak Convolutional Neural Network Models through Modularization and Composition
title_zh: 通过模块化和组合修补弱卷积神经网络模型
comment: Accepted at ASE'22
comments: Accepted at ASE'22
abstract: Despite great success in many applications, deep neural networks are not always robust in practice. For instance, a convolutional neuron network (CNN) model for classification tasks often performs unsatisfactorily in classifying some particular classes of objects. In this work, we are concerned with patching the weak part of a CNN model instead of improving it through the costly retraining of the entire model. Inspired by the fundamental concepts of modularization and composition in software engineering, we propose a compressed modularization approach, CNNSplitter, which decomposes a strong CNN model for $N$-class classification into $N$ smaller CNN modules. Each module is a sub-model containing a part of the convolution kernels of the strong model. To patch a weak CNN model that performs unsatisfactorily on a target class (TC), we compose the weak CNN model with the corresponding module obtained from a strong CNN model. The ability of the weak CNN model to recognize the TC can thus be improved through patching. Moreover, the ability to recognize non-TCs is also improved, as the samples misclassified as TC could be classified as non-TCs correctly. Experimental results with two representative CNNs on three widely-used datasets show that the averaged improvement on the TC in terms of precision and recall are 12.54% and 2.14%, respectively. Moreover, patching improves the accuracy of non-TCs by 1.18%. The results demonstrate that CNNSplitter can patch a weak CNN model through modularization and composition, thus providing a new solution for developing robust CNN models.

For instance, a convolutional neuron network (CNN) model for classification tasks often performs unsatisfactorily in classifying some particular classes of objects. In this work, we are concerned with patching the weak part of a CNN model instead of improving it through the costly retraining of the entire model. Inspired by the fundamental concepts of modularization and composition in software engineering, we propose a compressed modularization approach, CNNSplitter, which decomposes a strong CNN model for $N$-class classification into $N$ smaller CNN modules. Each module is a sub-model containing a part of the convolution kernels of the strong model. To patch a weak CNN model that performs unsatisfactorily on a target class (TC), we compose the weak CNN model with the corresponding module obtained from a strong CNN model. The ability of the weak CNN model to recognize the TC can thus be improved through patching. Moreover, the ability to recognize non-TCs is also improved, as the samples misclassified as TC could be classified as non-TCs correctly. Experimental results with two representative CNNs on three widely-used datasets show that the averaged improvement on the TC in terms of precision and recall are 12.54% and 2.14%, respectively. Moreover, patching improves the accuracy of non-TCs by 1.18%. The results demonstrate that CNNSplitter can patch a weak CNN model through modularization and composition, thus providing a new solution for developing robust CNN models.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络在许多应用中取得了巨大成功，但在实践中并不总是稳健的。例如，用于分类任务的卷积神经网络（CNN）模型在对某些特定类别的对象进行分类时通常表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们关注的是修补 CNN 模型的薄弱部分，而不是通过昂贵的整个模型的重新训练来改进它。受到软件工程中模块化和组合基本概念的启发，我们提出了一种压缩模块化方法 CNNSplitter，它将用于 $N$ 类分类的强大 CNN 模型分解为 $N$ 较小的 CNN 模块。每个模块都是一个子模型，包含强模型的部分卷积核。为了修补在目标类（TC）上表现不佳的弱 CNN 模型，我们将弱 CNN 模型与从强 CNN 模型获得的相应模块组合起来。因此可以通过修补来提高弱CNN模型识别TC的能力。此外，识别非TC的能力也得到了提高，因为误分类为TC的样本可以被正确分类为非TC。两个代表性 CNN 在三个广泛使用的数据集上的实验结果表明，TC 在精度和召回率方面的平均改进分别为 12.54% 和 2.14%。此外，修补将非 TC 的准确率提高了 1.18%。结果表明，CNNSplitter可以通过模块化和组合来修补弱CNN模型，从而为开发鲁棒CNN模型提供了新的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模块化和组合方法修补弱卷积神经网络模型，无需重新训练整个模型即可提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在实际应用中并非总具备鲁棒性，尤其在特定类别分类任务中表现不佳，而重新训练整个模型成本高昂。
AI.method: 受软件工程中模块化与组合思想启发，提出CNNSplitter方法，将强CNN模型分解为N个子模块，通过组合弱模型与对应强模块实现修补。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验显示，目标类别的精确率提升12.54%、召回率提升2.14%，非目标类别准确率提升1.18%。
AI.conclusion: CNNSplitter通过模块化组合有效修补弱CNN模型，为构建鲁棒CNN模型提供新思路。

authors_text: Rafet Durgut,Mehmet Emin Aydin,Hisham Ihshaish,Abdur Rakib
title: Analysing the Predictivity of Features to Characterise the Search Space
title_zh: 分析特征的预测性来表征搜索空间
comment: Artificial Neural Networks and Machine Learning, ICANN 2022, 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks, Bristol, UK, September, 2022, Proceedings; Part IV (1 13)
comments: Artificial Neural Networks and Machine Learning, ICANN 2022, 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks, Bristol, UK, September, 2022, Proceedings; Part IV (1 13)
abstract: Exploring search spaces is one of the most unpredictable challenges that has attracted the interest of researchers for decades. One way to handle unpredictability is to characterise the search spaces and take actions accordingly. A well-characterised search space can assist in mapping the problem states to a set of operators for generating new problem states. In this paper, a landscape analysis-based set of features has been analysed using the most renown machine learning approaches to determine the optimal feature set. However, in order to deal with problem complexity and induce commonality for transferring experience across domains, the selection of the most representative features remains crucial. The proposed approach analyses the predictivity of a set of features in order to determine the best categorization.
summary: Exploring search spaces is one of the most unpredictable challenges that has attracted the interest of researchers for decades. One way to handle unpredictability is to characterise the search spaces and take actions accordingly. A well-characterised search space can assist in mapping the problem states to a set of operators for generating new problem states. In this paper, a landscape analysis-based set of features has been analysed using the most renown machine learning approaches to determine the optimal feature set. However, in order to deal with problem complexity and induce commonality for transferring experience across domains, the selection of the most representative features remains crucial. The proposed approach analyses the predictivity of a set of features in order to determine the best categorization.
abstract_zh: 探索搜索空间是最不可预测的挑战之一，几十年来一直吸引着研究人员的兴趣。处理不可预测性的一种方法是描述搜索空间的特征并采取相应的行动。良好表征的搜索空间可以帮助将问题状态映射到一组运算符以生成新的问题状态。在本文中，使用最著名的机器学习方法对基于景观分析的特征集进行了分析，以确定最佳特征集。然而，为了处理问题的复杂性并引入跨领域转移经验的共性，选择最具代表性的特征仍然至关重要。所提出的方法分析一组特征的预测性以确定最佳分类。

AI.tldr: 分析特征预测性以确定表征搜索空间的最佳特征集
AI.motivation: 搜索空间的不可预测性影响问题求解效率，需通过特征选择实现跨领域经验迁移
AI.method: 基于景观分析提取特征，结合主流机器学习方法评估特征预测性
AI.result: 确定了区分搜索空间特性的关键特征子集
AI.conclusion: 特征预测性分析可有效指导搜索空间表征，提升跨领域问题求解能力

authors_text: Lingdong Wang,Mohammad Hajiesmaili,Jacob Chakareski,Ramesh K. Sitaraman
title: CU-Net: Real-Time High-Fidelity Color Upsampling for Point Clouds
title_zh: CU-Net：点云实时高保真颜色上采样
abstract: Point cloud upsampling is essential for high-quality augmented reality, virtual reality, and telepresence applications, due to the capture, processing, and communication limitations of existing technologies. Although geometry upsampling to densify a point cloud's coordinates has been well studied, the upsampling of the color attributes has been largely overlooked. In this paper, we propose CU-Net, the first deep-learning point cloud color upsampling model that enables low latency and high visual fidelity operation. CU-Net achieves linear time and space complexity by leveraging a feature extractor based on sparse convolution and a color prediction module based on neural implicit function. Therefore, CU-Net is theoretically guaranteed to be more efficient than most existing methods with quadratic complexity. Experimental results demonstrate that CU-Net can colorize a photo-realistic point cloud with nearly a million points in real time, while having notably better visual performance than baselines. Besides, CU-Net can adapt to arbitrary upsampling ratios and unseen objects without retraining. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UMass-LIDS/cunet.
summary: Point cloud upsampling is essential for high-quality augmented reality, virtual reality, and telepresence applications, due to the capture, processing, and communication limitations of existing technologies. Although geometry upsampling to densify a point cloud's coordinates has been well studied, the upsampling of the color attributes has been largely overlooked. In this paper, we propose CU-Net, the first deep-learning point cloud color upsampling model that enables low latency and high visual fidelity operation. CU-Net achieves linear time and space complexity by leveraging a feature extractor based on sparse convolution and a color prediction module based on neural implicit function. Therefore, CU-Net is theoretically guaranteed to be more efficient than most existing methods with quadratic complexity. Experimental results demonstrate that CU-Net can colorize a photo-realistic point cloud with nearly a million points in real time, while having notably better visual performance than baselines. Besides, CU-Net can adapt to arbitrary upsampling ratios and unseen objects without retraining. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UMass-LIDS/cunet.
abstract_zh: 由于现有技术的捕获、处理和通信限制，点云上采样对于高质量增强现实、虚拟现实和远程呈现应用至关重要。尽管用于致密点云坐标的几何上采样已经得到了很好的研究，但颜色属性的上采样在很大程度上被忽视了。在本文中，我们提出了 CU-Net，这是第一个深度学习点云颜色上采样模型，可实现低延迟和高视觉保真度操作。 CU-Net利用基于稀疏卷积的特征提取器和基于神经隐函数的颜色预测模块实现了线性时间和空间复杂度。因此，CU-Net 理论上保证比大多数现有的具有二次复杂度的方法更高效。实验结果表明，CU-Net 可以实时对近百万个点的逼真点云进行着色，同时具有比基线明显更好的视觉性能。此外，CU-Net 可以适应任意上采样比率和不可见的对象，而无需重新训练。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/UMass-LIDS/cunet 获取。

AI.motivation: 现有技术在点云几何上采样研究较多，但颜色属性上采样被忽视，而高质量AR/VR应用需要解决这一问题。

AI.result: 实现实时渲染百万级点云，视觉效果优于基线方法，且可适应任意上采样比例和未知物体。
AI.conclusion: CU-Net在效率和视觉保真度上优于现有方法，为点云颜色上采样提供新解决方案。

search_text: CU-Net: Real-Time High-Fidelity Color Upsampling for Point Clouds CU-Net：点云实时高保真颜色上采样 Point cloud upsampling is essential for high-quality augmented reality, virtual reality, and telepresence applications, due to the capture, processing, and communication limitations of existing technologies. Although geometry upsampling to densify a point cloud's coordinates has been well studied, the upsampling of the color attributes has been largely overlooked. In this paper, we propose CU-Net, the first deep-learning point cloud color upsampling model that enables low latency and high visual fidelity operation. CU-Net achieves linear time and space complexity by leveraging a feature extractor based on sparse convolution and a color prediction module based on neural implicit function. Therefore, CU-Net is theoretically guaranteed to be more efficient than most existing methods with quadratic complexity. Experimental results demonstrate that CU-Net can colorize a photo-realistic point cloud with nearly a million points in real time, while having notably better visual performance than baselines. Besides, CU-Net can adapt to arbitrary upsampling ratios and unseen objects without retraining. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UMass-LIDS/cunet. 由于现有技术的捕获、处理和通信限制，点云上采样对于高质量增强现实、虚拟现实和远程呈现应用至关重要。尽管用于致密点云坐标的几何上采样已经得到了很好的研究，但颜色属性的上采样在很大程度上被忽视了。在本文中，我们提出了 CU-Net，这是第一个深度学习点云颜色上采样模型，可实现低延迟和高视觉保真度操作。 CU-Net利用基于稀疏卷积的特征提取器和基于神经隐函数的颜色预测模块实现了线性时间和空间复杂度。因此，CU-Net 理论上保证比大多数现有的具有二次复杂度的方法更高效。实验结果表明，CU-Net 可以实时对近百万个点的逼真点云进行着色，同时具有比基线明显更好的视觉性能。此外，CU-Net 可以适应任意上采样比率和不可见的对象，而无需重新训练。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/UMass-LIDS/cunet 获取。 本文提出CU-Net，一种用于点云的实时高保真颜色上采样深度学习模型。 Lingdong Wang,Mohammad Hajiesmaili,Jacob Chakareski,Ramesh K. authors_text: Yun Chang,Luca Ballotta,Luca Carlone
title: D-Lite: Navigation-Oriented Compression of 3D Scene Graphs for Multi-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: D-Lite：面向导航的 3D 场景图压缩，用于多机器人协作
comment: 18 pages, 18 figures; accepted at IEEE RA-L 2023
comments: 18 pages, 18 figures; accepted at IEEE RA-L 2023
abstract: For a multi-robot team that collaboratively explores an unknown environment, it is of vital importance that collected information is efficiently shared among robots in order to support exploration and navigation tasks. Practical constraints of wireless channels, such as limited bandwidth, urge robots to carefully select information to be transmitted. In this paper, we consider the case where environmental information is modeled using a 3D Scene Graph, a hierarchical map representation that describes both geometric and semantic aspects of the environment. Then, we leverage graph-theoretic tools, namely graph spanners, to design greedy algorithms that efficiently compress 3D Scene Graphs with the aim of enabling communication between robots under bandwidth constraints. Our compression algorithms are navigation-oriented in that they are designed to approximately preserve shortest paths between locations of interest, while meeting a user-specified communication budget constraint. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithms is demonstrated in synthetic robot navigation experiments in a realistic simulator. A video abstract is available at https://youtu.be/nKYXU5VC6A8.
summary: For a multi-robot team that collaboratively explores an unknown environment, it is of vital importance that collected information is efficiently shared among robots in order to support exploration and navigation tasks. Practical constraints of wireless channels, such as limited bandwidth, urge robots to carefully select information to be transmitted. In this paper, we consider the case where environmental information is modeled using a 3D Scene Graph, a hierarchical map representation that describes both geometric and semantic aspects of the environment. Then, we leverage graph-theoretic tools, namely graph spanners, to design greedy algorithms that efficiently compress 3D Scene Graphs with the aim of enabling communication between robots under bandwidth constraints. Our compression algorithms are navigation-oriented in that they are designed to approximately preserve shortest paths between locations of interest, while meeting a user-specified communication budget constraint. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithms is demonstrated in synthetic robot navigation experiments in a realistic simulator. A video abstract is available at https://youtu.be/nKYXU5VC6A8.
abstract_zh: 对于协作探索未知环境的多机器人团队来说，收集到的信息在机器人之间有效共享以支持探索和导航任务至关重要。无线信道的实际限制（例如有限的带宽）促使机器人仔细选择要传输的信息。在本文中，我们考虑使用 3D 场景图（一种描述环境的几何和语义方面的分层地图表示形式）对环境信息进行建模的情况。然后，我们利用图论工具（即图扳手）来设计贪婪算法，该算法可有效压缩 3D 场景图，目的是在带宽限制下实现机器人之间的通信。我们的压缩算法是面向导航的，因为它们被设计为近似保留感兴趣位置之间的最短路径，同时满足用户指定的通信预算约束。所提出算法的有效性在真实模拟器中的合成机器人导航实验中得到了证明。视频摘要可在 https://youtu.be/nKYXU5VC6A8 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种导航导向的3D场景图压缩方法，以支持多机器人协作中的高效通信。
AI.motivation: 多机器人团队在探索未知环境时，受限于无线信道带宽，需高效压缩环境信息以支持导航任务，同时保留关键路径信息。
AI.method: 利用图spanner理论设计贪心算法，压缩3D场景图并在满足通信预算下近似保留关键路径。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中验证了算法的有效性，证明其能在带宽限制下保持导航性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的压缩算法有效支持多机器人协作中的高效通信，满足带宽限制下的导航需求。

authors_text: Marco Rios,Flavio Ponzina,Alexandre Levisse,Giovanni Ansaloni,David Atienza
title: Bit-Line Computing for CNN Accelerators Co-Design in Edge AI Inference
title_zh: 边缘 AI 推理中 CNN 加速器协同设计的位线计算
abstract: By supporting the access of multiple memory words at the same time, Bit-line Computing (BC) architectures allow the parallel execution of bit-wise operations in-memory. At the array periphery, arithmetic operations are then derived with little additional overhead. Such a paradigm opens novel opportunities for Artificial Intelligence (AI) at the edge, thanks to the massive parallelism inherent in memory arrays and the extreme energy efficiency of computing in-situ, hence avoiding data transfers. Previous works have shown that BC brings disruptive efficiency gains when targeting AI workloads, a key metric in the context of emerging edge AI scenarios. This manuscript builds on these findings by proposing an end-to-end framework that leverages BC-specific optimizations to enable high parallelism and aggressive compression of AI models. Our approach is supported by a novel hardware module performing real-time decoding, as well as new algorithms to enable BC-friendly model compression. Our hardware/software approach results in a 91% energy savings (for a 1% accuracy degradation constraint) regarding state-of-the-art BC computing approaches.
summary: By supporting the access of multiple memory words at the same time, Bit-line Computing (BC) architectures allow the parallel execution of bit-wise operations in-memory. At the array periphery, arithmetic operations are then derived with little additional overhead. Such a paradigm opens novel opportunities for Artificial Intelligence (AI) at the edge, thanks to the massive parallelism inherent in memory arrays and the extreme energy efficiency of computing in-situ, hence avoiding data transfers. Previous works have shown that BC brings disruptive efficiency gains when targeting AI workloads, a key metric in the context of emerging edge AI scenarios. This manuscript builds on these findings by proposing an end-to-end framework that leverages BC-specific optimizations to enable high parallelism and aggressive compression of AI models. Our approach is supported by a novel hardware module performing real-time decoding, as well as new algorithms to enable BC-friendly model compression. Our hardware/software approach results in a 91% energy savings (for a 1% accuracy degradation constraint) regarding state-of-the-art BC computing approaches.
abstract_zh: 通过支持同时访问多个内存字，位线计算 (BC) 架构允许在内存中并行执行按位操作。在数组外围，算术运算只需很少的额外开销即可导出。由于内存阵列固有的大规模并行性和原位计算的极高能源效率，这种范式为边缘人工智能（AI）带来了新的机会，从而避免了数据传输。之前的研究表明，BC 在针对人工智能工作负载时带来了颠覆性的效率提升，这是新兴边缘人工智能场景中的一个关键指标。本手稿基于这些发现，提出了一个端到端框架，该框架利用特定于 BC 的优化来实现人工智能模型的高度并行性和积极压缩。我们的方法得到了执行实时解码的新颖硬件模块以及支持 BC 友好模型压缩的新算法的支持。与最先进的 BC 计算方法相比，我们的硬件/软件方法可节省 91% 的能源（在 1% 的精度下降限制下）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Bit-Line Computing（BC）优化的端到端框架，用于边缘AI推理中的CNN加速器协同设计。
AI.motivation: 为解决边缘AI场景中能效瓶颈，利用BC架构的高并行性和原位计算优势，同时应对模型压缩与硬件优化的挑战。
AI.method: 设计新型硬件模块实现实时解码，并开发BC友好的模型压缩算法，实现软硬件协同优化。
AI.result: 在1%精度损失约束下，相比现有BC方案实现91%的能源效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架验证了BC在边缘AI中的能效潜力，为后续研究提供了可行的协同设计方向。

Our hardware/software approach results in a 91% energy savings (for a 1% accuracy degradation constraint) regarding state-of-the-art BC computing approaches. 通过支持同时访问多个内存字，位线计算 (BC) 架构允许在内存中并行执行按位操作。在数组外围，算术运算只需很少的额外开销即可导出。由于内存阵列固有的大规模并行性和原位计算的极高能源效率，这种范式为边缘人工智能（AI）带来了新的机会，从而避免了数据传输。之前的研究表明，BC 在针对人工智能工作负载时带来了颠覆性的效率提升，这是新兴边缘人工智能场景中的一个关键指标。本手稿基于这些发现，提出了一个端到端框架，该框架利用特定于 BC 的优化来实现人工智能模型的高度并行性和积极压缩。我们的方法得到了执行实时解码的新颖硬件模块以及支持 BC 友好模型压缩的新算法的支持。与最先进的 BC 计算方法相比，我们的硬件/软件方法可节省 91% 的能源（在 1% 的精度下降限制下）。 本文提出一种结合Bit-Line Computing（BC）优化的端到端框架，用于边缘AI推理中的CNN加速器协同设计。 Marco Rios,Flavio Ponzina,Alexandre Levisse,Giovanni Ansaloni,David Atienza cs.AR,eess.IV

authors_text: Ya-nan Han,Jian-wei Liu
title: Online Continual Learning via the Meta-learning Update with Multi-scale Knowledge Distillation and Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过多尺度知识蒸馏和数据增强的元学习更新进行在线持续学习
comment: 43 pages
comments: 43 pages
abstract: Continual learning aims to rapidly and continually learn the current task from a sequence of tasks. Compared to other kinds of methods, the methods based on experience replay have shown great advantages to overcome catastrophic forgetting. One common limitation of this method is the data imbalance between the previous and current tasks, which would further aggravate forgetting. Moreover, how to effectively address the stability-plasticity dilemma in this setting is also an urgent problem to be solved. In this paper, we overcome these challenges by proposing a novel framework called Meta-learning update via Multi-scale Knowledge Distillation and Data Augmentation (MMKDDA). Specifically, we apply multiscale knowledge distillation to grasp the evolution of long-range and short-range spatial relationships at different feature levels to alleviate the problem of data imbalance. Besides, our method mixes the samples from the episodic memory and current task in the online continual training procedure, thus alleviating the side influence due to the change of probability distribution. Moreover, we optimize our model via the meta-learning update resorting to the number of tasks seen previously, which is helpful to keep a better balance between stability and plasticity. Finally, our experimental evaluation on four benchmark datasets shows the effectiveness of the proposed MMKDDA framework against other popular baselines, and ablation studies are also conducted to further analyze the role of each component in our framework.
summary: Continual learning aims to rapidly and continually learn the current task from a sequence of tasks. Compared to other kinds of methods, the methods based on experience replay have shown great advantages to overcome catastrophic forgetting. One common limitation of this method is the data imbalance between the previous and current tasks, which would further aggravate forgetting. Moreover, how to effectively address the stability-plasticity dilemma in this setting is also an urgent problem to be solved. In this paper, we overcome these challenges by proposing a novel framework called Meta-learning update via Multi-scale Knowledge Distillation and Data Augmentation (MMKDDA). Specifically, we apply multiscale knowledge distillation to grasp the evolution of long-range and short-range spatial relationships at different feature levels to alleviate the problem of data imbalance. Besides, our method mixes the samples from the episodic memory and current task in the online continual training procedure, thus alleviating the side influence due to the change of probability distribution. Moreover, we optimize our model via the meta-learning update resorting to the number of tasks seen previously, which is helpful to keep a better balance between stability and plasticity. Finally, our experimental evaluation on four benchmark datasets shows the effectiveness of the proposed MMKDDA framework against other popular baselines, and ablation studies are also conducted to further analyze the role of each component in our framework.
abstract_zh: 持续学习旨在从一系列任务中快速、持续地学习当前任务。与其他类型的方法相比，基于经验重放的方法在克服灾难性遗忘方面表现出了巨大的优势。这种方法的一个常见限制是先前任务和当前任务之间的数据不平衡，这会进一步加剧遗忘。此外，如何有效解决这种背景下的稳定性-塑性困境也是亟待解决的问题。在本文中，我们通过提出一种称为通过多尺度知识蒸馏和数据增强进行元学习更新（MMKDDA）的新颖框架来克服这些挑战。具体来说，我们应用多尺度知识蒸馏来掌握不同特征级别的长程和短程空间关系的演化，以缓解数据不平衡的问题。此外，我们的方法在在线连续训练过程中混合了来自情景记忆和当前任务的样本，从而减轻了由于概率分布变化而产生的副作用。此外，我们利用之前看到的任务数量通过元学习更新来优化我们的模型，这有助于在稳定性和可塑性之间保持更好的平衡。最后，我们对四个基准数据集的实验评估显示了所提出的 MMKDDA 框架相对于其他流行基线的有效性，并且还进行了消融研究以进一步分析我们框架中每个组件的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MMKDDA的框架，通过多尺度知识蒸馏和数据增强解决在线持续学习中的数据不平衡和稳定性-可塑性困境问题。
AI.motivation: 基于经验回放的方法在持续学习中存在任务间数据不平衡导致的遗忘问题，且难以平衡稳定性与可塑性，亟需新方法突破现有局限。
AI.method: 采用多尺度知识蒸馏捕捉长短期空间关系，混合记忆样本与当前任务数据缓解分布变化影响，并通过元学习更新策略优化模型以平衡稳定性与可塑性。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实验验证MMKDDA优于其他主流方法，消融实验证明各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MMKDDA框架通过多尺度知识蒸馏、数据混合与元学习更新有效解决了持续学习中的关键挑战，为在线场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Felix Vogel,Nina Shvetsova,Leonid Karlinsky,Hilde Kuehne
title: VL-Taboo: An Analysis of Attribute-based Zero-shot Capabilities of Vision-Language Models
title_zh: VL-Taboo：视觉语言模型基于属性的零样本能力分析
abstract: Vision-language models trained on large, randomly collected data had significant impact in many areas since they appeared. But as they show great performance in various fields, such as image-text-retrieval, their inner workings are still not fully understood. The current work analyses the true zero-shot capabilities of those models. We start from the analysis of the training corpus assessing to what extent (and which of) the test classes are really zero-shot and how this correlates with individual classes performance. We follow up with the analysis of the attribute-based zero-shot learning capabilities of these models, evaluating how well this classical zero-shot notion emerges from large-scale webly supervision. We leverage the recently released LAION400M data corpus as well as the publicly available pretrained models of CLIP, OpenCLIP, and FLAVA, evaluating the attribute-based zero-shot capabilities on CUB and AWA2 benchmarks. Our analysis shows that: (i) most of the classes in popular zero-shot benchmarks are observed (a lot) during pre-training; (ii) zero-shot performance mainly comes out of models' capability of recognizing class labels, whenever they are present in the text, and a significantly lower performing capability of attribute-based zeroshot learning is only observed when class labels are not used; (iii) the number of the attributes used can have a significant effect on performance, and can easily cause a significant performance decrease.
summary: Vision-language models trained on large, randomly collected data had significant impact in many areas since they appeared. But as they show great performance in various fields, such as image-text-retrieval, their inner workings are still not fully understood. The current work analyses the true zero-shot capabilities of those models. We start from the analysis of the training corpus assessing to what extent (and which of) the test classes are really zero-shot and how this correlates with individual classes performance. We follow up with the analysis of the attribute-based zero-shot learning capabilities of these models, evaluating how well this classical zero-shot notion emerges from large-scale webly supervision. We leverage the recently released LAION400M data corpus as well as the publicly available pretrained models of CLIP, OpenCLIP, and FLAVA, evaluating the attribute-based zero-shot capabilities on CUB and AWA2 benchmarks. Our analysis shows that: (i) most of the classes in popular zero-shot benchmarks are observed (a lot) during pre-training; (ii) zero-shot performance mainly comes out of models' capability of recognizing class labels, whenever they are present in the text, and a significantly lower performing capability of attribute-based zeroshot learning is only observed when class labels are not used; (iii) the number of the attributes used can have a significant effect on performance, and can easily cause a significant performance decrease.
abstract_zh: 自出现以来，基于大量随机收集数据训练的视觉语言模型在许多领域产生了重大影响。但是，尽管它们在图像文本检索等各个领域都表现出了出色的性能，但它们的内部工作原理仍不完全清楚。当前的工作分析了这些模型的真正零样本能力。我们从分析训练语料库开始，评估测试类在多大程度上（以及哪些）真正是零样本，以及这与各个类的表现有何关联。我们随后分析了这些模型基于属性的零样本学习能力，评估了这种经典的零样本概念在大规模网络监督中的表现如何。我们利用最近发布的 LAION400M 数据集以及 CLIP、OpenCLIP 和 FLAVA 的公开预训练模型，在 CUB 和 AWA2 基准上评估基于属性的零样本能力。我们的分析表明：（i）在预训练期间（大量）观察到了流行的零样本基准中的大多数类别； (ii) 零样本性能主要来自于模型识别类标签的能力，无论它们何时出现在文本中，并且只有当不使用类标签时，才观察到基于属性的零样本学习的性能显着降低； (iii)使用的属性数量会对性能产生显着影响，并且很容易导致性能显着下降。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了视觉语言模型在基于属性的零样本学习能力，评估其在无明确类别标签时的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多个领域表现优异，但其零样本能力的来源及机制尚未明确，需探究属性在零样本学习中的作用。
AI.method: 使用LAION400M数据集及CLIP、OpenCLIP、FLAVA等预训练模型，在CUB和AWA2基准上评估属性驱动的零样本性能，分析训练数据覆盖度及属性数量对结果的影响。
AI.result: 发现主流零样本基准中多数类别在预训练时已出现；零样本性能主要依赖类别标签识别，属性驱动能力较弱；属性数量显著影响性能，过多属性会导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型零样本能力依赖类别标签存在，属性驱动学习效果有限，需进一步优化模型对属性的泛化能力。

Our analysis shows that: (i) most of the classes in popular zero-shot benchmarks are observed (a lot) during pre-training; (ii) zero-shot performance mainly comes out of models' capability of recognizing class labels, whenever they are present in the text, and a significantly lower performing capability of attribute-based zeroshot learning is only observed when class labels are not used; (iii) the number of the attributes used can have a significant effect on performance, and can easily cause a significant performance decrease. 自出现以来，基于大量随机收集数据训练的视觉语言模型在许多领域产生了重大影响。但是，尽管它们在图像文本检索等各个领域都表现出了出色的性能，但它们的内部工作原理仍不完全清楚。当前的工作分析了这些模型的真正零样本能力。我们从分析训练语料库开始，评估测试类在多大程度上（以及哪些）真正是零样本，以及这与各个类的表现有何关联。我们随后分析了这些模型基于属性的零样本学习能力，评估了这种经典的零样本概念在大规模网络监督中的表现如何。我们利用最近发布的 LAION400M 数据集以及 CLIP、OpenCLIP 和 FLAVA 的公开预训练模型，在 CUB 和 AWA2 基准上评估基于属性的零样本能力。我们的分析表明：（i）在预训练期间（大量）观察到了流行的零样本基准中的大多数类别； (ii) 零样本性能主要来自于模型识别类标签的能力，无论它们何时出现在文本中，并且只有当不使用类标签时，才观察到基于属性的零样本学习的性能显着降低； (iii)使用的属性数量会对性能产生显着影响，并且很容易导致性能显着下降。 本文分析了视觉语言模型在基于属性的零样本学习能力，评估其在无明确类别标签时的表现。 Felix Vogel,Nina Shvetsova,Leonid Karlinsky,Hilde Kuehne cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Kartik Audhkhasi,Yinghui Huang,Bhuvana Ramabhadran,Pedro J. Moreno
title: Analysis of Self-Attention Head Diversity for Conformer-based Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 基于一致性的自动语音识别的自注意力头多样性分析
comment: Accepted for publication in Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted for publication in Interspeech 2022
abstract: Attention layers are an integral part of modern end-to-end automatic speech recognition systems, for instance as part of the Transformer or Conformer architecture. Attention is typically multi-headed, where each head has an independent set of learned parameters and operates on the same input feature sequence. The output of multi-headed attention is a fusion of the outputs from the individual heads. We empirically analyze the diversity between representations produced by the different attention heads and demonstrate that the heads become highly correlated during the course of training. We investigate a few approaches to increasing attention head diversity, including using different attention mechanisms for each head and auxiliary training loss functions to promote head diversity. We show that introducing diversity-promoting auxiliary loss functions during training is a more effective approach, and obtain WER improvements of up to 6% relative on the Librispeech corpus. Finally, we draw a connection between the diversity of attention heads and the similarity of the gradients of head parameters.
summary: Attention layers are an integral part of modern end-to-end automatic speech recognition systems, for instance as part of the Transformer or Conformer architecture. Attention is typically multi-headed, where each head has an independent set of learned parameters and operates on the same input feature sequence. The output of multi-headed attention is a fusion of the outputs from the individual heads. We empirically analyze the diversity between representations produced by the different attention heads and demonstrate that the heads become highly correlated during the course of training. We investigate a few approaches to increasing attention head diversity, including using different attention mechanisms for each head and auxiliary training loss functions to promote head diversity. We show that introducing diversity-promoting auxiliary loss functions during training is a more effective approach, and obtain WER improvements of up to 6% relative on the Librispeech corpus. Finally, we draw a connection between the diversity of attention heads and the similarity of the gradients of head parameters.
abstract_zh: 注意力层是现代端到端自动语音识别系统的组成部分，例如作为 Transformer 或 Conformer 架构的一部分。注意力通常是多头的，其中每个头都有一组独立的学习参数，并对相同的输入特征序列进行操作。多头注意力的输出是各个头输出的融合。我们凭经验分析了不同注意力头产生的表示之间的多样性，并证明这些头在训练过程中变得高度相关。我们研究了几种增加注意力头部多样性的方法，包括对每个头部使用不同的注意力机制和辅助训练损失函数来促进头部多样性。我们证明，在训练期间引入促进多样性的辅助损失函数是一种更有效的方法，并且相对于 Librispeech 语料库，WER 提高了高达 6%。最后，我们在注意力头的多样性和头参数梯度的相似性之间建立了联系。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于Conformer的语音识别中自注意力头的多样性，并提出通过辅助损失函数提升注意力头差异性的方法。
AI.motivation: 多头注意力机制在语音识别中广泛使用，但不同头之间可能高度相关，影响模型性能，需探索提升多样性的方式。
AI.method: 通过实验分析注意力头表示差异性，尝试使用不同注意力机制及辅助损失函数促进多样性，验证辅助损失函数更有效。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，辅助损失函数使词错误率相对降低6%。
AI.conclusion: 注意力头多样性与参数梯度相似性相关，引入辅助损失函数可有效提升模型性能。

authors_text: Rongkai Zhang,Cong Zhang,Zhiguang Cao,Wen Song,Puay Siew Tan,Jie Zhang,Bihan Wen,Justin Dauwels
title: Learning to Solve Multiple-TSP with Time Window and Rejections via Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习学习解决带有时间窗和拒绝的多 TSP
abstract: We propose a manager-worker framework based on deep reinforcement learning to tackle a hard yet nontrivial variant of Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP), \ie~multiple-vehicle TSP with time window and rejections (mTSPTWR), where customers who cannot be served before the deadline are subject to rejections. Particularly, in the proposed framework, a manager agent learns to divide mTSPTWR into sub-routing tasks by assigning customers to each vehicle via a Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN) based policy network. A worker agent learns to solve sub-routing tasks by minimizing the cost in terms of both tour length and rejection rate for each vehicle, the maximum of which is then fed back to the manager agent to learn better assignments. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms strong baselines in terms of higher solution quality and shorter computation time. More importantly, the trained agents also achieve competitive performance for solving unseen larger instances.
summary: We propose a manager-worker framework based on deep reinforcement learning to tackle a hard yet nontrivial variant of Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP), \ie~multiple-vehicle TSP with time window and rejections (mTSPTWR), where customers who cannot be served before the deadline are subject to rejections. Particularly, in the proposed framework, a manager agent learns to divide mTSPTWR into sub-routing tasks by assigning customers to each vehicle via a Graph Isomorphism Network (GIN) based policy network. A worker agent learns to solve sub-routing tasks by minimizing the cost in terms of both tour length and rejection rate for each vehicle, the maximum of which is then fed back to the manager agent to learn better assignments. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms strong baselines in terms of higher solution quality and shorter computation time. More importantly, the trained agents also achieve competitive performance for solving unseen larger instances.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于深度强化学习的经理-工人框架，以解决旅行商问题（TSP）的一个困难但不平凡的变体，即带有时间窗口和拒绝的多车辆 TSP（mTSPTWR），其中无法在截止日期之前得到服务的客户将被拒绝。特别是，在所提出的框架中，管理器代理通过基于图同构网络（GIN）的策略网络将客户分配给每辆车，从而学习将 mTSPTWR 划分为子路由任务。工作代理学习通过最小化每辆车的行程长度和拒绝率方面的成本来解决子路由任务，然后将其中的最大值反馈给管理代理以学习更好的分配。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在更高的解决方案质量和更短的计算时间方面优于强基线。更重要的是，经过训练的智能体在解决未见过的较大实例方面也取得了有竞争力的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的管理-工人框架，用于解决带有时间窗口和客户拒绝机制的多车辆旅行商问题（mTSPTWR）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理包含时间约束和客户拒绝机制的复杂多车辆路径规划问题，需探索更高效的求解框架。
AI.method: 设计管理代理通过图同构网络（GIN）将客户分配至不同车辆，工人代理独立优化各车辆的路径成本与拒绝率，通过双向反馈实现协同学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在解的质量和计算效率上优于现有方法，且能有效泛化到更大规模的未见过实例。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层强化学习框架有效解决了mTSPTWR问题，在复杂约束下实现了高质量路径规划与计算效率的平衡。

authors_text: Saurav K. Aryal,Howard Prioleau,Legand Burge
title: Acoustic-Linguistic Features for Modeling Neurological Task Score in Alzheimer's
title_zh: 用于阿尔茨海默氏症神经任务评分建模的声学语言特征
comment: The paper has been accepted to Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing \c{opyright} [2022] World Scientific Publishing Co., Singapore, http://psb.stanford.edu/ and is currently being camera-readied
comments: The paper has been accepted to Pacific Symposium on Biocomputing \c{opyright} [2022] World Scientific Publishing Co., Singapore, http://psb.stanford.edu/ and is currently being camera-readied
abstract: The average life expectancy is increasing globally due to advancements in medical technology, preventive health care, and a growing emphasis on gerontological health. Therefore, developing technologies that detect and track aging-associated disease in cognitive function among older adult populations is imperative. In particular, research related to automatic detection and evaluation of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is critical given the disease's prevalence and the cost of current methods. As AD impacts the acoustics of speech and vocabulary, natural language processing and machine learning provide promising techniques for reliably detecting AD. We compare and contrast the performance of ten linear regression models for predicting Mini-Mental Status Exam scores on the ADReSS challenge dataset. We extracted 13000+ handcrafted and learned features that capture linguistic and acoustic phenomena. Using a subset of 54 top features selected by two methods: (1) recursive elimination and (2) correlation scores, we outperform a state-of-the-art baseline for the same task. Upon scoring and evaluating the statistical significance of each of the selected subset of features for each model, we find that, for the given task, handcrafted linguistic features are more significant than acoustic and learned features.
summary: The average life expectancy is increasing globally due to advancements in medical technology, preventive health care, and a growing emphasis on gerontological health. Therefore, developing technologies that detect and track aging-associated disease in cognitive function among older adult populations is imperative. In particular, research related to automatic detection and evaluation of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is critical given the disease's prevalence and the cost of current methods. As AD impacts the acoustics of speech and vocabulary, natural language processing and machine learning provide promising techniques for reliably detecting AD. We compare and contrast the performance of ten linear regression models for predicting Mini-Mental Status Exam scores on the ADReSS challenge dataset. We extracted 13000+ handcrafted and learned features that capture linguistic and acoustic phenomena. Using a subset of 54 top features selected by two methods: (1) recursive elimination and (2) correlation scores, we outperform a state-of-the-art baseline for the same task. Upon scoring and evaluating the statistical significance of each of the selected subset of features for each model, we find that, for the given task, handcrafted linguistic features are more significant than acoustic and learned features.
abstract_zh: 由于医疗技术、预防性医疗保健的进步以及对老年健康的日益重视，全球平均预期寿命正在增加。因此，开发检测和跟踪老年人认知功能中与衰老相关的疾病的技术势在必行。特别是，考虑到阿尔茨海默病（AD）的患病率和当前方法的成本，与自动检测和评估阿尔茨海默病（AD）相关的研究至关重要。由于 AD 影响语音和词汇的声学效果，自然语言处理和机器学习为可靠地检测 AD 提供了有前景的技术。我们比较和对比了 ADReSS 挑战数据集上用于预测简易精神状态考试分数的 10 个线性回归模型的性能。我们提取了 13000 多个手工制作和学习的特征来捕获语言和声学现象。使用通过两种方法选择的 54 个顶级特征的子集：(1) 递归消除和 (2) 相关性评分，我们在同一任务上优于最先进的基线。在对每个模型的每个所选特征子集的统计显着性进行评分和评估后，我们发现，对于给定的任务，手工制作的语言特征比声学和学习的特征更重要。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过声学和语言特征预测阿尔茨海默病患者的神经认知任务评分。
AI.motivation: 全球人口老龄化加剧，阿尔茨海默病检测成本高昂，需开发自动化、低成本的筛查技术。
AI.method: 提取13000+声学与语言特征，通过递归消除和相关性评分筛选54个关键特征，比较10种线性回归模型性能。
AI.result: 手工艺语言特征显著优于声学和学习特征，模型性能超越现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 语言特征在阿尔茨海默病认知功能评估中具有更高预测价值，为自动化检测提供新方向。

search_text: Acoustic-Linguistic Features for Modeling Neurological Task Score in Alzheimer's 用于阿尔茨海默氏症神经任务评分建模的声学语言特征 The average life expectancy is increasing globally due to advancements in medical technology, preventive health care, and a growing emphasis on gerontological health. Therefore, developing technologies that detect and track aging-associated disease in cognitive function among older adult populations is imperative. In particular, research related to automatic detection and evaluation of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is critical given the disease's prevalence and the cost of current methods. As AD impacts the acoustics of speech and vocabulary, natural language processing and machine learning provide promising techniques for reliably detecting AD. We compare and contrast the performance of ten linear regression models for predicting Mini-Mental Status Exam scores on the ADReSS challenge dataset. We extracted 13000+ handcrafted and learned features that capture linguistic and acoustic phenomena. Using a subset of 54 top features selected by two methods: (1) recursive elimination and (2) correlation scores, we outperform a state-of-the-art baseline for the same task. Upon scoring and evaluating the statistical significance of each of the selected subset of features for each model, we find that, for the given task, handcrafted linguistic features are more significant than acoustic and learned features. 由于医疗技术、预防性医疗保健的进步以及对老年健康的日益重视，全球平均预期寿命正在增加。因此，开发检测和跟踪老年人认知功能中与衰老相关的疾病的技术势在必行。特别是，考虑到阿尔茨海默病（AD）的患病率和当前方法的成本，与自动检测和评估阿尔茨海默病（AD）相关的研究至关重要。由于 AD 影响语音和词汇的声学效果，自然语言处理和机器学习为可靠地检测 AD 提供了有前景的技术。我们比较和对比了 ADReSS 挑战数据集上用于预测简易精神状态考试分数的 10 个线性回归模型的性能。我们提取了 13000 多个手工制作和学习的特征来捕获语言和声学现象。使用通过两种方法选择的 54 个顶级特征的子集：(1) 递归消除和 (2) 相关性评分，我们在同一任务上优于最先进的基线。在对每个模型的每个所选特征子集的统计显着性进行评分和评估后，我们发现，对于给定的任务，手工制作的语言特征比声学和学习的特征更重要。 该论文通过声学和语言特征预测阿尔茨海默病患者的神经认知任务评分。 Saurav K. authors_text: Adrian Galdran,Gustavo Carneiro,Miguel Ángel González Ballester
title: On the Optimal Combination of Cross-Entropy and Soft Dice Losses for Lesion Segmentation with Out-of-Distribution Robustness
title_zh: 交叉熵和软骰子损失的优化组合用于具有分布外鲁棒性的病变分割
comment: Accepted at the DFU Challenge Proceedings, part of MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted at the DFU Challenge Proceedings, part of MICCAI 2022
abstract: We study the impact of different loss functions on lesion segmentation from medical images. Although the Cross-Entropy (CE) loss is the most popular option when dealing with natural images, for biomedical image segmentation the soft Dice loss is often preferred due to its ability to handle imbalanced scenarios. On the other hand, the combination of both functions has also been successfully applied in this kind of tasks. A much less studied problem is the generalization ability of all these losses in the presence of Out-of-Distribution (OoD) data. This refers to samples appearing in test time that are drawn from a different distribution than training images. In our case, we train our models on images that always contain lesions, but in test time we also have lesion-free samples. We analyze the impact of the minimization of different loss functions on in-distribution performance, but also its ability to generalize to OoD data, via comprehensive experiments on polyp segmentation from endoscopic images and ulcer segmentation from diabetic feet images. Our findings are surprising: CE-Dice loss combinations that excel in segmenting in-distribution images have a poor performance when dealing with OoD data, which leads us to recommend the adoption of the CE loss for this kind of problems, due to its robustness and ability to generalize to OoD samples. Code associated to our experiments can be found at https://github.com/agaldran/lesion_losses_ood .

Although the Cross-Entropy (CE) loss is the most popular option when dealing with natural images, for biomedical image segmentation the soft Dice loss is often preferred due to its ability to handle imbalanced scenarios. On the other hand, the combination of both functions has also been successfully applied in this kind of tasks. A much less studied problem is the generalization ability of all these losses in the presence of Out-of-Distribution (OoD) data. This refers to samples appearing in test time that are drawn from a different distribution than training images. In our case, we train our models on images that always contain lesions, but in test time we also have lesion-free samples. We analyze the impact of the minimization of different loss functions on in-distribution performance, but also its ability to generalize to OoD data, via comprehensive experiments on polyp segmentation from endoscopic images and ulcer segmentation from diabetic feet images. Our findings are surprising: CE-Dice loss combinations that excel in segmenting in-distribution images have a poor performance when dealing with OoD data, which leads us to recommend the adoption of the CE loss for this kind of problems, due to its robustness and ability to generalize to OoD samples. Code associated to our experiments can be found at https://github.com/agaldran/lesion_losses_ood .
abstract_zh: 我们研究不同损失函数对医学图像病变分割的影响。尽管交叉熵（CE）损失是处理自然图像时最流行的选择，但对于生物医学图像分割，软 Dice 损失通常是首选，因为它能够处理不平衡的场景。另一方面，两种功能的结合也已成功应用于此类任务。一个较少研究的问题是在存在分布外（OoD）数据的情况下所有这些损失的泛化能力。这是指测试时间内出现的样本来自与训练图像不同的分布。在我们的例子中，我们在始终包含病变的图像上训练模型，但在测试时我们也有无病变的样本。我们通过内窥镜图像息肉分割和糖尿病足图像溃疡分割的综合实验，分析了不同损失函数最小化对分布内性能的影响，以及其推广到 OoD 数据的能力。我们的发现令人惊讶：擅长分割分布图像的 CE-Dice 损失组合在处理 OoD 数据时表现不佳，这导致我们建议采用 CE 损失来解决此类问题，因为它的鲁棒性和泛化到 OoD 样本的能力。与我们的实验相关的代码可以在 https://github.com/agaldran/lesion_losses_ood 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同损失函数在医学图像病变分割中的影响，特别关注其在分布外（OoD）数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管交叉熵（CE）损失在自然图像中常用，而软Dice损失在处理医学图像不平衡数据时更受欢迎，但现有研究较少关注这些损失函数在分布外数据上的表现。
AI.method: 通过在内镜图像息肉分割和糖尿病足溃疡分割任务中进行实验，分析CE、Dice及组合损失函数在分布内和分布外数据上的性能差异。
AI.result: CE-Dice组合损失在分布内数据表现优异，但在分布外数据上表现较差，而单独使用CE损失在分布外数据上更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 对于可能存在分布外数据的医学分割任务，推荐采用交叉熵损失以提升模型的泛化能力。

authors_text: Skylar E. Stolte,Kyle Volle,Aprinda Indahlastari,Alejandro Albizu,Adam J. Woods,Kevin Brink,Matthew Hale,Ruogu Fang
title: DOMINO: Domain-aware Model Calibration in Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: DOMINO：医学图像分割中的领域感知模型校准
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Accepted by International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022 Oral Talk
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Accepted by International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI) 2022 Oral Talk
abstract: Model calibration measures the agreement between the predicted probability estimates and the true correctness likelihood. Proper model calibration is vital for high-risk applications. Unfortunately, modern deep neural networks are poorly calibrated, compromising trustworthiness and reliability. Medical image segmentation particularly suffers from this due to the natural uncertainty of tissue boundaries. This is exasperated by their loss functions, which favor overconfidence in the majority classes. We address these challenges with DOMINO, a domain-aware model calibration method that leverages the semantic confusability and hierarchical similarity between class labels. Our experiments demonstrate that our DOMINO-calibrated deep neural networks outperform non-calibrated models and state-of-the-art morphometric methods in head image segmentation. Our results show that our method can consistently achieve better calibration, higher accuracy, and faster inference times than these methods, especially on rarer classes. This performance is attributed to our domain-aware regularization to inform semantic model calibration. These findings show the importance of semantic ties between class labels in building confidence in deep learning models. The framework has the potential to improve the trustworthiness and reliability of generic medical image segmentation models. The code for this article is available at: https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO.
summary: Model calibration measures the agreement between the predicted probability estimates and the true correctness likelihood. Proper model calibration is vital for high-risk applications. Unfortunately, modern deep neural networks are poorly calibrated, compromising trustworthiness and reliability. Medical image segmentation particularly suffers from this due to the natural uncertainty of tissue boundaries. This is exasperated by their loss functions, which favor overconfidence in the majority classes. We address these challenges with DOMINO, a domain-aware model calibration method that leverages the semantic confusability and hierarchical similarity between class labels. Our experiments demonstrate that our DOMINO-calibrated deep neural networks outperform non-calibrated models and state-of-the-art morphometric methods in head image segmentation. Our results show that our method can consistently achieve better calibration, higher accuracy, and faster inference times than these methods, especially on rarer classes. This performance is attributed to our domain-aware regularization to inform semantic model calibration. These findings show the importance of semantic ties between class labels in building confidence in deep learning models. The framework has the potential to improve the trustworthiness and reliability of generic medical image segmentation models. The code for this article is available at: https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO.
abstract_zh: 模型校准衡量预测概率估计值与真实正确性可能性之间的一致性。正确的模型校准对于高风险应用至关重要。不幸的是，现代深度神经网络的校准很差，从而损害了可信度和可靠性。由于组织边界的自然不确定性，医学图像分割尤其受到这种影响。他们的损失函数加剧了这种情况，而损失函数有利于大多数类别的过度自信。我们使用 DOMINO 来解决这些挑战，这是一种领域感知模型校准方法，利用类标签之间的语义混淆性和层次相似性。我们的实验表明，我们的多米诺校准深度神经网络在头部图像分割方面优于未校准模型和最先进的形态测量方法。我们的结果表明，与这些方法相比，我们的方法始终能够实现更好的校准、更高的准确性和更快的推理时间，尤其是在较稀有的类别上。这种性能归功于我们的领域感知正则化，以通知语义模型校准。这些发现表明了类标签之间的语义联系对于建立深度学习模型的信心的重要性。该框架有潜力提高通用医学图像分割模型的可信度和可靠性。本文的代码位于：https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOMINO方法，在医疗图像分割中通过领域感知的模型校准提升模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分割中模型校准不足，组织边界不确定性及损失函数对多数类的偏好导致模型可信度下降。
AI.method: DOMINO利用类别标签的语义混淆性与层次相似性，通过领域感知正则化实现语义驱动的模型校准。
AI.result: DOMINO在头部图像分割任务中优于非校准模型及现有方法，尤其在罕见类别上提升校准效果、准确率与推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 类别标签间的语义关联对构建可信深度学习模型至关重要，DOMINO框架可提升医疗图像分割的可靠性。

search_text: DOMINO: Domain-aware Model Calibration in Medical Image Segmentation DOMINO：医学图像分割中的领域感知模型校准 Model calibration measures the agreement between the predicted probability estimates and the true correctness likelihood. Proper model calibration is vital for high-risk applications. Unfortunately, modern deep neural networks are poorly calibrated, compromising trustworthiness and reliability. Medical image segmentation particularly suffers from this due to the natural uncertainty of tissue boundaries. This is exasperated by their loss functions, which favor overconfidence in the majority classes. We address these challenges with DOMINO, a domain-aware model calibration method that leverages the semantic confusability and hierarchical similarity between class labels. Our experiments demonstrate that our DOMINO-calibrated deep neural networks outperform non-calibrated models and state-of-the-art morphometric methods in head image segmentation. Our results show that our method can consistently achieve better calibration, higher accuracy, and faster inference times than these methods, especially on rarer classes. This performance is attributed to our domain-aware regularization to inform semantic model calibration. These findings show the importance of semantic ties between class labels in building confidence in deep learning models. The framework has the potential to improve the trustworthiness and reliability of generic medical image segmentation models. The code for this article is available at: https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO. 模型校准衡量预测概率估计值与真实正确性可能性之间的一致性。正确的模型校准对于高风险应用至关重要。不幸的是，现代深度神经网络的校准很差，从而损害了可信度和可靠性。由于组织边界的自然不确定性，医学图像分割尤其受到这种影响。他们的损失函数加剧了这种情况，而损失函数有利于大多数类别的过度自信。我们使用 DOMINO 来解决这些挑战，这是一种领域感知模型校准方法，利用类标签之间的语义混淆性和层次相似性。我们的实验表明，我们的多米诺校准深度神经网络在头部图像分割方面优于未校准模型和最先进的形态测量方法。我们的结果表明，与这些方法相比，我们的方法始终能够实现更好的校准、更高的准确性和更快的推理时间，尤其是在较稀有的类别上。这种性能归功于我们的领域感知正则化，以通知语义模型校准。这些发现表明了类标签之间的语义联系对于建立深度学习模型的信心的重要性。该框架有潜力提高通用医学图像分割模型的可信度和可靠性。本文的代码位于：https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO。 本文提出DOMINO方法，在医疗图像分割中通过领域感知的模型校准提升模型可靠性。 Skylar E. Stolte,Kyle Volle,Aprinda Indahlastari,Alejandro Albizu,Adam J. Woods,Kevin Brink,Matthew Hale,Ruogu Fang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sotiris Stavridis,Dimitrios Papageorgiou,Leonidas Droukas,Zoe Doulgeri
title: Bimanual crop manipulation for human-inspired robotic harvesting
title_zh: 用于仿人机器人收割的双手农作物操作
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, 1 table. This paper is a pre-print version under review
comments: 8 pages, 10 figures, 1 table. This paper is a pre-print version under review
abstract: Most existing robotic harvesters utilize a unimanual approach; a single arm grasps the crop and detaches it, either via a detachment movement, or by cutting its stem with a specially designed gripper/cutter end-effector. However, such unimanual solutions cannot be applied for sensitive crops and cluttered environments like grapes and a vineyard where obstacles may occlude the stem and leave no space for the cutter's placement. In such cases, the solution would require a bimanual robot in order to visually unveil the stem and manipulate the grasped crop to create cutting affordances which is similar to the practice used by humans. In this work, a dual-arm coordinated motion control methodology for reaching a stem pre-cut state is proposed. The camera equipped arm with the cutter is reaching the stem, unveiling it as much as possible, while the second arm is moving the grasped crop towards the surrounding free-space to facilitate its stem cutting. Lab experimentation on a mock-up vine setup with a plastic grape cluster evaluates the proposed methodology, involving two UR5e robotic arms and a RealSense D415 camera.
summary: Most existing robotic harvesters utilize a unimanual approach; a single arm grasps the crop and detaches it, either via a detachment movement, or by cutting its stem with a specially designed gripper/cutter end-effector. However, such unimanual solutions cannot be applied for sensitive crops and cluttered environments like grapes and a vineyard where obstacles may occlude the stem and leave no space for the cutter's placement. In such cases, the solution would require a bimanual robot in order to visually unveil the stem and manipulate the grasped crop to create cutting affordances which is similar to the practice used by humans. In this work, a dual-arm coordinated motion control methodology for reaching a stem pre-cut state is proposed. The camera equipped arm with the cutter is reaching the stem, unveiling it as much as possible, while the second arm is moving the grasped crop towards the surrounding free-space to facilitate its stem cutting. Lab experimentation on a mock-up vine setup with a plastic grape cluster evaluates the proposed methodology, involving two UR5e robotic arms and a RealSense D415 camera.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的机器人收割机采用单手动方法；单臂抓住作物并将其分离，或者通过分离运动，或者通过使用专门设计的夹具/刀具末端执行器切割其茎。然而，这种单手动解决方案不能应用于敏感作物和杂乱的环境，例如葡萄和葡萄园，其中障碍物可能会遮挡茎并且没有留出放置切割器的空间。在这种情况下，解决方案需要一个双手机器人，以便在视觉上揭开茎并操纵抓取的作物以创建类似于人类使用的做法的切割可供性。在这项工作中，提出了一种用于达到茎预切状态的双臂协调运动控制方法。配备摄像头和切割器的手臂正在到达茎，尽可能地揭示它，而第二个手臂正在将抓取的作物移向周围的自由空间，以方便其茎切割。在带有塑料葡萄串的模拟藤蔓装置上进行的实验室实验评估了所提出的方法，包括两个 UR5e 机械臂和一个 RealSense D415 相机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双臂协调控制方法，用于解决复杂环境中敏感作物的机器人采摘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单臂采摘机器人无法处理葡萄等易损作物及藤蔓环境中茎部被遮挡的问题，需模仿人类双臂操作方式实现茎部暴露与切割。
AI.method: 采用双UR5e机械臂协同控制，配备RealSense D415相机的机械臂负责茎部定位与暴露，另一机械臂将作物移向自由空间辅助切割。
AI.result: 实验室模拟藤蔓环境下验证了双臂协作方法的有效性，成功实现了茎部预切割状态的达成。
AI.conclusion: 双臂协同操作方法为复杂环境下的柔性作物采摘提供了可行解决方案，符合人类操作范式。

authors_text: L. A. Camuñas-Mesa,E. Vianello,C. Reita,T. Serrano-Gotarredona,B. Linares-Barranco
title: A CMOL-Like Memristor-CMOS Neuromorphic Chip-Core Demonstrating Stochastic Binary STDP
title_zh: 类 CMOL 忆阻器 CMOS 神经形态芯片核心演示随机二进制 STDP
comment: accepted for IEEE Journal on Emerging Topics in Circuits and Systems
comments: accepted for IEEE Journal on Emerging Topics in Circuits and Systems
abstract: The advent of nanoscale memristors raised hopes of being able to build CMOL (CMOS/nanowire/moLecular) type ultra-dense in-memory-computing circuit architectures. In CMOL, nanoscale memristors would be fabricated at the intersection of nanowires. The CMOL concept can be exploited in neuromorphic hardware by fabricating lower-density neurons on CMOS and placing massive analog synaptic connectivity with nanowire and nanoscale-memristor fabric post-fabricated on top. However, technical problems have hindered such developments for presently available reliable commercial monolithic CMOS-memristor technologies. On one hand, each memristor needs a MOS selector transistor in series to guarantee forming and programming operations in large arrays. This results in compound MOS-memristor synapses (called 1T1R) which are no longer synapses at the crossing of nanowires. On the other hand, memristors do not yet constitute highly reliable, stable analog memories for massive analog-weight synapses with gradual learning. Here we demonstrate a pseudo-CMOL monolithic chip core that circumvents the two technical problems mentioned above by (a) exploiting a CMOL-like geometrical chip layout technique to improve density despite the 1T1R limitation, and (b) exploiting a binary weight stochastic Spike-Timing-Dependent-Plasticity (STDP) learning rule that takes advantage of the more reliable binary memory capability of the memristors used. Experimental results are provided for a spiking neural network (SNN) CMOL-core with 64 input neurons, 64 output neurons, and 4096 1T1R synapses, fabricated in 130nm CMOS with 200nm-sized Ti/HfOx/TiN memristors on top. The CMOL-core uses query-driven event read-out, which allows for memristor variability insensitive computations.
summary: The advent of nanoscale memristors raised hopes of being able to build CMOL (CMOS/nanowire/moLecular) type ultra-dense in-memory-computing circuit architectures. In CMOL, nanoscale memristors would be fabricated at the intersection of nanowires. The CMOL concept can be exploited in neuromorphic hardware by fabricating lower-density neurons on CMOS and placing massive analog synaptic connectivity with nanowire and nanoscale-memristor fabric post-fabricated on top. However, technical problems have hindered such developments for presently available reliable commercial monolithic CMOS-memristor technologies. On one hand, each memristor needs a MOS selector transistor in series to guarantee forming and programming operations in large arrays. This results in compound MOS-memristor synapses (called 1T1R) which are no longer synapses at the crossing of nanowires. On the other hand, memristors do not yet constitute highly reliable, stable analog memories for massive analog-weight synapses with gradual learning. Here we demonstrate a pseudo-CMOL monolithic chip core that circumvents the two technical problems mentioned above by (a) exploiting a CMOL-like geometrical chip layout technique to improve density despite the 1T1R limitation, and (b) exploiting a binary weight stochastic Spike-Timing-Dependent-Plasticity (STDP) learning rule that takes advantage of the more reliable binary memory capability of the memristors used. Experimental results are provided for a spiking neural network (SNN) CMOL-core with 64 input neurons, 64 output neurons, and 4096 1T1R synapses, fabricated in 130nm CMOS with 200nm-sized Ti/HfOx/TiN memristors on top. The CMOL-core uses query-driven event read-out, which allows for memristor variability insensitive computations.
abstract_zh: 纳米级忆阻器的出现带来了构建 CMOL（CMOS/纳米线/分子）型超密集内存计算电路架构的希望。在 CMOL 中，纳米级忆阻器将在纳米线的交叉点处制造。 CMOL 概念可以在神经形态硬件中得到利用，方法是在 CMOS 上制造低密度神经元，并在顶部放置带有纳米线和纳米级忆阻器结构的大规模模拟突触连接。然而，技术问题阻碍了目前可用的可靠商用单片 CMOS 忆阻器技术的发展。一方面，每个忆阻器都需要串联一个MOS选择晶体管，以保证大型阵列的形成和编程操作。这导致了复合 MOS 忆阻器突触（称为 1T1R），它们不再是纳米线交叉处的突触。另一方面，忆阻器尚未构成具有渐进学习能力的大规模模拟权重突触的高度可靠、稳定的模拟存储器。在这里，我们演示了一种伪 CMOL 单片芯片内核，它通过以下方式规避了上述两个技术问题：(a) 利用类似 CMOL 的几何芯片布局技术来提高密度，尽管存在 1T1R 限制；(b) 利用二进制权重随机尖峰时序相关塑性 (STDP) 学习规则，该规则利用了所用忆阻器更可靠的二进制存储能力。提供了尖峰神经网络 (SNN) CMOL 核心的实验结果，该核心具有 64 个输入神经元、64 个输出神经元和 4096 个 1T1R 突触，采用 130 nm CMOS 制造，顶部具有 200 nm 尺寸的 Ti/HfOx/TiN 忆阻器。 CMOL 核心使用查询驱动的事件读出，允许对忆阻器变化不敏感的计算。

AI.tldr: 设计并演示一种解决现有技术问题的伪CMOL忆阻器-CMOS神经形态芯片核心
AI.motivation: 现有CMOL架构因1T1R结构限制和忆阻器可靠性不足阻碍了神经形态硬件发展
AI.method: 采用CMOL几何布局和二进制权重随机STDP学习规则
AI.result: 成功实现具有64输入/输出神经元和4096个1T1R突触的SNN芯片，展示出对忆阻器变异的不敏感计算
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了CMOL架构的技术障碍，为高密度神经形态计算提供了可行硬件方案

motivation: 现有CMOL架构因1T1R结构限制和忆阻器可靠性不足阻碍了神经形态硬件发展
method: 采用CMOL几何布局和二进制权重随机STDP学习规则
result: 成功实现具有64输入/输出神经元和4096个1T1R突触的SNN芯片，展示出对忆阻器变异的不敏感计算
conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了CMOL架构的技术障碍，为高密度神经形态计算提供了可行硬件方案
search_text: A CMOL-Like Memristor-CMOS Neuromorphic Chip-Core Demonstrating Stochastic Binary STDP 类 CMOL 忆阻器 CMOS 神经形态芯片核心演示随机二进制 STDP The advent of nanoscale memristors raised hopes of being able to build CMOL (CMOS/nanowire/moLecular) type ultra-dense in-memory-computing circuit architectures. In CMOL, nanoscale memristors would be fabricated at the intersection of nanowires. The CMOL concept can be exploited in neuromorphic hardware by fabricating lower-density neurons on CMOS and placing massive analog synaptic connectivity with nanowire and nanoscale-memristor fabric post-fabricated on top. However, technical problems have hindered such developments for presently available reliable commercial monolithic CMOS-memristor technologies. On one hand, each memristor needs a MOS selector transistor in series to guarantee forming and programming operations in large arrays. This results in compound MOS-memristor synapses (called 1T1R) which are no longer synapses at the crossing of nanowires. On the other hand, memristors do not yet constitute highly reliable, stable analog memories for massive analog-weight synapses with gradual learning. Here we demonstrate a pseudo-CMOL monolithic chip core that circumvents the two technical problems mentioned above by (a) exploiting a CMOL-like geometrical chip layout technique to improve density despite the 1T1R limitation, and (b) exploiting a binary weight stochastic Spike-Timing-Dependent-Plasticity (STDP) learning rule that takes advantage of the more reliable binary memory capability of the memristors used. Experimental results are provided for a spiking neural network (SNN) CMOL-core with 64 input neurons, 64 output neurons, and 4096 1T1R synapses, fabricated in 130nm CMOS with 200nm-sized Ti/HfOx/TiN memristors on top. The CMOL-core uses query-driven event read-out, which allows for memristor variability insensitive computations. 纳米级忆阻器的出现带来了构建 CMOL（CMOS/纳米线/分子）型超密集内存计算电路架构的希望。在 CMOL 中，纳米级忆阻器将在纳米线的交叉点处制造。 CMOL 概念可以在神经形态硬件中得到利用，方法是在 CMOS 上制造低密度神经元，并在顶部放置带有纳米线和纳米级忆阻器结构的大规模模拟突触连接。然而，技术问题阻碍了目前可用的可靠商用单片 CMOS 忆阻器技术的发展。一方面，每个忆阻器都需要串联一个MOS选择晶体管，以保证大型阵列的形成和编程操作。这导致了复合 MOS 忆阻器突触（称为 1T1R），它们不再是纳米线交叉处的突触。另一方面，忆阻器尚未构成具有渐进学习能力的大规模模拟权重突触的高度可靠、稳定的模拟存储器。在这里，我们演示了一种伪 CMOL 单片芯片内核，它通过以下方式规避了上述两个技术问题：(a) 利用类似 CMOL 的几何芯片布局技术来提高密度，尽管存在 1T1R 限制；(b) 利用二进制权重随机尖峰时序相关塑性 (STDP) 学习规则，该规则利用了所用忆阻器更可靠的二进制存储能力。提供了尖峰神经网络 (SNN) CMOL 核心的实验结果，该核心具有 64 个输入神经元、64 个输出神经元和 4096 个 1T1R 突触，采用 130 nm CMOS 制造，顶部具有 200 nm 尺寸的 Ti/HfOx/TiN 忆阻器。 CMOL 核心使用查询驱动的事件读出，允许对忆阻器变化不敏感的计算。 设计并演示一种解决现有技术问题的伪CMOL忆阻器-CMOS神经形态芯片核心 L. A. Camuñas-Mesa,E. Vianello,C. Reita,T. Serrano-Gotarredona,B. Linares-Barranco cs.ET,eess.IV,eess.SP,eess.SY

authors_text: Siddhant Garg,Mudit Chaudhary
title: SeRP: Self-Supervised Representation Learning Using Perturbed Point Clouds
title_zh: SeRP：使用扰动点云的自监督表示学习
comment: 6 pages
comments: 6 pages
abstract: We present SeRP, a framework for Self-Supervised Learning of 3D point clouds. SeRP consists of encoder-decoder architecture that takes perturbed or corrupted point clouds as inputs and aims to reconstruct the original point cloud without corruption. The encoder learns the high-level latent representations of the points clouds in a low-dimensional subspace and recovers the original structure. In this work, we have used Transformers and PointNet-based Autoencoders. The proposed framework also addresses some of the limitations of Transformers-based Masked Autoencoders which are prone to leakage of location information and uneven information density. We trained our models on the complete ShapeNet dataset and evaluated them on ModelNet40 as a downstream classification task. We have shown that the pretrained models achieved 0.5-1% higher classification accuracies than the networks trained from scratch. Furthermore, we also proposed VASP: Vector-Quantized Autoencoder for Self-supervised Representation Learning for Point Clouds that employs Vector-Quantization for discrete representation learning for Transformer-based autoencoders.
summary: We present SeRP, a framework for Self-Supervised Learning of 3D point clouds. SeRP consists of encoder-decoder architecture that takes perturbed or corrupted point clouds as inputs and aims to reconstruct the original point cloud without corruption. The encoder learns the high-level latent representations of the points clouds in a low-dimensional subspace and recovers the original structure. In this work, we have used Transformers and PointNet-based Autoencoders. The proposed framework also addresses some of the limitations of Transformers-based Masked Autoencoders which are prone to leakage of location information and uneven information density. We trained our models on the complete ShapeNet dataset and evaluated them on ModelNet40 as a downstream classification task. We have shown that the pretrained models achieved 0.5-1% higher classification accuracies than the networks trained from scratch. Furthermore, we also proposed VASP: Vector-Quantized Autoencoder for Self-supervised Representation Learning for Point Clouds that employs Vector-Quantization for discrete representation learning for Transformer-based autoencoders.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 SeRP，一个 3D 点云自监督学习框架。 SeRP 由编码器-解码器架构组成，该架构以扰动或损坏的点云作为输入，旨在重建原始点云而不损坏。编码器学习低维子空间中点云的高级潜在表示并恢复原始结构。在这项工作中，我们使用了 Transformer 和基于 PointNet 的自动编码器。所提出的框架还解决了基于 Transformers 的掩码自动编码器的一些限制，这些限制容易泄漏位置信息和信息密度不均匀。我们在完整的 ShapeNet 数据集上训练我们的模型，并在 ModelNet40 上对它们进行评估作为下游分类任务。我们已经证明，预训练模型的分类精度比从头开始训练的网络高 0.5-1%。此外，我们还提出了 VASP：用于点云自监督表示学习的矢量量化自动编码器，它采用矢量量化为基于 Transformer 的自动编码器进行离散表示学习。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扰动点云的自监督表示学习框架SeRP，通过重建原始点云实现3D点云的特征学习。
AI.motivation: 解决基于Transformer的掩码自编码器在点云处理中存在位置信息泄露和信息密度不均的问题，提升自监督学习效果。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，结合Transformer与PointNet自编码器，利用扰动点云进行重建训练，并提出离散表示学习方法VASP（向量量化自编码器）。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集训练后，ModelNet40分类任务中预训练模型分类准确率比从头训练网络高0.5-1%。
AI.conclusion: SeRP框架有效解决了现有方法的局限性，通过自监督预训练显著提升点云分类性能，并创新性提出VASP方法实现离散表示学习。

authors_text: Chao Zhang,Bo Li,Tara Sainath,Trevor Strohman,Sepand Mavandadi,Shuo-yiin Chang,Parisa Haghani
title: Streaming End-to-End Multilingual Speech Recognition with Joint Language Identification
title_zh: 具有联合语言识别的流式端到端多语言语音识别
abstract: Language identification is critical for many downstream tasks in automatic speech recognition (ASR), and is beneficial to integrate into multilingual end-to-end ASR as an additional task. In this paper, we propose to modify the structure of the cascaded-encoder-based recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) model by integrating a per-frame language identifier (LID) predictor. RNN-T with cascaded encoders can achieve streaming ASR with low latency using first-pass decoding with no right-context, and achieve lower word error rates (WERs) using second-pass decoding with longer right-context. By leveraging such differences in the right-contexts and a streaming implementation of statistics pooling, the proposed method can achieve accurate streaming LID prediction with little extra test-time cost. Experimental results on a voice search dataset with 9 language locales shows that the proposed method achieves an average of 96.2% LID prediction accuracy and the same second-pass WER as that obtained by including oracle LID in the input.
summary: Language identification is critical for many downstream tasks in automatic speech recognition (ASR), and is beneficial to integrate into multilingual end-to-end ASR as an additional task. In this paper, we propose to modify the structure of the cascaded-encoder-based recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) model by integrating a per-frame language identifier (LID) predictor. RNN-T with cascaded encoders can achieve streaming ASR with low latency using first-pass decoding with no right-context, and achieve lower word error rates (WERs) using second-pass decoding with longer right-context. By leveraging such differences in the right-contexts and a streaming implementation of statistics pooling, the proposed method can achieve accurate streaming LID prediction with little extra test-time cost. Experimental results on a voice search dataset with 9 language locales shows that the proposed method achieves an average of 96.2% LID prediction accuracy and the same second-pass WER as that obtained by including oracle LID in the input.
abstract_zh: 语言识别对于自动语音识别 (ASR) 中的许多下游任务至关重要，并且有利于作为附加任务集成到多语言端到端 ASR 中。在本文中，我们建议通过集成每帧语言标识符（LID）预测器来修改基于级联编码器的递归神经网络传感器（RNN-T）模型的结构。具有级联编码器的 RNN-T 可以使用无右上下文的第一遍解码实现低延迟的流式 ASR，并使用较长右上下文的第二遍解码实现较低的字错误率 (WER)。通过利用右上下文中的这种差异和统计池的流式实现，所提出的方法可以实现准确的流式 LID 预测，而几乎不需要额外的测试时间成本。在具有 9 种语言环境的语音搜索数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法平均实现了 96.2% 的 LID 预测精度，并且与在输入中包含 oracle LID 所获得的第二遍 WER 相同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语言识别（LID）的流式端到端多语言语音识别方法，通过改进RNN-T模型结构实现低延迟的LID预测。
AI.motivation: 语言识别对多语言语音识别任务至关重要，但传统方法难以在低延迟流式处理中实现高精度LID预测。
AI.method: 基于级联编码器的RNN-T模型集成逐帧LID预测器，利用前后解码阶段的上下文差异与流式统计池化技术实现高效LID预测。
AI.result: 在9种语言的语音搜索数据集上达到96.2%的LID准确率，且二次解码词错误率与使用理想LID输入结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持低测试成本的同时，有效提升了流式多语言语音识别中的语言识别精度与整体性能。

authors_text: Zihao Wang,Qihao Liang,Kejun Zhang,Yuxing Wang,Chen Zhang,Pengfei Yu,Yongsheng Feng,Wenbo Liu,Yikai Wang,Yuntai Bao,Yiheng Yang
title: SongDriver: Real-time Music Accompaniment Generation without Logical Latency nor Exposure Bias
title_zh: SongDriver：实时音乐伴奏生成，无逻辑延迟和曝光偏差
comment: *Both Zihao Wang and Qihao Liang contribute equally to the paper and share the co-first authorship. This paper has been accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022, oral session, full paper (main track)
comments: *Both Zihao Wang and Qihao Liang contribute equally to the paper and share the co-first authorship. This paper has been accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022, oral session, full paper (main track)
abstract: Real-time music accompaniment generation has a wide range of applications in the music industry, such as music education and live performances. However, automatic real-time music accompaniment generation is still understudied and often faces a trade-off between logical latency and exposure bias. In this paper, we propose SongDriver, a real-time music accompaniment generation system without logical latency nor exposure bias. Specifically, SongDriver divides one accompaniment generation task into two phases: 1) The arrangement phase, where a Transformer model first arranges chords for input melodies in real-time, and caches the chords for the next phase instead of playing them out. 2) The prediction phase, where a CRF model generates playable multi-track accompaniments for the coming melodies based on previously cached chords. With this two-phase strategy, SongDriver directly generates the accompaniment for the upcoming melody, achieving zero logical latency. Furthermore, when predicting chords for a timestep, SongDriver refers to the cached chords from the first phase rather than its previous predictions, which avoids the exposure bias problem. Since the input length is often constrained under real-time conditions, another potential problem is the loss of long-term sequential information. To make up for this disadvantage, we extract four musical features from a long-term music piece before the current time step as global information. In the experiment, we train SongDriver on some open-source datasets and an original àiSong Dataset built from Chinese-style modern pop music scores. The results show that SongDriver outperforms existing SOTA (state-of-the-art) models on both objective and subjective metrics, meanwhile significantly reducing the physical latency.
summary: Real-time music accompaniment generation has a wide range of applications in the music industry, such as music education and live performances. However, automatic real-time music accompaniment generation is still understudied and often faces a trade-off between logical latency and exposure bias. In this paper, we propose SongDriver, a real-time music accompaniment generation system without logical latency nor exposure bias. Specifically, SongDriver divides one accompaniment generation task into two phases: 1) The arrangement phase, where a Transformer model first arranges chords for input melodies in real-time, and caches the chords for the next phase instead of playing them out. 2) The prediction phase, where a CRF model generates playable multi-track accompaniments for the coming melodies based on previously cached chords. With this two-phase strategy, SongDriver directly generates the accompaniment for the upcoming melody, achieving zero logical latency. Furthermore, when predicting chords for a timestep, SongDriver refers to the cached chords from the first phase rather than its previous predictions, which avoids the exposure bias problem. Since the input length is often constrained under real-time conditions, another potential problem is the loss of long-term sequential information. To make up for this disadvantage, we extract four musical features from a long-term music piece before the current time step as global information. In the experiment, we train SongDriver on some open-source datasets and an original àiSong Dataset built from Chinese-style modern pop music scores. The results show that SongDriver outperforms existing SOTA (state-of-the-art) models on both objective and subjective metrics, meanwhile significantly reducing the physical latency.
abstract_zh: 实时音乐伴奏生成在音乐行业有着广泛的应用，例如音乐教育和现场表演。然而，自动实时音乐伴奏生成仍然没有得到充分研究，并且经常面临逻辑延迟和曝光偏差之间的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了 SongDriver，一种没有逻辑延迟和曝光偏差的实时音乐伴奏生成系统。具体来说，SongDriver将一个伴奏生成任务分为两个阶段：1）编曲阶段，Transformer模型首先实时为输入旋律编排和弦，并缓存和弦以供下一阶段使用，而不是播放出来。 2) 预测阶段，CRF 模型根据之前缓存的和弦为即将到来的旋律生成可播放的多轨伴奏。通过这种两阶段策略，SongDriver 直接为即将到来的旋律生成伴奏，实现零逻辑延迟。此外，在预测时间步长的和弦时，SongDriver 会参考第一阶段缓存的和弦而不是之前的预测，这避免了曝光偏差问题。由于输入长度在实时条件下通常受到限制，因此另一个潜在问题是长期顺序信息的丢失。为了弥补这个缺点，我们从当前时间步之前的长期音乐片段中提取四个音乐特征作为全局信息。在实验中，我们在一些开源数据集和一个由中国风格的现代流行乐谱构建的原始 àiSong 数据集上训练 SongDriver。结果表明，SongDriver 在客观和主观指标上均优于现有的 SOTA（最先进）模型，同时显着降低了物理延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SongDriver系统，实现无逻辑延迟和暴露偏差的实时音乐伴奏生成。
AI.motivation: 实时音乐伴奏生成在音乐教育和现场表演中应用广泛，但现有方法存在逻辑延迟与暴露偏差的权衡问题，需解决实时性与生成质量的矛盾。
AI.method: 采用两阶段策略：1) 使用Transformer模型实时生成和弦并缓存；2) 基于缓存和弦用CRF模型生成多轨伴奏。通过长时音乐特征提取弥补序列信息丢失，并避免暴露偏差。
AI.result: 在开源数据集和自建中文流行音乐数据集上，SongDriver在客观与主观指标上均优于现有SOTA模型，同时显著降低物理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段架构有效消除逻辑延迟与暴露偏差，为实时音乐伴奏生成提供新解决方案。
