authors_text: Zhao-Yu Zhang,Xiang-Rong Sheng,Yujing Zhang,Biye Jiang,Shuguang Han,Hongbo Deng,Bo Zheng
title: Towards Understanding the Overfitting Phenomenon of Deep Click-Through Rate Prediction Models
title_zh: 理解深度点击率预测模型的过度拟合现象
comment: Accepted by CIKM2022
comments: Accepted by CIKM2022
abstract: Deep learning techniques have been applied widely in industrial recommendation systems. However, far less attention has been paid to the overfitting problem of models in recommendation systems, which, on the contrary, is recognized as a critical issue for deep neural networks. In the context of Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction, we observe an interesting one-epoch overfitting problem: the model performance exhibits a dramatic degradation at the beginning of the second epoch. Such a phenomenon has been witnessed widely in real-world applications of CTR models. Thereby, the best performance is usually achieved by training with only one epoch. To understand the underlying factors behind the one-epoch phenomenon, we conduct extensive experiments on the production data set collected from the display advertising system of Alibaba. The results show that the model structure, the optimization algorithm with a fast convergence rate, and the feature sparsity are closely related to the one-epoch phenomenon. We also provide a likely hypothesis for explaining such a phenomenon and conduct a set of proof-of-concept experiments. We hope this work can shed light on future research on training more epochs for better performance.
summary: Deep learning techniques have been applied widely in industrial recommendation systems. However, far less attention has been paid to the overfitting problem of models in recommendation systems, which, on the contrary, is recognized as a critical issue for deep neural networks. In the context of Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction, we observe an interesting one-epoch overfitting problem: the model performance exhibits a dramatic degradation at the beginning of the second epoch. Such a phenomenon has been witnessed widely in real-world applications of CTR models. Thereby, the best performance is usually achieved by training with only one epoch. To understand the underlying factors behind the one-epoch phenomenon, we conduct extensive experiments on the production data set collected from the display advertising system of Alibaba. The results show that the model structure, the optimization algorithm with a fast convergence rate, and the feature sparsity are closely related to the one-epoch phenomenon. We also provide a likely hypothesis for explaining such a phenomenon and conduct a set of proof-of-concept experiments. We hope this work can shed light on future research on training more epochs for better performance.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术在工业推荐系统中得到了广泛的应用。然而，推荐系统中模型的过拟合问题却很少受到关注，相反，这被认为是深度神经网络的一个关键问题。在点击率 (CTR) 预测的背景下，我们观察到一个有趣的单周期过度拟合问题：模型性能在第二周期开始时表现出急剧下降。这种现象在 CTR 模型的实际应用中广泛存在。因此，通常仅通过一个 epoch 的训练即可获得最佳性能。为了了解这一单纪元现象背后的潜在因素，我们对从阿里巴巴展示广告系统收集的生产数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，模型结构、收敛速度快的优化算法以及特征稀疏性与one-epoch现象密切相关。我们还提供了一个可能的假设来解释这种现象，并进行了一系列概念验证实验。我们希望这项工作能够为未来关于训练更多纪元以获得更好性能的研究提供启示。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度点击率预测模型中的单轮过拟合现象，分析其成因并提出可能的解释。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统中深度模型的过拟合问题未受足够关注，而实际应用中单轮训练即达最佳效果，需理解其背后机制以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 基于阿里巴巴广告系统生产数据集，通过实验分析模型结构、优化算法及特征稀疏性对单轮过拟合的影响，并提出假设验证。
AI.result: 实验表明模型结构、快速收敛算法与特征稀疏性与单轮现象密切相关，验证了假设的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为深入理解深度CTR模型训练机制提供新视角，可能推动更多轮次训练策略的优化探索。

authors_text: Navid Kayhani,Brenda McCabe,Angela P. Schoellig
title: Stochastic Modeling of Tag Installation Error for Robust On-Manifold Tag-Based Visual-Inertial Localization
title_zh: 标签安装误差的随机建模，用于鲁棒歧管上基于标签的视觉惯性定位
comment: Proc. of the Canadian Society of Civil Engineering Annual Conference (CSCE) 2022
comments: Proc. of the Canadian Society of Civil Engineering Annual Conference (CSCE) 2022
abstract: Autonomous mobile robots, including unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), have received significant attention for their applications in construction. These platforms have great potential to automate and enhance the quality and frequency of the required data for many tasks such as construction schedule updating, inspections, and monitoring. Robust localization is a critical enabler for reliable deployments of autonomous robotic platforms. Automated robotic solutions rely mainly on the global positioning system (GPS) for outdoor localization. However, GPS signals are denied indoors, and pre-built environment maps are often used for indoor localization. This entails generating high-quality maps by teleoperating the mobile robot in the environment. Not only is this approach time-consuming and tedious, but it also is unreliable in indoor construction settings. Layout changes with construction progress, requiring frequent mapping sessions to support autonomous missions. Moreover, the effectiveness of vision-based solutions relying on visual features is highly impacted in low texture and repetitive areas on site. To address these challenges, we previously proposed a low-cost, lightweight tag-based visual-inertial localization method using AprilTags. Tags, in this method, are paper printable landmarks with known sizes and locations, representing the environment's quasi-map. Since tag placement/replacement is a manual process, it is subject to human errors. In this work, we study the impact of human error in the manual tag installation process and propose a stochastic approach to account for this uncertainty using the Lie group theory. Employing Monte Carlo simulation, we experimentally show that the proposed stochastic model incorporated in our on-manifold formulation improves the robustness and accuracy of tag-based localization against inevitable imperfections in manual tag installation on site.
summary: Autonomous mobile robots, including unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), have received significant attention for their applications in construction. These platforms have great potential to automate and enhance the quality and frequency of the required data for many tasks such as construction schedule updating, inspections, and monitoring. Robust localization is a critical enabler for reliable deployments of autonomous robotic platforms. Automated robotic solutions rely mainly on the global positioning system (GPS) for outdoor localization. However, GPS signals are denied indoors, and pre-built environment maps are often used for indoor localization. This entails generating high-quality maps by teleoperating the mobile robot in the environment. Not only is this approach time-consuming and tedious, but it also is unreliable in indoor construction settings. Layout changes with construction progress, requiring frequent mapping sessions to support autonomous missions. Moreover, the effectiveness of vision-based solutions relying on visual features is highly impacted in low texture and repetitive areas on site. To address these challenges, we previously proposed a low-cost, lightweight tag-based visual-inertial localization method using AprilTags. Tags, in this method, are paper printable landmarks with known sizes and locations, representing the environment's quasi-map. Since tag placement/replacement is a manual process, it is subject to human errors. In this work, we study the impact of human error in the manual tag installation process and propose a stochastic approach to account for this uncertainty using the Lie group theory. Employing Monte Carlo simulation, we experimentally show that the proposed stochastic model incorporated in our on-manifold formulation improves the robustness and accuracy of tag-based localization against inevitable imperfections in manual tag installation on site.
abstract_zh: 自主移动机器人，包括无人机（UAV），因其在建筑领域的应用而受到广泛关注。这些平台具有巨大的潜力，可以自动化并提高许多任务所需数据的质量和频率，例如施工进度更新、检查和监控。强大的本地化是自主机器人平台可靠部署的关键推动因素。自动化机器人解决方案主要依靠全球定位系统（GPS）进行户外定位。然而，室内没有GPS信号，通常使用预先构建的环境地图进行室内定位。这需要通过在环境中远程操作移动机器人来生成高质量的地图。这种方法不仅耗时且乏味，而且在室内施工环境中也不可靠。布局随着施工进度而变化，需要频繁的测绘会议来支持自主任务。此外，依赖视觉特征的基于视觉的解决方案的有效性在现场低纹理和重复区域中受到很大影响。为了解决这些挑战，我们之前提出了一种使用 AprilTags 的低成本、轻量级的基于标签的视觉惯性定位方法。在这种方法中，标签是具有已知尺寸和位置的纸质可打印地标，代表环境的准地图。由于标签放置/更换是一个手动过程，因此可能会出现人为错误。在这项工作中，我们研究了手动标签安装过程中人为错误的影响，并提出了一种使用李群理论来解释这种不确定性的随机方法。采用蒙特卡罗模拟，我们通过实验表明，所提出的随机模型纳入我们的歧管公式中，提高了基于标签的定位的鲁棒性和准确性，以防止现场手动标签安装中不可避免的缺陷。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李群理论的随机模型，用于应对自主机器人中人工安装标签时的误差问题，以提高基于标签的视觉惯性定位的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在室内施工等GPS信号受限的场景中，传统依赖预构建地图或视觉特征的定位方法存在可靠性低、更新频繁的问题，而人工安装标签的误差会进一步影响定位精度。
AI.method: 通过李群理论建立标签安装误差的随机模型，并结合蒙特卡洛仿真验证该模型在流形框架下的有效性，以量化并补偿人工安装误差带来的不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的随机模型显著提升了标签定位在人工安装误差下的鲁棒性和准确性，尤其在低纹理或重复性环境中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过将安装误差的随机性纳入数学模型，本文为复杂场景下的标签定位提供了更可靠的方法，降低了对精确人工操作的依赖。

authors_text: Shounak Paul,Arpan Mandal,Pawan Goyal,Saptarshi Ghosh
title: Pre-trained Language Models for the Legal Domain: A Case Study on Indian Law
title_zh: 法律领域的预训练语言模型：印度法律案例研究
comment: To be published in the 19th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Law - ICAIL 2023
comments: To be published in the 19th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Law - ICAIL 2023
abstract: NLP in the legal domain has seen increasing success with the emergence of Transformer-based Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) pre-trained on legal text. PLMs trained over European and US legal text are available publicly; however, legal text from other domains (countries), such as India, have a lot of distinguishing characteristics. With the rapidly increasing volume of Legal NLP applications in various countries, it has become necessary to pre-train such LMs over legal text of other countries as well. In this work, we attempt to investigate pre-training in the Indian legal domain. We re-train (continue pre-training) two popular legal PLMs, LegalBERT and CaseLawBERT, on Indian legal data, as well as train a model from scratch with a vocabulary based on Indian legal text. We apply these PLMs over three benchmark legal NLP tasks -- Legal Statute Identification from facts, Semantic Segmentation of Court Judgment Documents, and Court Appeal Judgment Prediction -- over both Indian and non-Indian (EU, UK) datasets. We observe that our approach not only enhances performance on the new domain (Indian texts) but also over the original domain (European and UK texts). We also conduct explainability experiments for a qualitative comparison of all these different PLMs.
summary: NLP in the legal domain has seen increasing success with the emergence of Transformer-based Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) pre-trained on legal text. PLMs trained over European and US legal text are available publicly; however, legal text from other domains (countries), such as India, have a lot of distinguishing characteristics. With the rapidly increasing volume of Legal NLP applications in various countries, it has become necessary to pre-train such LMs over legal text of other countries as well. In this work, we attempt to investigate pre-training in the Indian legal domain. We re-train (continue pre-training) two popular legal PLMs, LegalBERT and CaseLawBERT, on Indian legal data, as well as train a model from scratch with a vocabulary based on Indian legal text. We apply these PLMs over three benchmark legal NLP tasks -- Legal Statute Identification from facts, Semantic Segmentation of Court Judgment Documents, and Court Appeal Judgment Prediction -- over both Indian and non-Indian (EU, UK) datasets. We observe that our approach not only enhances performance on the new domain (Indian texts) but also over the original domain (European and UK texts). We also conduct explainability experiments for a qualitative comparison of all these different PLMs.
abstract_zh: 随着基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在法律文本上进行预训练，NLP 在法律领域取得了越来越大的成功。经过欧洲和美国法律文本培训的 PLM 可公开获取；然而，来自其他领域（国家）（例如印度）的法律文本具有许多显着特征。随着各国法律 NLP 应用量的迅速增加，有必要针对其他国家的法律文本对此类 LM 进行预训练。在这项工作中，我们尝试调查印度法律领域的预培训。我们根据印度法律数据重新训练（继续预训练）两种流行的法律 PLM，LegalBERT 和 CaseLawBERT，并使用基于印度法律文本的词汇从头开始训练模型。我们将这些 PLM 应用于印度和非印度（欧盟、英国）数据集上的三个基准法律 NLP 任务——事实中的法律法规识别、法院判决文件的语义分割和法院上诉判决预测。我们观察到，我们的方法不仅提高了新领域（印度文本）的性能，而且还提高了原始领域（欧洲和英国文本）的性能。我们还进行可解释性实验，以对所有这些不同的 PLM 进行定性比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在印度法律领域预训练语言模型（PLMs）的效果，通过重新训练现有法律PLMs并构建基于印度法律文本的新模型，评估其在法律自然语言处理任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的预训练语言模型主要基于欧美法律文本，而印度法律文本具有独特特征，需针对不同国家法律文本进行适配以提升法律NLP应用效果。
AI.method: 对LegalBERT和CaseLawBERT进行印度法律数据的继续预训练，并从零开始训练基于印度法律词汇表的模型；在印度及非印度（欧盟、英国）数据集上测试三个法律NLP任务（法律条文识别、判决书语义分割、上诉判决预测），并进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: 所提方法在印度法律文本及原始欧美法律文本任务中均表现优于基线模型，且可解释性实验显示不同PLMs在法律文本处理上的差异性。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定法律领域的预训练模型能有效提升跨域任务性能，印度法律文本的适配研究为其他非英语法律域模型开发提供了参考。

We apply these PLMs over three benchmark legal NLP tasks -- Legal Statute Identification from facts, Semantic Segmentation of Court Judgment Documents, and Court Appeal Judgment Prediction -- over both Indian and non-Indian (EU, UK) datasets. We observe that our approach not only enhances performance on the new domain (Indian texts) but also over the original domain (European and UK texts). We also conduct explainability experiments for a qualitative comparison of all these different PLMs. 随着基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在法律文本上进行预训练，NLP 在法律领域取得了越来越大的成功。经过欧洲和美国法律文本培训的 PLM 可公开获取；然而，来自其他领域（国家）（例如印度）的法律文本具有许多显着特征。随着各国法律 NLP 应用量的迅速增加，有必要针对其他国家的法律文本对此类 LM 进行预训练。在这项工作中，我们尝试调查印度法律领域的预培训。我们根据印度法律数据重新训练（继续预训练）两种流行的法律 PLM，LegalBERT 和 CaseLawBERT，并使用基于印度法律文本的词汇从头开始训练模型。我们将这些 PLM 应用于印度和非印度（欧盟、英国）数据集上的三个基准法律 NLP 任务——事实中的法律法规识别、法院判决文件的语义分割和法院上诉判决预测。我们观察到，我们的方法不仅提高了新领域（印度文本）的性能，而且还提高了原始领域（欧洲和英国文本）的性能。我们还进行可解释性实验，以对所有这些不同的 PLM 进行定性比较。 本文研究了在印度法律领域预训练语言模型（PLMs）的效果，通过重新训练现有法律PLMs并构建基于印度法律文本的新模型，评估其在法律自然语言处理任务中的性能。 Shounak Paul,Arpan Mandal,Pawan Goyal,Saptarshi Ghosh cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Edward G. A. Henderson,Eliana M. Vasquez Osorio,Marcel van Herk,Andrew F. Green
title: Generalised Automatic Anatomy Finder (GAAF): A general framework for 3D location-finding in CT scans
title_zh: 通用自动解剖查找器 (GAAF)：CT 扫描中 3D 位置查找的通用框架
abstract: We present GAAF, a Generalised Automatic Anatomy Finder, for the identification of generic anatomical locations in 3D CT scans. GAAF is an end-to-end pipeline, with dedicated modules for data pre-processing, model training, and inference. At it's core, GAAF uses a custom a localisation convolutional neural network (CNN). The CNN model is small, lightweight and can be adjusted to suit the particular application. The GAAF framework has so far been tested in the head and neck, and is able to find anatomical locations such as the centre-of-mass of the brainstem. GAAF was evaluated in an open-access dataset and is capable of accurate and robust localisation performance. All our code is open source and available at https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/GAAF.
summary: We present GAAF, a Generalised Automatic Anatomy Finder, for the identification of generic anatomical locations in 3D CT scans. GAAF is an end-to-end pipeline, with dedicated modules for data pre-processing, model training, and inference. At it's core, GAAF uses a custom a localisation convolutional neural network (CNN). The CNN model is small, lightweight and can be adjusted to suit the particular application. The GAAF framework has so far been tested in the head and neck, and is able to find anatomical locations such as the centre-of-mass of the brainstem. GAAF was evaluated in an open-access dataset and is capable of accurate and robust localisation performance. All our code is open source and available at https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/GAAF.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 GAAF，一种通用自动解剖查找器，用于识别 3D CT 扫描中的通用解剖位置。 GAAF 是一个端到端管道，具有用于数据预处理、模型训练和推理的专用模块。 GAAF 的核心是使用自定义的本地化卷积神经网络 (CNN)。 CNN 模型体积小、重量轻，并且可以进行调整以适应特定的应用。迄今为止，GAAF 框架已在头部和颈部进行了测试，能够找到脑干质心等解剖位置。 GAAF 在开放访问数据集中进行了评估，并且能够提供准确且强大的本地化性能。我们所有的代码都是开源的，可在 https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/GAAF 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的自动解剖定位框架GAAF，用于在CT扫描中实现三维解剖位置的精准识别。
AI.motivation: 现有解剖定位方法通常局限于特定器官或区域，缺乏通用性和灵活性，亟需一种可适应多种应用场景的轻量化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建端到端流水线，包含数据预处理、模型训练和推理模块，核心采用定制化轻量级卷积神经网络（CNN）进行三维坐标预测。
AI.result: 在头颈部位测试中成功定位脑干质心等关键结构，在公开数据集上展现高精度和鲁棒性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GAAF验证了通用解剖定位框架的可行性，其模块化设计和轻量化特性为医学影像分析提供了可扩展的技术方案。

authors_text: Dafeng Zhang,Xiaobing Wang
title: DMTNet: Dynamic Multi-scale Network for Dual-pixel Images Defocus Deblurring with Transformer
title_zh: DMTNet：使用 Transformer 进行双像素图像散焦去模糊的动态多尺度网络
comment: ef:2022 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME), 2022, pp. 1-6
comments: ef:2022 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME), 2022, pp. 1-6
abstract: Recent works achieve excellent results in defocus deblurring task based on dual-pixel data using convolutional neural network (CNN), while the scarcity of data limits the exploration and attempt of vision transformer in this task. In addition, the existing works use fixed parameters and network architecture to deblur images with different distribution and content information, which also affects the generalization ability of the model. In this paper, we propose a dynamic multi-scale network, named DMTNet, for dual-pixel images defocus deblurring. DMTNet mainly contains two modules: feature extraction module and reconstruction module. The feature extraction module is composed of several vision transformer blocks, which uses its powerful feature extraction capability to obtain richer features and improve the robustness of the model. The reconstruction module is composed of several Dynamic Multi-scale Sub-reconstruction Module (DMSSRM). DMSSRM can restore images by adaptively assigning weights to features from different scales according to the blur distribution and content information of the input images. DMTNet combines the advantages of transformer and CNN, in which the vision transformer improves the performance ceiling of CNN, and the inductive bias of CNN enables transformer to extract more robust features without relying on a large amount of data. DMTNet might be the first attempt to use vision transformer to restore the blurring images to clarity. By combining with CNN, the vision transformer may achieve better performance on small datasets. Experimental results on the popular benchmarks demonstrate that our DMTNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Recent works achieve excellent results in defocus deblurring task based on dual-pixel data using convolutional neural network (CNN), while the scarcity of data limits the exploration and attempt of vision transformer in this task. In addition, the existing works use fixed parameters and network architecture to deblur images with different distribution and content information, which also affects the generalization ability of the model. In this paper, we propose a dynamic multi-scale network, named DMTNet, for dual-pixel images defocus deblurring. DMTNet mainly contains two modules: feature extraction module and reconstruction module. The feature extraction module is composed of several vision transformer blocks, which uses its powerful feature extraction capability to obtain richer features and improve the robustness of the model. The reconstruction module is composed of several Dynamic Multi-scale Sub-reconstruction Module (DMSSRM). DMSSRM can restore images by adaptively assigning weights to features from different scales according to the blur distribution and content information of the input images. DMTNet combines the advantages of transformer and CNN, in which the vision transformer improves the performance ceiling of CNN, and the inductive bias of CNN enables transformer to extract more robust features without relying on a large amount of data. DMTNet might be the first attempt to use vision transformer to restore the blurring images to clarity. By combining with CNN, the vision transformer may achieve better performance on small datasets. Experimental results on the popular benchmarks demonstrate that our DMTNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作利用卷积神经网络（CNN）在基于双像素数据的离焦去模糊任务中取得了优异的结果，而数据的稀缺限制了视觉变压器在该任务中的探索和尝试。此外，现有作品使用固定参数和网络架构对具有不同分布和内容信息的图像进行去模糊，这也影响了模型的泛化能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态多尺度网络，称为 DMTNet，用于双像素图像散焦去模糊。 DMTNet主要包含两个模块：特征提取模块和重建模块。特征提取模块由多个视觉Transformer块组成，利用其强大的特征提取能力获得更丰富的特征，提高模型的鲁棒性。重建模块由多个动态多尺度子重建模块（DMSSRM）组成。 DMSSRM可以根据输入图像的模糊分布和内容信息，通过自适应地为不同尺度的特征分配权重来恢复图像。 DMTNet结合了Transformer和CNN的优点，其中视觉Transformer提高了CNN的性能天花板，而CNN的归纳偏置使得Transformer能够在不依赖大量数据的情况下提取更鲁棒的特征。 DMTNet 可能是使用视觉转换器将模糊图像恢复清晰的首次尝试。通过与 CNN 结合，视觉转换器可以在小数据集上获得更好的性能。流行基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的 DMTNet 显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMTNet，一种结合视觉Transformer和CNN的动态多尺度网络，用于双像素图像的失焦去模糊任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的方法在双像素数据去模糊任务中因数据稀缺和固定参数限制了模型泛化能力，而视觉Transformer在小数据场景下的应用尚未充分探索。
AI.method: DMTNet包含特征提取模块（基于视觉Transformer块）和重建模块（动态多尺度子重建模块DMSSRM），通过自适应分配多尺度特征权重实现图像恢复，结合Transformer的特征提取优势与CNN的归纳偏置。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，DMTNet显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在小数据集上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DMTNet是首个尝试使用视觉Transformer进行双像素图像去模糊的工作，通过与CNN结合提升了小数据场景下的性能上限。

authors_text: William Kuszmaul
title: A Hash Table Without Hash Functions, and How to Get the Most Out of Your Random Bits
title_zh: 没有哈希函数的哈希表，以及如何充分利用随机位
abstract: This paper considers the basic question of how strong of a probabilistic guarantee can a hash table, storing $n$ $(1 + Θ(1)) \log n$-bit key/value pairs, offer? Past work on this question has been bottlenecked by limitations of the known families of hash functions: The only hash tables to achieve failure probabilities less than $1 / 2^{\polylog n}$ require access to fully-random hash functions -- if the same hash tables are implemented using the known explicit families of hash functions, their failure probabilities become $1 / \poly(n)$. To get around these obstacles, we show how to construct a randomized data structure that has the same guarantees as a hash table, but that \emph{avoids the direct use of hash functions}. Building on this, we are able to construct a hash table using $O(n)$ random bits that achieves failure probability $1 / n^{n^{1 - ε}}$ for an arbitrary positive constant $ε$. In fact, we show that this guarantee can even be achieved by a \emph{succinct dictionary}, that is, by a dictionary that uses space within a $1 + o(1)$ factor of the information-theoretic optimum. Finally we also construct a succinct hash table whose probabilistic guarantees fall on a different extreme, offering a failure probability of $1 / \poly(n)$ while using only $\tilde{O}(\log n)$ random bits. This latter result matches (up to low-order terms) a guarantee previously achieved by Dietzfelbinger et al., but with increased space efficiency and with several surprising technical components.
summary: This paper considers the basic question of how strong of a probabilistic guarantee can a hash table, storing $n$ $(1 + Θ(1)) \log n$-bit key/value pairs, offer? Past work on this question has been bottlenecked by limitations of the known families of hash functions: The only hash tables to achieve failure probabilities less than $1 / 2^{\polylog n}$ require access to fully-random hash functions -- if the same hash tables are implemented using the known explicit families of hash functions, their failure probabilities become $1 / \poly(n)$. To get around these obstacles, we show how to construct a randomized data structure that has the same guarantees as a hash table, but that \emph{avoids the direct use of hash functions}. Building on this, we are able to construct a hash table using $O(n)$ random bits that achieves failure probability $1 / n^{n^{1 - ε}}$ for an arbitrary positive constant $ε$. In fact, we show that this guarantee can even be achieved by a \emph{succinct dictionary}, that is, by a dictionary that uses space within a $1 + o(1)$ factor of the information-theoretic optimum. Finally we also construct a succinct hash table whose probabilistic guarantees fall on a different extreme, offering a failure probability of $1 / \poly(n)$ while using only $\tilde{O}(\log n)$ random bits. This latter result matches (up to low-order terms) a guarantee previously achieved by Dietzfelbinger et al., but with increased space efficiency and with several surprising technical components.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑的基本问题是，存储 $n$ $(1 + θ(1)) \log n$ 位键/值对的哈希表可以提供多强的概率保证？过去关于这个问题的工作一直受到已知哈希函数族的限制的瓶颈：实现小于 $1 / 2^{\polylog n}$ 失败概率的唯一哈希表需要访问完全随机的哈希函数 - 如果使用已知的显式哈希函数族实现相同的哈希表，则它们的失败概率变为 $1 / \poly(n)$。为了克服这些障碍，我们展示了如何构建一个与哈希表具有相同保证的随机数据结构，但 \emph{避免直接使用哈希函数}。在此基础上，我们能够使用 $O(n)$ 随机位构建一个哈希表，对于任意正常数 $ε$ 实现失败概率 $1 / n^{n^{1 - ε}}$。事实上，我们证明这种保证甚至可以通过 \emph{succinctdictionary} 来实现，即通过使用信息论最优的 $1 + o(1)$ 因子内的空间的字典。最后，我们还构建了一个简洁的哈希表，其概率保证落在不同的极端，提供 $1 / \poly(n)$ 的失败概率，同时仅使用 $\tilde{O}(\log n)$ 随机位。后一个结果与 Dietzfelbinger 等人先前实现的保证相匹配（直到低阶项），但空间效率有所提高，并具有几个令人惊讶的技术组件。

AI.motivation: 传统哈希表依赖哈希函数，但其失败概率难以突破多项式界限，且显式哈希函数家族的性能不足。
AI.method: 构建无需直接使用哈希函数的随机数据结构，结合随机位优化与信息论最优空间利用的简洁字典技术。
AI.result: 实现失败概率为$1/n^{n^{1-ε}}$的哈希表（使用$O(n)$随机位）及失败概率$1/\\poly(n)$的简洁哈希表（仅需$\tilde{O}(\\log n)$随机位）。
AI.conclusion: 突破传统哈希函数限制，以更优空间效率和概率保证实现哈希表设计，匹配并超越现有研究成果。

search_text: A Hash Table Without Hash Functions, and How to Get the Most Out of Your Random Bits 没有哈希函数的哈希表，以及如何充分利用随机位 This paper considers the basic question of how strong of a probabilistic guarantee can a hash table, storing $n$ $(1 + Θ(1)) \log n$-bit key/value pairs, offer? Past work on this question has been bottlenecked by limitations of the known families of hash functions: The only hash tables to achieve failure probabilities less than $1 / 2^{\polylog n}$ require access to fully-random hash functions -- if the same hash tables are implemented using the known explicit families of hash functions, their failure probabilities become $1 / \poly(n)$. To get around these obstacles, we show how to construct a randomized data structure that has the same guarantees as a hash table, but that \emph{avoids the direct use of hash functions}. Building on this, we are able to construct a hash table using $O(n)$ random bits that achieves failure probability $1 / n^{n^{1 - ε}}$ for an arbitrary positive constant $ε$. In fact, we show that this guarantee can even be achieved by a \emph{succinct dictionary}, that is, by a dictionary that uses space within a $1 + o(1)$ factor of the information-theoretic optimum. Finally we also construct a succinct hash table whose probabilistic guarantees fall on a different extreme, offering a failure probability of $1 / \poly(n)$ while using only $\tilde{O}(\log n)$ random bits. This latter result matches (up to low-order terms) a guarantee previously achieved by Dietzfelbinger et al., but with increased space efficiency and with several surprising technical components. 本文考虑的基本问题是，存储 $n$ $(1 + θ(1)) \log n$ 位键/值对的哈希表可以提供多强的概率保证？过去关于这个问题的工作一直受到已知哈希函数族的限制的瓶颈：实现小于 $1 / 2^{\polylog n}$ 失败概率的唯一哈希表需要访问完全随机的哈希函数 - 如果使用已知的显式哈希函数族实现相同的哈希表，则它们的失败概率变为 $1 / \poly(n)$。为了克服这些障碍，我们展示了如何构建一个与哈希表具有相同保证的随机数据结构，但 \emph{避免直接使用哈希函数}。在此基础上，我们能够使用 $O(n)$ 随机位构建一个哈希表，对于任意正常数 $ε$ 实现失败概率 $1 / n^{n^{1 - ε}}$。事实上，我们证明这种保证甚至可以通过 \emph{succinctdictionary} 来实现，即通过使用信息论最优的 $1 + o(1)$ 因子内的空间的字典。最后，我们还构建了一个简洁的哈希表，其概率保证落在不同的极端，提供 $1 / \poly(n)$ 的失败概率，同时仅使用 $\tilde{O}(\log n)$ 随机位。后一个结果与 Dietzfelbinger 等人先前实现的保证相匹配（直到低阶项），但空间效率有所提高，并具有几个令人惊讶的技术组件。 本文提出了一种无需传统哈希函数的哈希表设计，通过优化随机位的使用来提升概率保证。 William Kuszmaul cs.DS

authors_text: Thiago Rocha Silva,Marco Winckler
title: Assessing User Interface Design Artifacts: A Tool-Supported Behavior-Based Approach
title_zh: 评估用户界面设计工件：工具支持的基于行为的方法
abstract: Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD) has emerged in the last years as a powerful methodology to specify testable and executable user requirements through stories and scenarios. With the support of external testing frameworks, BDD stories can be used to automatically assess the behavior of a fully functional software system. This article describes a toolset which extends BDD with the aim of providing automated assessment also for user interface design artifacts to ensure their consistency with the user requirements since the beginning of a software project. The approach has been evaluated by exploiting previously specified user requirements for a web system to book business trips. Such requirements gave rise to a set of BDD stories that have been refined and used to automatically assess the consistency of task models, graphical user interface (GUI) prototypes, and final GUIs of the system. The results have shown that our approach was able to identify different types of inconsistencies in the set of analyzed artifacts and consistently keep the semantic traces between them.
summary: Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD) has emerged in the last years as a powerful methodology to specify testable and executable user requirements through stories and scenarios. With the support of external testing frameworks, BDD stories can be used to automatically assess the behavior of a fully functional software system. This article describes a toolset which extends BDD with the aim of providing automated assessment also for user interface design artifacts to ensure their consistency with the user requirements since the beginning of a software project. The approach has been evaluated by exploiting previously specified user requirements for a web system to book business trips. Such requirements gave rise to a set of BDD stories that have been refined and used to automatically assess the consistency of task models, graphical user interface (GUI) prototypes, and final GUIs of the system. The results have shown that our approach was able to identify different types of inconsistencies in the set of analyzed artifacts and consistently keep the semantic traces between them.
abstract_zh: 行为驱动开发 (BDD) 在过去几年中出现，成为一种通过故事和场景指定可测试和可执行的用户需求的强大方法。在外部测试框架的支持下，BDD 故事可用于自动评估功能齐全的软件系统的行为。本文描述了一个扩展 BDD 的工具集，旨在为用户界面设计工件提供自动化评估，以确保自软件项目开始以来它们与用户需求的一致性。该方法已通过利用先前指定的网络系统预订商务旅行的用户需求进行了评估。这些需求催生了一组 BDD 故事，这些故事经过完善并用于自动评估系统的任务模型、图形用户界面 (GUI) 原型和最终 GUI 的一致性。结果表明，我们的方法能够识别分析工件集中不同类型的不一致，并一致地保留它们之间的语义痕迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于行为驱动开发（BDD）的工具集，用于自动化评估用户界面设计工件的一致性，确保其与用户需求保持一致。
AI.motivation: 传统BDD主要用于功能测试，但缺乏对用户界面设计工件（如任务模型、GUI原型）的自动化评估，导致设计与需求不一致的问题。
AI.method: 扩展BDD框架，构建工具集，通过用户需求生成BDD故事，并用于自动评估任务模型、GUI原型及最终GUI的一致性，同时维护语义追踪。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效识别设计工件中的多种不一致问题，并保持从需求到最终实现的语义连贯性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在软件早期阶段即可发现UI设计与需求的不一致，提升系统开发的一致性和质量。

authors_text: Vy Nguyen,Masayuki Tanaka,Yusuke Monno,Masatoshi Okutomi
title: Two-Step Color-Polarization Demosaicking Network
title_zh: 两步颜色偏振去马赛克网络
comment: Accepted in ICIP2022. Project page: http://www.ok.sc.e.titech.ac.jp/res/PolarDem/TCPDNet.html
comments: Accepted in ICIP2022. Project page: http://www.ok.sc.e.titech.ac.jp/res/PolarDem/TCPDNet.html
abstract: Polarization information of light in a scene is valuable for various image processing and computer vision tasks. A division-of-focal-plane polarimeter is a promising approach to capture the polarization images of different orientations in one shot, while it requires color-polarization demosaicking. In this paper, we propose a two-step color-polarization demosaicking network~(TCPDNet), which consists of two sub-tasks of color demosaicking and polarization demosaicking. We also introduce a reconstruction loss in the YCbCr color space to improve the performance of TCPDNet. Experimental comparisons demonstrate that TCPDNet outperforms existing methods in terms of the image quality of polarization images and the accuracy of Stokes parameters.
summary: Polarization information of light in a scene is valuable for various image processing and computer vision tasks. A division-of-focal-plane polarimeter is a promising approach to capture the polarization images of different orientations in one shot, while it requires color-polarization demosaicking. In this paper, we propose a two-step color-polarization demosaicking network~(TCPDNet), which consists of two sub-tasks of color demosaicking and polarization demosaicking. We also introduce a reconstruction loss in the YCbCr color space to improve the performance of TCPDNet. Experimental comparisons demonstrate that TCPDNet outperforms existing methods in terms of the image quality of polarization images and the accuracy of Stokes parameters.
abstract_zh: 场景中光的偏振信息对于各种图像处理和计算机视觉任务很有价值。焦平面分割偏振计是一种很有前景的一次性捕获不同方向偏振图像的方法，但它需要进行彩色偏振去马赛克。在本文中，我们提出了一种两步彩色偏振去马赛克网络~（TCPDNet），它由彩色去马赛克和偏振去马赛克两个子任务组成。我们还在 YCbCr 颜色空间中引入了重建损失，以提高 TCPDNet 的性能。实验比较表明，TCPDNet 在偏振图像的图像质量和 Stokes 参数的准确性方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两步颜色-偏振去马赛克网络（TCPDNet），以提高偏振图像质量和斯托克斯参数准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在颜色和偏振信息恢复上存在挑战，需提升图像质量和参数准确性。
AI.method: 采用两步子网络分别处理颜色和偏振信息，并引入YCbCr颜色空间的重建损失函数。
AI.result: TCPDNet在偏振图像质量及斯托克斯参数计算精度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TCPDNet通过分步处理和色彩空间优化，有效提升了颜色-偏振信息恢复性能。

conclusion: TCPDNet通过分步处理和色彩空间优化，有效提升了颜色-偏振信息恢复性能。
search_text: Two-Step Color-Polarization Demosaicking Network 两步颜色偏振去马赛克网络 Polarization information of light in a scene is valuable for various image processing and computer vision tasks. A division-of-focal-plane polarimeter is a promising approach to capture the polarization images of different orientations in one shot, while it requires color-polarization demosaicking. In this paper, we propose a two-step color-polarization demosaicking network~(TCPDNet), which consists of two sub-tasks of color demosaicking and polarization demosaicking. We also introduce a reconstruction loss in the YCbCr color space to improve the performance of TCPDNet. Experimental comparisons demonstrate that TCPDNet outperforms existing methods in terms of the image quality of polarization images and the accuracy of Stokes parameters. 场景中光的偏振信息对于各种图像处理和计算机视觉任务很有价值。焦平面分割偏振计是一种很有前景的一次性捕获不同方向偏振图像的方法，但它需要进行彩色偏振去马赛克。在本文中，我们提出了一种两步彩色偏振去马赛克网络~（TCPDNet），它由彩色去马赛克和偏振去马赛克两个子任务组成。我们还在 YCbCr 颜色空间中引入了重建损失，以提高 TCPDNet 的性能。实验比较表明，TCPDNet 在偏振图像的图像质量和 Stokes 参数的准确性方面优于现有方法。 提出一种两步颜色-偏振去马赛克网络（TCPDNet），以提高偏振图像质量和斯托克斯参数准确性。 Vy Nguyen,Masayuki Tanaka,Yusuke Monno,Masatoshi Okutomi eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Kiyanoush Nazari,Willow Mandil,Amir Ghalamzan E
title: Proactive slip control by learned slip model and trajectory adaptation
title_zh: 通过学习滑移模型和轨迹自适应进行主动滑移控制
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures
abstract: This paper presents a novel control approach to dealing with object slip during robotic manipulative movements. Slip is a major cause of failure in many robotic grasping and manipulation tasks. Existing works increase grip force to avoid/control slip. However, this may not be feasible when (i) the robot cannot increase the gripping force -- the max gripping force is already applied or (ii) increased force damages the grasped object, such as soft fruit. Moreover, the robot fixes the gripping force when it forms a stable grasp on the surface of an object, and changing the gripping force during real-time manipulation may not be an effective control policy. We propose a novel control approach to slip avoidance including a learned action-conditioned slip predictor and a constrained optimiser avoiding a predicted slip given a desired robot action. We show the effectiveness of the proposed trajectory adaptation method with receding horizon controller with a series of real-robot test cases. Our experimental results show our proposed data-driven predictive controller can control slip for objects unseen in training.
summary: This paper presents a novel control approach to dealing with object slip during robotic manipulative movements. Slip is a major cause of failure in many robotic grasping and manipulation tasks. Existing works increase grip force to avoid/control slip. However, this may not be feasible when (i) the robot cannot increase the gripping force -- the max gripping force is already applied or (ii) increased force damages the grasped object, such as soft fruit. Moreover, the robot fixes the gripping force when it forms a stable grasp on the surface of an object, and changing the gripping force during real-time manipulation may not be an effective control policy. We propose a novel control approach to slip avoidance including a learned action-conditioned slip predictor and a constrained optimiser avoiding a predicted slip given a desired robot action. We show the effectiveness of the proposed trajectory adaptation method with receding horizon controller with a series of real-robot test cases. Our experimental results show our proposed data-driven predictive controller can control slip for objects unseen in training.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的控制方法来处理机器人操纵运动期间物体滑动的问题。滑动是许多机器人抓取和操作任务失败的主要原因。现有作品增加抓地力以避免/控制打滑。然而，当（i）机器人无法增加抓取力——已施加最大抓取力或（ii）增加的力损坏抓取的物体（例如软水果）时，这可能不可行。此外，机器人在物体表面形成稳定抓握时，抓握力是固定的，在实时操纵过程中改变抓握力可能不是有效的控制策略。我们提出了一种新颖的避免打滑的控制方法，包括学习的动作条件打滑预测器和约束优化器，在给定所需的机器人动作的情况下避免预测的打滑。我们通过一系列真实的机器人测试用例展示了所提出的带有后退地平线控制器的轨迹自适应方法的有效性。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的数据驱动预测控制器可以控制训练中看不见的物体的滑动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的滑动模型和轨迹适应的新型控制方法，用于解决机器人抓取和操作中的物体滑动问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过增加抓握力控制滑动，但存在最大抓握力已用尽或损坏物体（如软质水果）的局限性，且实时调整抓握力可能无效。
AI.method: 结合学习到的动作条件滑动预测模型与约束优化器，通过轨迹适应和滚动时域控制器实现滑动预测与规避。
AI.result: 在多组真实机器人实验中验证了方法有效性，表明数据驱动控制器可成功控制训练中未见的物体滑动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过预测滑动并主动调整轨迹，为复杂场景下的机器人操作提供了更安全、通用的滑动控制方案。

authors_text: Yiming Li,Mingyan Zhu,Xue Yang,Yong Jiang,Tao Wei,Shu-Tao Xia
title: Black-box Dataset Ownership Verification via Backdoor Watermarking
title_zh: 通过后门水印进行黑盒数据集所有权验证
comment: This paper is accepted by IEEE TIFS. 15 pages. The preliminary short version of this paper was posted on arXiv (arXiv:2010.05821) and presented in a non-archival NeurIPS Workshop (2020)
comments: This paper is accepted by IEEE TIFS. 15 pages. The preliminary short version of this paper was posted on arXiv (arXiv:2010.05821) and presented in a non-archival NeurIPS Workshop (2020)
abstract: Deep learning, especially deep neural networks (DNNs), has been widely and successfully adopted in many critical applications for its high effectiveness and efficiency. The rapid development of DNNs has benefited from the existence of some high-quality datasets ($e.g.$, ImageNet), which allow researchers and developers to easily verify the performance of their methods. Currently, almost all existing released datasets require that they can only be adopted for academic or educational purposes rather than commercial purposes without permission. However, there is still no good way to ensure that. In this paper, we formulate the protection of released datasets as verifying whether they are adopted for training a (suspicious) third-party model, where defenders can only query the model while having no information about its parameters and training details. Based on this formulation, we propose to embed external patterns via backdoor watermarking for the ownership verification to protect them. Our method contains two main parts, including dataset watermarking and dataset verification. Specifically, we exploit poison-only backdoor attacks ($e.g.$, BadNets) for dataset watermarking and design a hypothesis-test-guided method for dataset verification. We also provide some theoretical analyses of our methods. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets of different tasks are conducted, which verify the effectiveness of our method. The code for reproducing main experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/DVBW}.
summary: Deep learning, especially deep neural networks (DNNs), has been widely and successfully adopted in many critical applications for its high effectiveness and efficiency. The rapid development of DNNs has benefited from the existence of some high-quality datasets ($e.g.$, ImageNet), which allow researchers and developers to easily verify the performance of their methods. Currently, almost all existing released datasets require that they can only be adopted for academic or educational purposes rather than commercial purposes without permission. However, there is still no good way to ensure that. In this paper, we formulate the protection of released datasets as verifying whether they are adopted for training a (suspicious) third-party model, where defenders can only query the model while having no information about its parameters and training details. Based on this formulation, we propose to embed external patterns via backdoor watermarking for the ownership verification to protect them. Our method contains two main parts, including dataset watermarking and dataset verification. Specifically, we exploit poison-only backdoor attacks ($e.g.$, BadNets) for dataset watermarking and design a hypothesis-test-guided method for dataset verification. We also provide some theoretical analyses of our methods. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets of different tasks are conducted, which verify the effectiveness of our method. The code for reproducing main experiments is available at \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/DVBW}.
abstract_zh: 深度学习，尤其是深度神经网络（DNN），因其高效性和高效性而在许多关键应用中得到了广泛而成功的采用。 DNN 的快速发展得益于一些高质量数据集（例如 ImageNet）的存在，这些数据集使研究人员和开发人员能够轻松验证其方法的性能。目前，几乎所有现有发布的数据集都要求未经许可只能用于学术或教育目的，不得用于商业目的。但目前还没有什么好的办法来保证这一点。在本文中，我们将对已发布数据集的保护制定为验证它们是否用于训练（可疑的）第三方模型，其中防御者只能查询模型，而无法了解其参数和训练细节。基于这个公式，我们建议通过后门水印嵌入外部模式进行所有权验证以保护它们。我们的方法包含两个主要部分，包括数据集水印和数据集验证。具体来说，我们利用纯毒后门攻击（例如，BadNets）进行数据集水印，并设计一种假设检验引导的方法来进行数据集验证。我们还提供了我们的方法的一些理论分析。在不同任务的多个基准数据集上进行了实验，验证了我们方法的有效性。重现主要实验的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/THUYimingLi/DVBW} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过后门水印实现黑盒数据集所有权验证的方法，以防止数据集被未经授权的商业用途使用。
AI.motivation: 高质量数据集（如ImageNet）被广泛用于学术研究，但缺乏有效手段确保其不被用于商业目的，需验证第三方模型是否使用了目标数据集进行训练。
AI.method: 采用仅污染后门攻击（如BadNets）对数据集进行水印嵌入，并设计基于假设检验的验证方法，结合理论分析实现所有权验证。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为数据集所有权保护提供了可行方案，能够在无模型参数信息的情况下实现有效验证。

authors_text: Ioannis Polymenis,Maryam Haroutunian,Rose Norman,David Trodden
title: Virtual Underwater Datasets for Autonomous Inspections
title_zh: 用于自主检查的虚拟水下数据集
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures
comments: 20 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Underwater Vehicles have become more sophisticated, driven by the off-shore sector and the scientific community's rapid advancements in underwater operations. Notably, many underwater tasks, including the assessment of subsea infrastructure, are performed with the assistance of Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs). There have been recent breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and, notably, Deep Learning (DL) models and applications, which have widespread usage in a variety of fields, including aerial unmanned vehicles, autonomous car navigation, and other applications. However, they are not as prevalent in underwater applications due to the difficulty of obtaining underwater datasets for a specific application. In this sense, the current study utilises recent advancements in the area of DL to construct a bespoke dataset generated from photographs of items captured in a laboratory environment. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) were utilised to translate the laboratory object dataset into the underwater domain by combining the collected images with photographs containing the underwater environment. The findings demonstrated the feasibility of creating such a dataset, since the resulting images closely resembled the real underwater environment when compared with real-world underwater ship hull images. Therefore, the artificial datasets of the underwater environment can overcome the difficulties arising from the limited access to real-world underwater images and are used to enhance underwater operations through underwater object image classification and detection.
summary: Underwater Vehicles have become more sophisticated, driven by the off-shore sector and the scientific community's rapid advancements in underwater operations. However, they are not as prevalent in underwater applications due to the difficulty of obtaining underwater datasets for a specific application. In this sense, the current study utilises recent advancements in the area of DL to construct a bespoke dataset generated from photographs of items captured in a laboratory environment. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) were utilised to translate the laboratory object dataset into the underwater domain by combining the collected images with photographs containing the underwater environment. The findings demonstrated the feasibility of creating such a dataset, since the resulting images closely resembled the real underwater environment when compared with real-world underwater ship hull images. Therefore, the artificial datasets of the underwater environment can overcome the difficulties arising from the limited access to real-world underwater images and are used to enhance underwater operations through underwater object image classification and detection.
abstract_zh: 在近海领域和科学界在水下作业方面快速进步的推动下，水下航行器变得更加复杂。值得注意的是，许多水下任务，包括海底基础设施的评估，都是在自主水下航行器（AUV）的帮助下执行的。近年来，人工智能（AI）尤其是深度学习（DL）模型和应用取得了突破性进展，在空中无人机、自动汽车导航等领域得到广泛应用。然而，由于难以获取特定应用的水下数据集，它们在水下应用中并不普遍。从这个意义上说，当前的研究利用深度学习领域的最新进展来构建根据实验室环境中捕获的物品照片生成的定制数据集。利用生成对抗网络（GAN），通过将收集到的图像与包含水下环境的照片相结合，将实验室对象数据集转换到水下领域。研究结果证明了创建此类数据集的可行性，因为与真实世界的水下船体图像相比，生成的图像非常类似于真实的水下环境。因此，水下环境的人工数据集可以克服因获取真实水下图像有限而产生的困难，并通过水下目标图像分类和检测来增强水下操作。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用生成对抗网络（GANs）构建实验室环境下生成的水下场景数据集，以支持自主水下航行器（AUV）的检测与分类任务。
AI.motivation: 水下应用场景中真实数据获取困难，限制了深度学习模型的训练与优化，亟需合成数据集以推动水下自主检测技术发展。
AI.method: 通过将实验室拍摄的物体图像与水下环境照片结合，利用GANs生成逼真的水下场景图像，构建定制化数据集。
AI.result: 生成的图像与真实水下船体图像高度相似，验证了合成数据集的有效性，可用于提升水下目标检测与分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 人工生成的水下数据集可缓解真实数据稀缺问题，为水下自主操作系统的算法训练提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Virtual Underwater Datasets for Autonomous Inspections 用于自主检查的虚拟水下数据集 Underwater Vehicles have become more sophisticated, driven by the off-shore sector and the scientific community's rapid advancements in underwater operations. Notably, many underwater tasks, including the assessment of subsea infrastructure, are performed with the assistance of Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs). There have been recent breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and, notably, Deep Learning (DL) models and applications, which have widespread usage in a variety of fields, including aerial unmanned vehicles, autonomous car navigation, and other applications. However, they are not as prevalent in underwater applications due to the difficulty of obtaining underwater datasets for a specific application. In this sense, the current study utilises recent advancements in the area of DL to construct a bespoke dataset generated from photographs of items captured in a laboratory environment. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) were utilised to translate the laboratory object dataset into the underwater domain by combining the collected images with photographs containing the underwater environment. The findings demonstrated the feasibility of creating such a dataset, since the resulting images closely resembled the real underwater environment when compared with real-world underwater ship hull images. Therefore, the artificial datasets of the underwater environment can overcome the difficulties arising from the limited access to real-world underwater images and are used to enhance underwater operations through underwater object image classification and detection. 在近海领域和科学界在水下作业方面快速进步的推动下，水下航行器变得更加复杂。值得注意的是，许多水下任务，包括海底基础设施的评估，都是在自主水下航行器（AUV）的帮助下执行的。近年来，人工智能（AI）尤其是深度学习（DL）模型和应用取得了突破性进展，在空中无人机、自动汽车导航等领域得到广泛应用。然而，由于难以获取特定应用的水下数据集，它们在水下应用中并不普遍。从这个意义上说，当前的研究利用深度学习领域的最新进展来构建根据实验室环境中捕获的物品照片生成的定制数据集。利用生成对抗网络（GAN），通过将收集到的图像与包含水下环境的照片相结合，将实验室对象数据集转换到水下领域。研究结果证明了创建此类数据集的可行性，因为与真实世界的水下船体图像相比，生成的图像非常类似于真实的水下环境。因此，水下环境的人工数据集可以克服因获取真实水下图像有限而产生的困难，并通过水下目标图像分类和检测来增强水下操作。 本研究利用生成对抗网络（GANs）构建实验室环境下生成的水下场景数据集，以支持自主水下航行器（AUV）的检测与分类任务。 Ioannis Polymenis,Maryam Haroutunian,Rose Norman,David Trodden cs.CV

authors_text: Yueru Luo,Xu Yan,Chaoda Zheng,Chao Zheng,Shuqi Mei,Tang Kun,Shuguang Cui,Zhen Li
title: M$^2$-3DLaneNet: Exploring Multi-Modal 3D Lane Detection
title_zh: M$^2$-3DLaneNet：探索多模态 3D 车道检测
comment: update
comments: update
abstract: Estimating accurate lane lines in 3D space remains challenging due to their sparse and slim nature. Previous works mainly focused on using images for 3D lane detection, leading to inherent projection error and loss of geometry information. To address these issues, we explore the potential of leveraging LiDAR for 3D lane detection, either as a standalone method or in combination with existing monocular approaches. In this paper, we propose M$^2$-3DLaneNet to integrate complementary information from multiple sensors. Specifically, M$^2$-3DLaneNet lifts 2D features into 3D space by incorporating geometry information from LiDAR data through depth completion. Subsequently, the lifted 2D features are further enhanced with LiDAR features through cross-modality BEV fusion. Extensive experiments on the large-scale OpenLane dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of M$^2$-3DLaneNet, regardless of the range (75m or 100m).
summary: Estimating accurate lane lines in 3D space remains challenging due to their sparse and slim nature. Previous works mainly focused on using images for 3D lane detection, leading to inherent projection error and loss of geometry information. To address these issues, we explore the potential of leveraging LiDAR for 3D lane detection, either as a standalone method or in combination with existing monocular approaches. In this paper, we propose M$^2$-3DLaneNet to integrate complementary information from multiple sensors. Specifically, M$^2$-3DLaneNet lifts 2D features into 3D space by incorporating geometry information from LiDAR data through depth completion. Subsequently, the lifted 2D features are further enhanced with LiDAR features through cross-modality BEV fusion. Extensive experiments on the large-scale OpenLane dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of M$^2$-3DLaneNet, regardless of the range (75m or 100m).
abstract_zh: 由于 3D 空间中车道线稀疏且细长，估计准确的车道线仍然具有挑战性。之前的工作主要集中在使用图像进行 3D 车道检测，导致固有的投影误差和几何信息的丢失。为了解决这些问题，我们探索利用 LiDAR 进行 3D 车道检测的潜力，无论是作为独立方法还是与现有的单目方法相结合。在本文中，我们提出 M$^2$-3DLaneNet 来集成来自多个传感器的互补信息。具体来说，M$^2$-3DLaneNet 通过深度补全合并来自 LiDAR 数据的几何信息，将 2D 特征提升到 3D 空间。随后，通过跨模态 BEV 融合，使用 LiDAR 特征进一步增强提升的 2D 特征。在大规模 OpenLane 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了 M$^2$-3DLaneNet 的有效性，无论范围如何（75m 或 100m）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态3D车道检测方法M²-3DLaneNet，通过融合图像与LiDAR数据提升车道线检测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统单目视觉方法存在投影误差和几何信息丢失问题，而LiDAR能提供更精确的三维几何信息，需探索多模态数据融合优势。
AI.method: 通过深度补全将2D图像特征提升至3D空间，并利用跨模态BEV（鸟瞰图）融合技术整合LiDAR特征，实现多传感器信息互补。
AI.result: 在OpenLane数据集上，M²-3DLaneNet在75m和100m检测范围内均表现出色，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态传感器融合能显著提升3D车道检测性能，尤其在长距离场景中具有明显优势。

authors_text: Maksym Yatsura,Kaspar Sakmann,N. Grace Hua,Matthias Hein,Jan Hendrik Metzen
title: Certified Defences Against Adversarial Patch Attacks on Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 针对语义分割的对抗性补丁攻击的认证防御
comment: accepted at ICLR 2023
comments: accepted at ICLR 2023
abstract: Adversarial patch attacks are an emerging security threat for real world deep learning applications. We present Demasked Smoothing, the first approach (up to our knowledge) to certify the robustness of semantic segmentation models against this threat model. Previous work on certifiably defending against patch attacks has mostly focused on image classification task and often required changes in the model architecture and additional training which is undesirable and computationally expensive. In Demasked Smoothing, any segmentation model can be applied without particular training, fine-tuning, or restriction of the architecture. Using different masking strategies, Demasked Smoothing can be applied both for certified detection and certified recovery. In extensive experiments we show that Demasked Smoothing can on average certify 64% of the pixel predictions for a 1% patch in the detection task and 48% against a 0.5% patch for the recovery task on the ADE20K dataset.
summary: Adversarial patch attacks are an emerging security threat for real world deep learning applications. We present Demasked Smoothing, the first approach (up to our knowledge) to certify the robustness of semantic segmentation models against this threat model. Previous work on certifiably defending against patch attacks has mostly focused on image classification task and often required changes in the model architecture and additional training which is undesirable and computationally expensive. In Demasked Smoothing, any segmentation model can be applied without particular training, fine-tuning, or restriction of the architecture. Using different masking strategies, Demasked Smoothing can be applied both for certified detection and certified recovery. In extensive experiments we show that Demasked Smoothing can on average certify 64% of the pixel predictions for a 1% patch in the detection task and 48% against a 0.5% patch for the recovery task on the ADE20K dataset.
abstract_zh: 对抗性补丁攻击是现实世界深度学习应用程序的一种新兴安全威胁。我们提出了 Demasked Smoothing，这是第一个（据我们所知）证明语义分割模型针对这种威胁模型的鲁棒性的方法。先前关于可证明防御补丁攻击的工作主要集中在图像分类任务上，并且通常需要更改模型架构和额外的训练，这是不受欢迎的且计算成本昂贵。在去掩模平滑中，可以应用任何分割模型，无需特定的训练、微调或架构限制。使用不同的掩蔽策略，去掩蔽平滑可应用于认证检测和认证恢复。在大量实验中，我们表明，在 ADE20K 数据集上，去掩模平滑平均可以验证检测任务中 1% 补丁的 64% 的像素预测，以及恢复任务中 0.5% 补丁的 48% 的像素预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需修改模型结构或额外训练的认证防御方法Demasked Smoothing，用于抵御语义分割中的对抗性补丁攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗补丁攻击防御方法多针对图像分类任务，需修改模型结构或增加训练成本，难以直接应用于语义分割场景。
AI.method: 通过不同的掩码策略实现认证检测与恢复，无需特定训练、微调或架构限制，直接应用于任意分割模型。
AI.result: 在ADE20K数据集上，检测任务认证64%像素预测（1%补丁），恢复任务认证48%（0.5%补丁）。
AI.conclusion: Demasked Smoothing为语义分割提供了通用且高效的认证防御方案，兼顾实用性与计算效率。

method: 通过不同的掩码策略实现认证检测与恢复，无需特定训练、微调或架构限制，直接应用于任意分割模型。
result: 在ADE20K数据集上，检测任务认证64%像素预测（1%补丁），恢复任务认证48%（0.5%补丁）。
conclusion: Demasked Smoothing为语义分割提供了通用且高效的认证防御方案，兼顾实用性与计算效率。
search_text: Certified Defences Against Adversarial Patch Attacks on Semantic Segmentation 针对语义分割的对抗性补丁攻击的认证防御 Adversarial patch attacks are an emerging security threat for real world deep learning applications. We present Demasked Smoothing, the first approach (up to our knowledge) to certify the robustness of semantic segmentation models against this threat model. Previous work on certifiably defending against patch attacks has mostly focused on image classification task and often required changes in the model architecture and additional training which is undesirable and computationally expensive. In Demasked Smoothing, any segmentation model can be applied without particular training, fine-tuning, or restriction of the architecture. Using different masking strategies, Demasked Smoothing can be applied both for certified detection and certified recovery. In extensive experiments we show that Demasked Smoothing can on average certify 64% of the pixel predictions for a 1% patch in the detection task and 48% against a 0.5% patch for the recovery task on the ADE20K dataset. 对抗性补丁攻击是现实世界深度学习应用程序的一种新兴安全威胁。我们提出了 Demasked Smoothing，这是第一个（据我们所知）证明语义分割模型针对这种威胁模型的鲁棒性的方法。先前关于可证明防御补丁攻击的工作主要集中在图像分类任务上，并且通常需要更改模型架构和额外的训练，这是不受欢迎的且计算成本昂贵。在去掩模平滑中，可以应用任何分割模型，无需特定的训练、微调或架构限制。使用不同的掩蔽策略，去掩蔽平滑可应用于认证检测和认证恢复。在大量实验中，我们表明，在 ADE20K 数据集上，去掩模平滑平均可以验证检测任务中 1% 补丁的 64% 的像素预测，以及恢复任务中 0.5% 补丁的 48% 的像素预测。 本文提出了一种无需修改模型结构或额外训练的认证防御方法Demasked Smoothing，用于抵御语义分割中的对抗性补丁攻击。 Maksym Yatsura,Kaspar Sakmann,N. Grace Hua,Matthias Hein,Jan Hendrik Metzen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Chia-Yen Chiang,Mona Jaber,Peter Hayward
title: A Distributed Acoustic Sensor System for Intelligent Transportation using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习的智能交通分布式声学传感器系统
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures
comments: 9 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Intelligent transport systems (ITS) are pivotal in the development of sustainable and green urban living. ITS is data-driven and enabled by the profusion of sensors ranging from pneumatic tubes to smart cameras. This work explores a novel data source based on optical fibre-based distributed acoustic sensors (DAS) for traffic analysis. Detecting the type of vehicle and estimating the occupancy of vehicles are prime concerns in ITS. The first is motivated by the need for tracking, controlling, and forecasting traffic flow. The second targets the regulation of high occupancy vehicle lanes in an attempt to reduce emissions and congestion. These tasks are often conducted by individuals inspecting vehicles or through the use of emerging computer vision technologies. The former is not scale-able nor efficient whereas the latter is intrusive to passengers' privacy. To this end, we propose a deep learning technique to analyse DAS signals to address this challenge through continuous sensing and without exposing personal information. We propose a deep learning method for processing DAS signals and achieve 92% vehicle classification accuracy and 92-97% in occupancy detection based on DAS data collected under controlled conditions.
summary: Intelligent transport systems (ITS) are pivotal in the development of sustainable and green urban living. ITS is data-driven and enabled by the profusion of sensors ranging from pneumatic tubes to smart cameras. This work explores a novel data source based on optical fibre-based distributed acoustic sensors (DAS) for traffic analysis. Detecting the type of vehicle and estimating the occupancy of vehicles are prime concerns in ITS. The first is motivated by the need for tracking, controlling, and forecasting traffic flow. The second targets the regulation of high occupancy vehicle lanes in an attempt to reduce emissions and congestion. These tasks are often conducted by individuals inspecting vehicles or through the use of emerging computer vision technologies. The former is not scale-able nor efficient whereas the latter is intrusive to passengers' privacy. To this end, we propose a deep learning technique to analyse DAS signals to address this challenge through continuous sensing and without exposing personal information. We propose a deep learning method for processing DAS signals and achieve 92% vehicle classification accuracy and 92-97% in occupancy detection based on DAS data collected under controlled conditions.
abstract_zh: 智能交通系统（ITS）对于可持续和绿色城市生活的发展至关重要。 ITS 是数据驱动的，并通过从气动管到智能相机等大量传感器来实现。这项工作探索了一种基于光纤的分布式声学传感器（DAS）的新型数据源，用于交通分析。检测车辆类型和估计车辆占用率是 ITS 的首要关注点。第一个是出于跟踪、控制和预测交通流的需要。第二个目标是监管高占用率车道，以减少排放和拥堵。这些任务通常由检查车辆的人员或通过使用新兴的计算机视觉技术来执行。前者不可扩展且效率不高，而后者会侵犯乘客的隐私。为此，我们提出了一种深度学习技术来分析 DAS 信号，通过持续感知且不暴露个人信息来应对这一挑战。我们提出了一种处理 DAS 信号的深度学习方法，基于在受控条件下收集的 DAS 数据，实现了 92% 的车辆分类准确率和 92-97% 的占用检测准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布式声学传感器（DAS）和深度学习的智能交通系统，用于车辆分类和载客量检测。
AI.motivation: 传统交通监测方法（人工检查或计算机视觉）存在可扩展性差、隐私侵犯等问题，需开发无需暴露个人信息且高效的监测技术。
AI.method: 通过深度学习算法处理DAS采集的声学信号，实现对车辆类型和载客量的连续感知与分析。
AI.result: 在受控条件下，车辆分类准确率达92%，载客量检测准确率为92-97%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法利用DAS和深度学习有效解决了智能交通系统中车辆监测的隐私与效率难题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Dongsuk Oh,Yejin Kim,Hodong Lee,H. Howie Huang,Heuiseok Lim
title: Don't Judge a Language Model by Its Last Layer: Contrastive Learning with Layer-Wise Attention Pooling
title_zh: 不要通过最后一层来判断语言模型：使用逐层注意力池的对比学习
comment: Accepted to COLING 2022
comments: Accepted to COLING 2022
abstract: Recent pre-trained language models (PLMs) achieved great success on many natural language processing tasks through learning linguistic features and contextualized sentence representation. Since attributes captured in stacked layers of PLMs are not clearly identified, straightforward approaches such as embedding the last layer are commonly preferred to derive sentence representations from PLMs. This paper introduces the attention-based pooling strategy, which enables the model to preserve layer-wise signals captured in each layer and learn digested linguistic features for downstream tasks. The contrastive learning objective can adapt the layer-wise attention pooling to both unsupervised and supervised manners. It results in regularizing the anisotropic space of pre-trained embeddings and being more uniform. We evaluate our model on standard semantic textual similarity (STS) and semantic search tasks. As a result, our method improved the performance of the base contrastive learned BERT_base and variants.
summary: Recent pre-trained language models (PLMs) achieved great success on many natural language processing tasks through learning linguistic features and contextualized sentence representation. Since attributes captured in stacked layers of PLMs are not clearly identified, straightforward approaches such as embedding the last layer are commonly preferred to derive sentence representations from PLMs. This paper introduces the attention-based pooling strategy, which enables the model to preserve layer-wise signals captured in each layer and learn digested linguistic features for downstream tasks. The contrastive learning objective can adapt the layer-wise attention pooling to both unsupervised and supervised manners. It results in regularizing the anisotropic space of pre-trained embeddings and being more uniform. We evaluate our model on standard semantic textual similarity (STS) and semantic search tasks. As a result, our method improved the performance of the base contrastive learned BERT_base and variants.
abstract_zh: 最近的预训练语言模型（PLM）通过学习语言特征和语境化句子表示，在许多自然语言处理任务上取得了巨大成功。由于无法清楚地识别 PLM 堆叠层中捕获的属性，因此通常首选嵌入最后一层等简单方法来从 PLM 导出句子表示。本文介绍了基于注意力的池化策略，该策略使模型能够保留每层捕获的分层信号，并为下游任务学习消化的语言特征。对比学习目标可以使分层注意力池适应无监督和监督方式。它可以规范预训练嵌入的各向异性空间并且更加均匀。我们在标准语义文本相似性（STS）和语义搜索任务上评估我们的模型。因此，我们的方法提高了对比学习的 BERT_base 和变体的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层注意力池化的对比学习方法，通过利用预训练语言模型各层的特征来提升句子表示效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常仅使用语言模型最后一层的输出，忽略了各层可能包含的差异化语义信息，导致表示能力受限。
AI.method: 设计分层注意力池化机制，结合对比学习目标，使模型能自适应地整合各层特征并正则化嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在语义相似度和语义搜索任务中，该方法显著优于基线BERT模型及变体。
AI.conclusion: 分层注意力池化能有效挖掘语言模型多层表征潜力，为下游任务提供更统一且高质量的句子表示。

authors_text: Dae-Young Song,Geonsoo Lee,HeeKyung Lee,Gi-Mun Um,Donghyeon Cho
title: Weakly-Supervised Stitching Network for Real-World Panoramic Image Generation
title_zh: 用于生成真实世界全景图像的弱监督拼接网络
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022 (poster)
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022 (poster)
abstract: Recently, there has been growing attention on an end-to-end deep learning-based stitching model. However, the most challenging point in deep learning-based stitching is to obtain pairs of input images with a narrow field of view and ground truth images with a wide field of view captured from real-world scenes. To overcome this difficulty, we develop a weakly-supervised learning mechanism to train the stitching model without requiring genuine ground truth images. In addition, we propose a stitching model that takes multiple real-world fisheye images as inputs and creates a 360 output image in an equirectangular projection format. In particular, our model consists of color consistency corrections, warping, and blending, and is trained by perceptual and SSIM losses. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithm is verified on two real-world stitching datasets.
summary: Recently, there has been growing attention on an end-to-end deep learning-based stitching model. However, the most challenging point in deep learning-based stitching is to obtain pairs of input images with a narrow field of view and ground truth images with a wide field of view captured from real-world scenes. To overcome this difficulty, we develop a weakly-supervised learning mechanism to train the stitching model without requiring genuine ground truth images. In addition, we propose a stitching model that takes multiple real-world fisheye images as inputs and creates a 360 output image in an equirectangular projection format. In particular, our model consists of color consistency corrections, warping, and blending, and is trained by perceptual and SSIM losses. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithm is verified on two real-world stitching datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于端到端深度学习的拼接模型越来越受到关注。然而，基于深度学习的拼接中最具挑战性的点是获得具有窄视场的输入图像和从现实世界场景中捕获的具有宽视场的地面实况图像对。为了克服这个困难，我们开发了一种弱监督学习机制来训练拼接模型，而不需要真实的地面实况图像。此外，我们提出了一种拼接模型，该模型将多个真实世界的鱼眼图像作为输入，并以等距柱状投影格式创建 360 度输出图像。特别是，我们的模型由颜色一致性校正、扭曲和混合组成，并通过感知和 SSIM 损失进行训练。该算法的有效性在两个真实世界的拼接数据集上得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督缝合网络，用于生成真实世界全景图像。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习缝合模型依赖难以获取的真实场景窄视场输入与宽视场地面真实图像对。
AI.method: 设计弱监督学习机制，输入多张鱼眼图像，通过颜色校正、变形、混合模块结合感知损失与SSIM损失训练模型。
AI.result: 算法在两个真实世界缝合数据集上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法成功解决了真实场景全景图像生成中地面真实数据不足的挑战。

search_text: Weakly-Supervised Stitching Network for Real-World Panoramic Image Generation 用于生成真实世界全景图像的弱监督拼接网络 Recently, there has been growing attention on an end-to-end deep learning-based stitching model. However, the most challenging point in deep learning-based stitching is to obtain pairs of input images with a narrow field of view and ground truth images with a wide field of view captured from real-world scenes. To overcome this difficulty, we develop a weakly-supervised learning mechanism to train the stitching model without requiring genuine ground truth images. In addition, we propose a stitching model that takes multiple real-world fisheye images as inputs and creates a 360 output image in an equirectangular projection format. In particular, our model consists of color consistency corrections, warping, and blending, and is trained by perceptual and SSIM losses. The effectiveness of the proposed algorithm is verified on two real-world stitching datasets. 最近，基于端到端深度学习的拼接模型越来越受到关注。然而，基于深度学习的拼接中最具挑战性的点是获得具有窄视场的输入图像和从现实世界场景中捕获的具有宽视场的地面实况图像对。为了克服这个困难，我们开发了一种弱监督学习机制来训练拼接模型，而不需要真实的地面实况图像。此外，我们提出了一种拼接模型，该模型将多个真实世界的鱼眼图像作为输入，并以等距柱状投影格式创建 360 度输出图像。特别是，我们的模型由颜色一致性校正、扭曲和混合组成，并通过感知和 SSIM 损失进行训练。该算法的有效性在两个真实世界的拼接数据集上得到验证。 本文提出一种弱监督缝合网络，用于生成真实世界全景图像。 Dae-Young Song,Geonsoo Lee,HeeKyung Lee,Gi-Mun Um,Donghyeon Cho cs.CV

authors_text: Kyle Retan,Frasher Loshaj,Michael Heizmann
title: Radar Odometry on SE(3) with Constant Acceleration Motion Prior and Polar Measurement Model
title_zh: SE(3) 上的雷达里程计，具有恒定加速度运动先验和极坐标测量模型
abstract: This paper presents an approach to radar odometry on $SE(3)$ which utilizes a constant acceleration motion prior. The motion prior is integrated into a sliding window optimization scheme. We use the Magnus expansion to accurately integrate the motion prior while maintaining real-time performance. In addition, we adopt a polar measurement model to better represent radar detection uncertainties. Our estimator is evaluated using a large real-world dataset from a prototype high-resolution radar sensor. The new motion prior and measurement model signifcantly improve odometry performance relative to the constant velocity motion prior and Cartesian measurement model from our previous work, particularly in roll, pitch and height.
summary: This paper presents an approach to radar odometry on $SE(3)$ which utilizes a constant acceleration motion prior. The motion prior is integrated into a sliding window optimization scheme. We use the Magnus expansion to accurately integrate the motion prior while maintaining real-time performance. In addition, we adopt a polar measurement model to better represent radar detection uncertainties. Our estimator is evaluated using a large real-world dataset from a prototype high-resolution radar sensor. The new motion prior and measurement model signifcantly improve odometry performance relative to the constant velocity motion prior and Cartesian measurement model from our previous work, particularly in roll, pitch and height.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在 $SE(3)$ 上利用恒定加速度运动先验的雷达里程计方法。运动先验被集成到滑动窗口优化方案中。我们使用马格努斯展开来准确地积分先验运动，同时保持实时性能。此外，我们采用极坐标测量模型来更好地表示雷达检测的不确定性。我们的估计器是使用来自原型高分辨率雷达传感器的大型现实数据集进行评估的。相对于我们之前工作中的等速运动先验和笛卡尔测量模型，新的运动先验和测量模型显着提高了里程计性能，特别是在滚动、俯仰和高度方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SE(3)的雷达里程计方法，结合恒定加速度运动先验和极坐标测量模型以提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达里程计在滚动、俯仰和高度方向存在误差，需改进运动模型和测量表示以提高性能。
AI.method: 采用滑动窗口优化框架，结合Magnus展开实现恒定加速度运动先验的精确积分，并使用极坐标测量模型表征雷达不确定性。
AI.result: 在真实高分辨率雷达数据集测试中，新方法在滚动、俯仰和高度方向较传统方法有显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 恒定加速度先验与极坐标模型的结合有效提升了雷达里程计精度，尤其在三维姿态估计方面表现突出。

authors_text: Iris Yan
title: Automatically Score Tissue Images Like a Pathologist by Transfer Learning
title_zh: 通过迁移学习像病理学家一样自动对组织图像进行评分
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures, The New England Journal of Statistics in Data Science, 2023
comments: 19 pages, 7 figures, The New England Journal of Statistics in Data Science, 2023
abstract: Cancer is the second leading cause of death in the world. Diagnosing cancer early on can save many lives. Pathologists have to look at tissue microarray (TMA) images manually to identify tumors, which can be time-consuming, inconsistent and subjective. Existing automatic algorithms either have not achieved the accuracy level of a pathologist or require substantial human involvements. A major challenge is that TMA images with different shapes, sizes, and locations can have the same score. Learning staining patterns in TMA images requires a huge number of images, which are severely limited due to privacy and regulation concerns in medical organizations. TMA images from different cancer types may share certain common characteristics, but combining them directly harms the accuracy due to heterogeneity in their staining patterns. Transfer learning is an emerging learning paradigm that allows borrowing strength from similar problems. However, existing approaches typically require a large sample from similar learning problems, while TMA images of different cancer types are often available in small sample size and further existing algorithms are limited to transfer learning from one similar problem. We propose a new transfer learning algorithm that could learn from multiple related problems, where each problem has a small sample and can have a substantially different distribution from the original one. The proposed algorithm has made it possible to break the critical accuracy barrier (the 75% accuracy level of pathologists), with a reported accuracy of 75.9% on breast cancer TMA images from the Stanford Tissue Microarray Database. It is supported by recent developments in transfer learning theory and empirical evidence in clustering technology. This will allow pathologists to confidently adopt automatic algorithms in recognizing tumors consistently with a higher accuracy in real time.
summary: Cancer is the second leading cause of death in the world. Diagnosing cancer early on can save many lives. Pathologists have to look at tissue microarray (TMA) images manually to identify tumors, which can be time-consuming, inconsistent and subjective. Existing automatic algorithms either have not achieved the accuracy level of a pathologist or require substantial human involvements. A major challenge is that TMA images with different shapes, sizes, and locations can have the same score. Learning staining patterns in TMA images requires a huge number of images, which are severely limited due to privacy and regulation concerns in medical organizations. TMA images from different cancer types may share certain common characteristics, but combining them directly harms the accuracy due to heterogeneity in their staining patterns. Transfer learning is an emerging learning paradigm that allows borrowing strength from similar problems. However, existing approaches typically require a large sample from similar learning problems, while TMA images of different cancer types are often available in small sample size and further existing algorithms are limited to transfer learning from one similar problem. We propose a new transfer learning algorithm that could learn from multiple related problems, where each problem has a small sample and can have a substantially different distribution from the original one. The proposed algorithm has made it possible to break the critical accuracy barrier (the 75% accuracy level of pathologists), with a reported accuracy of 75.9% on breast cancer TMA images from the Stanford Tissue Microarray Database. It is supported by recent developments in transfer learning theory and empirical evidence in clustering technology. This will allow pathologists to confidently adopt automatic algorithms in recognizing tumors consistently with a higher accuracy in real time.
abstract_zh: 癌症是世界上第二大死亡原因。及早诊断癌症可以挽救许多生命。病理学家必须手动查看组织微阵列 (TMA) 图像来识别肿瘤，这可能非常耗时、不一致且主观。现有的自动算法要么没有达到病理学家的准确性水平，要么需要大量的人类参与。一个主要挑战是不同形状、大小和位置的 TMA 图像可以具有相同的分数。学习 TMA 图像中的染色模式需要大量图像，但由于医疗组织的隐私和监管问题，这些图像受到严重限制。不同癌症类型的 TMA 图像可能具有某些共同特征，但由于其染色模式的异质性，将它们组合起来会直接损害准确性。迁移学习是一种新兴的学习范式，可以从类似问题中汲取力量。然而，现有方法通常需要来自类似学习问题的大样本，而不同癌症类型的 TMA 图像通常以小样本量提供，并且进一步的现有算法仅限于从一个类似问题进行迁移学习。我们提出了一种新的迁移学习算法，可以从多个相关问题中学习，其中每个问题都有一个小样本，并且可以具有与原始问题有很大不同的分布。所提出的算法可以打破关键的准确度障碍（病理学家的准确度为 75%），据报道，斯坦福组织微阵列数据库中乳腺癌 TMA 图像的准确度为 75.9%。它得到了迁移学习理论的最新发展和集群技术的经验证据的支持。这将使病理学家能够自信地采用自动算法来一致地、实时地、更高精度地识别肿瘤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的新算法，用于自动评分组织图像，以提高癌症诊断的准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前癌症诊断依赖病理学家手动分析组织微阵列（TMA）图像，存在耗时、主观性强且自动化算法准确率不足的问题。由于数据隐私和样本量限制，传统方法难以突破病理学家75%的准确率门槛。
AI.method: 设计一种可从多个相关癌症类型的小样本数据中迁移学习的算法，结合迁移学习理论与聚类技术，解决不同癌种间染色模式异质性问题。
AI.result: 在斯坦福TMA数据库的乳腺癌图像上达到75.9%的准确率，首次突破病理学家75%的准确率临界值。
AI.conclusion: 该算法使自动诊断系统能够以更高准确率实时辅助病理学家识别肿瘤，推动癌症诊断的标准化与智能化。

This will allow pathologists to confidently adopt automatic algorithms in recognizing tumors consistently with a higher accuracy in real time. 癌症是世界上第二大死亡原因。及早诊断癌症可以挽救许多生命。病理学家必须手动查看组织微阵列 (TMA) 图像来识别肿瘤，这可能非常耗时、不一致且主观。现有的自动算法要么没有达到病理学家的准确性水平，要么需要大量的人类参与。一个主要挑战是不同形状、大小和位置的 TMA 图像可以具有相同的分数。学习 TMA 图像中的染色模式需要大量图像，但由于医疗组织的隐私和监管问题，这些图像受到严重限制。不同癌症类型的 TMA 图像可能具有某些共同特征，但由于其染色模式的异质性，将它们组合起来会直接损害准确性。迁移学习是一种新兴的学习范式，可以从类似问题中汲取力量。然而，现有方法通常需要来自类似学习问题的大样本，而不同癌症类型的 TMA 图像通常以小样本量提供，并且进一步的现有算法仅限于从一个类似问题进行迁移学习。我们提出了一种新的迁移学习算法，可以从多个相关问题中学习，其中每个问题都有一个小样本，并且可以具有与原始问题有很大不同的分布。所提出的算法可以打破关键的准确度障碍（病理学家的准确度为 75%），据报道，斯坦福组织微阵列数据库中乳腺癌 TMA 图像的准确度为 75.9%。它得到了迁移学习理论的最新发展和集群技术的经验证据的支持。这将使病理学家能够自信地采用自动算法来一致地、实时地、更高精度地识别肿瘤。 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的新算法，用于自动评分组织图像，以提高癌症诊断的准确性。 Iris Yan cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhensu Sun,Xiaoning Du,Fu Song,Shangwen Wang,Mingze Ni,Li Li,David Lo
title: Don't Complete It! Preventing Unhelpful Code Completion for Productive and Sustainable Neural Code Completion Systems
title_zh: 不要完成它！防止无用的代码完成，以实现高效且可持续的神经代码完成系统
comment: Accepted by TOSEM
comments: Accepted by TOSEM
abstract: Currently, large pre-trained language models are widely applied in neural code completion systems. Though large code models significantly outperform their smaller counterparts, around 70\% of displayed code completions from Github Copilot are not accepted by developers. Being reviewed but not accepted, their help to developer productivity is considerably limited and may conversely aggravate the workload of developers, as the code completions are automatically and actively generated in state-of-the-art code completion systems as developers type out once the service is enabled. Even worse, considering the high cost of the large code models, it is a huge waste of computing resources and energy, which severely goes against the sustainable development principle of AI technologies. However, such waste has never been realized, not to mention effectively addressed, in the research community for neural code completion. Hence, preventing such unhelpful code completions from happening in a cost-friendly way is of urgent need. To fill this significant gap, we first investigate the prompts of unhelpful code completions, called "low-return prompts". We empirically identify four observable patterns in low-return prompts, each lacking necessary information, making it difficult to address through enhancements to the model's accuracy alone. This demonstrates the feasibility of identifying such low-return prompts based on the prompts themselves. Motivated by this finding, we propose an early-rejection mechanism to turn down low-return prompts by foretelling the code completion qualities. The prompts that are estimated to receive unhelpful code completions will not be sent to the model. Furthermore, we investigated five types of estimators to demonstrate the feasibility of the mechanism. The experimental results show that the estimator can reject 20% of code completion requests with a 97.4% Precision.

abstract_zh: 目前，大型预训练语言模型广泛应用于神经代码补全系统中。尽管大型代码模型的性能明显优于小型代码模型，但 Github Copilot 显示的代码完成中约有 70% 未被开发人员接受。经过审查但未被接受，它们对开发人员生产力的帮助相当有限，并且可能反过来加重开发人员的工作量，因为一旦启用服务，当开发人员键入时，代码完成是在最先进的代码完成系统中自动主动生成的。更糟糕的是，考虑到大型代码模型的成本高昂，这是对计算资源和能源的巨大浪费，这严重违背了人工智能技术的可持续发展原则。然而，在神经代码补全研究界，这种浪费从未被意识到，更不用说有效解决了。因此，迫切需要以一种成本友好的方式防止这种无用的代码完成发生。为了填补这一重大空白，我们首先研究无用的代码完成提示，称为“低回报提示”。我们凭经验确定了低回报提示中的四种可观察模式，每种模式都缺乏必要的信息，因此很难通过单独提高模型的准确性来解决。这证明了根据提示本身识别此类低回报提示的可行性。受这一发现的启发，我们提出了一种早期拒绝机制，通过预测代码完成质量来拒绝低回报提示。估计会收到无用代码完成的提示将不会发送到模型。此外，我们研究了五种类型的估计器来证明该机制的可行性。实验结果表明，估计器可以拒绝 20% 的代码完成请求，精度为 97.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种早期拒绝机制，通过识别低收益提示（low-return prompts）防止无用代码补全，提升神经代码补全系统的效率和可持续性。
AI.motivation: 当前大型代码模型生成的补全代码中约70%未被开发者采纳，导致计算资源浪费和开发者负担加重，但现有研究未有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过分析低收益提示的四个可观察模式，提出基于提示本身的早期拒绝机制，并设计五种评估器预测补全质量以过滤低价值请求。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法可精准拒绝20%的代码补全请求，精确率达97.4%。
AI.conclusion: 早期拒绝机制能有效减少无效计算，为构建高效可持续的神经代码补全系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Tiancheng Zhao,Peng Liu,Kyusong Lee
title: OmDet: Large-scale vision-language multi-dataset pre-training with multimodal detection network
title_zh: OmDet：使用多模态检测网络进行大规模视觉语言多数据集预训练
comment: Published at IET CV
comments: Published at IET CV
abstract: The advancement of object detection (OD) in open-vocabulary and open-world scenarios is a critical challenge in computer vision. This work introduces OmDet, a novel language-aware object detection architecture, and an innovative training mechanism that harnesses continual learning and multi-dataset vision-language pre-training. Leveraging natural language as a universal knowledge representation, OmDet accumulates a "visual vocabulary" from diverse datasets, unifying the task as a language-conditioned detection framework. Our multimodal detection network (MDN) overcomes the challenges of multi-dataset joint training and generalizes to numerous training datasets without manual label taxonomy merging. We demonstrate superior performance of OmDet over strong baselines in object detection in the wild, open-vocabulary detection, and phrase grounding, achieving state-of-the-art results. Ablation studies reveal the impact of scaling the pre-training visual vocabulary, indicating a promising direction for further expansion to larger datasets. The effectiveness of our deep fusion approach is underscored by its ability to learn jointly from multiple datasets, enhancing performance through knowledge sharing.
summary: The advancement of object detection (OD) in open-vocabulary and open-world scenarios is a critical challenge in computer vision. This work introduces OmDet, a novel language-aware object detection architecture, and an innovative training mechanism that harnesses continual learning and multi-dataset vision-language pre-training. Leveraging natural language as a universal knowledge representation, OmDet accumulates a "visual vocabulary" from diverse datasets, unifying the task as a language-conditioned detection framework. Our multimodal detection network (MDN) overcomes the challenges of multi-dataset joint training and generalizes to numerous training datasets without manual label taxonomy merging. We demonstrate superior performance of OmDet over strong baselines in object detection in the wild, open-vocabulary detection, and phrase grounding, achieving state-of-the-art results. Ablation studies reveal the impact of scaling the pre-training visual vocabulary, indicating a promising direction for further expansion to larger datasets. The effectiveness of our deep fusion approach is underscored by its ability to learn jointly from multiple datasets, enhancing performance through knowledge sharing.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇和开放世界场景中目标检测（OD）的进步是计算机视觉中的一个关键挑战。这项工作介绍了 OmDet，一种新颖的语言感知对象检测架构，以及一种利用持续学习和多数据集视觉语言预训练的创新训练机制。 OmDet 利用自然语言作为通用知识表示，从不同的数据集中积累了“视觉词汇”，将任务统一为语言条件检测框架。我们的多模态检测网络（MDN）克服了多数据集联合训练的挑战，并推广到大量训练数据集，而无需手动标签分类合并。我们展示了 OmDet 在野外物体检测、开放词汇检测和短语基础方面优于强基线的性能，实现了最先进的结果。消融研究揭示了扩展预训练视觉词汇的影响，表明了进一步扩展到更大数据集的有希望的方向。我们的深度融合方法的有效性体现在它能够从多个数据集联合学习，通过知识共享提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmDet，一种基于多数据集视觉-语言预训练和多模态检测网络的语言感知目标检测框架，旨在解决开放词汇和开放世界场景下的目标检测挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法在开放词汇和开放世界场景中面临多数据集联合训练困难、标签体系不统一等问题，需通过自然语言作为通用知识表示来提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计多模态检测网络（MDN）与持续学习机制，通过大规模视觉-语言预训练积累‘视觉词汇’，实现跨数据集知识共享的深度融合训练，无需人工合并标签体系。
AI.result: 在开放场景目标检测、开放词汇检测和短语定位任务中均优于现有方法，达到SOTA水平；扩大预训练视觉词汇规模可进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: OmDet通过语言感知架构和多数据集联合训练机制有效解决了开放场景检测难题，为扩展至更大规模数据集提供了可行方向。
