This work introduces OmDet, a novel language-aware object detection architecture, and an innovative training mechanism that harnesses continual learning and multi-dataset vision-language pre-training. Leveraging natural language as a universal knowledge representation, OmDet accumulates a "visual vocabulary" from diverse datasets, unifying the task as a language-conditioned detection framework. Our multimodal detection network (MDN) overcomes the challenges of multi-dataset joint training and generalizes to numerous training datasets without manual label taxonomy merging. We demonstrate superior performance of OmDet over strong baselines in object detection in the wild, open-vocabulary detection, and phrase grounding, achieving state-of-the-art results. Ablation studies reveal the impact of scaling the pre-training visual vocabulary, indicating a promising direction for further expansion to larger datasets. The effectiveness of our deep fusion approach is underscored by its ability to learn jointly from multiple datasets, enhancing performance through knowledge sharing. 开放词汇和开放世界场景中目标检测（OD）的进步是计算机视觉中的一个关键挑战。这项工作介绍了 OmDet，一种新颖的语言感知对象检测架构，以及一种利用持续学习和多数据集视觉语言预训练的创新训练机制。 OmDet 利用自然语言作为通用知识表示，从不同的数据集中积累了“视觉词汇”，将任务统一为语言条件检测框架。我们的多模态检测网络（MDN）克服了多数据集联合训练的挑战，并推广到大量训练数据集，而无需手动标签分类合并。我们展示了 OmDet 在野外物体检测、开放词汇检测和短语基础方面优于强基线的性能，实现了最先进的结果。消融研究揭示了扩展预训练视觉词汇的影响，表明了进一步扩展到更大数据集的有希望的方向。我们的深度融合方法的有效性体现在它能够从多个数据集联合学习，通过知识共享提高性能。 本文提出OmDet，一种基于多数据集视觉-语言预训练和多模态检测网络的语言感知目标检测框架，旨在解决开放词汇和开放世界场景下的目标检测挑战。 Tiancheng Zhao,Peng Liu,Kyusong Lee cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Xiaohang Zhao,Xiao Fang,Jing He,Lihua Huang
title: Exploiting Expert Knowledge for Assigning Firms to Industries: A Novel Deep Learning Method
title_zh: 利用专家知识将公司分配给行业：一种新颖的深度学习方法
comment: Accepted by MIS Quarterly
comments: Accepted by MIS Quarterly
abstract: Industry assignment, which assigns firms to industries according to a predefined Industry Classification System (ICS), is fundamental to a large number of critical business practices, ranging from operations and strategic decision making by firms to economic analyses by government agencies. Three types of expert knowledge are essential to effective industry assignment: definition-based knowledge (i.e., expert definitions of each industry), structure-based knowledge (i.e., structural relationships among industries as specified in an ICS), and assignment-based knowledge (i.e., prior firm-industry assignments performed by domain experts). Existing industry assignment methods utilize only assignment-based knowledge to learn a model that classifies unassigned firms to industries, and overlook definition-based and structure-based knowledge. Moreover, these methods only consider which industry a firm has been assigned to, but ignore the time-specificity of assignment-based knowledge, i.e., when the assignment occurs. To address the limitations of existing methods, we propose a novel deep learning-based method that not only seamlessly integrates the three types of knowledge for industry assignment but also takes the time-specificity of assignment-based knowledge into account. Methodologically, our method features two innovations: dynamic industry representation and hierarchical assignment. The former represents an industry as a sequence of time-specific vectors by integrating the three types of knowledge through our proposed temporal and spatial aggregation mechanisms. The latter takes industry and firm representations as inputs, computes the probability of assigning a firm to different industries, and assigns the firm to the industry with the highest probability.
summary: Industry assignment, which assigns firms to industries according to a predefined Industry Classification System (ICS), is fundamental to a large number of critical business practices, ranging from operations and strategic decision making by firms to economic analyses by government agencies. Three types of expert knowledge are essential to effective industry assignment: definition-based knowledge (i.e., expert definitions of each industry), structure-based knowledge (i.e., structural relationships among industries as specified in an ICS), and assignment-based knowledge (i.e., prior firm-industry assignments performed by domain experts). Existing industry assignment methods utilize only assignment-based knowledge to learn a model that classifies unassigned firms to industries, and overlook definition-based and structure-based knowledge. Moreover, these methods only consider which industry a firm has been assigned to, but ignore the time-specificity of assignment-based knowledge, i.e., when the assignment occurs. To address the limitations of existing methods, we propose a novel deep learning-based method that not only seamlessly integrates the three types of knowledge for industry assignment but also takes the time-specificity of assignment-based knowledge into account. Methodologically, our method features two innovations: dynamic industry representation and hierarchical assignment. The former represents an industry as a sequence of time-specific vectors by integrating the three types of knowledge through our proposed temporal and spatial aggregation mechanisms. The latter takes industry and firm representations as inputs, computes the probability of assigning a firm to different industries, and assigns the firm to the industry with the highest probability.
abstract_zh: 行业分配是根据预定义的行业分类系统 (ICS) 将公司分配到行业，是许多关键业务实践的基础，从公司的运营和战略决策到政府机构的经济分析。三种类型的专家知识对于有效的行业分配至关重要：基于定义的知识（即每个行业的专家定义）、基于结构的知识（即ICS中指定的行业之间的结构关系）和基于分配的知识（即由领域专家执行的先前公司行业分配）。现有的行业分配方法仅利用基于分配的知识来学习将未分配的公司分类为行业的模型，而忽略了基于定义和基于结构的知识。此外，这些方法只考虑企业被分配到哪个行业，而忽略了基于分配的知识的时间特异性，即分配发生的时间。为了解决现有方法的局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的方法，该方法不仅无缝集成了行业分配的三种类型的知识，而且还考虑了基于分配的知识的时间特异性。在方法论上，我们的方法有两个创新：动态行业代表性和层次分配。前者通过我们提出的时间和空间聚合机制整合三种类型的知识，将一个行业表示为一系列特定于时间的向量。后者以行业和企业表征为输入，计算将企业分配到不同行业的概率，并将企业分配到概率最高的行业。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的新方法，通过整合定义、结构及分配三类专家知识，并考虑时间特性，改进企业行业分配任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖历史分配数据，忽略行业定义与结构关系，且未考虑分配时间因素，导致行业分配准确性不足。
AI.method: 方法包含动态行业表示（通过时空聚合机制整合三类知识生成时间序列向量）与层次分配模型（计算企业归属各行业的概率并选择最高概率行业）。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在准确率与鲁棒性上优于传统方法，尤其在时间敏感性指标上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 融合多源专家知识与时间维度的信息能有效提升行业分配性能，为相关业务决策与经济分析提供更可靠支持。

authors_text: Yulun Wu,Layne C. Price,Zichen Wang,Vassilis N. Ioannidis,Robert A. Barton,George Karypis
title: Variational Causal Inference
title_zh: 变分因果推理
abstract: Estimating an individual's potential outcomes under counterfactual treatments is a challenging task for traditional causal inference and supervised learning approaches when the outcome is high-dimensional (e.g. gene expressions, impulse responses, human faces) and covariates are relatively limited. In this case, to construct one's outcome under a counterfactual treatment, it is crucial to leverage individual information contained in its observed factual outcome on top of the covariates. We propose a deep variational Bayesian framework that rigorously integrates two main sources of information for outcome construction under a counterfactual treatment: one source is the individual features embedded in the high-dimensional factual outcome; the other source is the response distribution of similar subjects (subjects with the same covariates) that factually received this treatment of interest.
summary: Estimating an individual's potential outcomes under counterfactual treatments is a challenging task for traditional causal inference and supervised learning approaches when the outcome is high-dimensional (e.g. gene expressions, impulse responses, human faces) and covariates are relatively limited. In this case, to construct one's outcome under a counterfactual treatment, it is crucial to leverage individual information contained in its observed factual outcome on top of the covariates. We propose a deep variational Bayesian framework that rigorously integrates two main sources of information for outcome construction under a counterfactual treatment: one source is the individual features embedded in the high-dimensional factual outcome; the other source is the response distribution of similar subjects (subjects with the same covariates) that factually received this treatment of interest.
abstract_zh: 当结果是高维的（例如基因表达、脉冲响应、人脸）并且协变量相对有限时，估计个体在反事实治疗下的潜在结果对于传统因果推理和监督学习方法来说是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这种情况下，要在反事实处理下构建一个人的结果，在协变量之上利用其观察到的事实结果中包含的个人信息至关重要。我们提出了一种深度变分贝叶斯框架，该框架严格整合了反事实处理下结果构建的两个主要信息来源：一个来源是嵌入在高维事实结果中的个体特征；另一个来源是嵌入在高维事实结果中的个体特征。另一个来源是实际上接受了这种感兴趣的治疗的类似受试者（具有相同协变量的受试者）的响应分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度变分贝叶斯框架，用于在高维结果和有限协变量条件下估计个体的反事实潜在结果。
AI.motivation: 传统因果推断和监督学习方法难以处理高维结果（如基因表达、人脸）与有限协变量的场景，需结合个体事实结果信息与相似受试者的治疗反应分布。
AI.method: 构建深度变分贝叶斯模型，融合高维事实结果中的个体特征与相同协变量下接受目标治疗的相似受试者的反应分布。
AI.result: 方法在高维数据场景下实现了更准确的反事实结果估计，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合个体特征与群体分布信息，为高维数据下的因果推断提供了新思路，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Zhuo Su,Max Welling,Matti Pietikäinen,Li Liu
title: SVNet: Where SO(3) Equivariance Meets Binarization on Point Cloud Representation
title_zh: SVNet：SO(3) 等方差满足点云表示二值化的地方
comment: Accepted in 3DV 2022. 11 pages including the appendix
comments: Accepted in 3DV 2022. 11 pages including the appendix
abstract: Efficiency and robustness are increasingly needed for applications on 3D point clouds, with the ubiquitous use of edge devices in scenarios like autonomous driving and robotics, which often demand real-time and reliable responses. The paper tackles the challenge by designing a general framework to construct 3D learning architectures with SO(3) equivariance and network binarization. However, a naive combination of equivariant networks and binarization either causes sub-optimal computational efficiency or geometric ambiguity. We propose to locate both scalar and vector features in our networks to avoid both cases. Precisely, the presence of scalar features makes the major part of the network binarizable, while vector features serve to retain rich structural information and ensure SO(3) equivariance. The proposed approach can be applied to general backbones like PointNet and DGCNN. Meanwhile, experiments on ModelNet40, ShapeNet, and the real-world dataset ScanObjectNN, demonstrated that the method achieves a great trade-off between efficiency, rotation robustness, and accuracy. The codes are available at https://github.com/zhuoinoulu/svnet.
summary: Efficiency and robustness are increasingly needed for applications on 3D point clouds, with the ubiquitous use of edge devices in scenarios like autonomous driving and robotics, which often demand real-time and reliable responses. The paper tackles the challenge by designing a general framework to construct 3D learning architectures with SO(3) equivariance and network binarization. However, a naive combination of equivariant networks and binarization either causes sub-optimal computational efficiency or geometric ambiguity. We propose to locate both scalar and vector features in our networks to avoid both cases. Precisely, the presence of scalar features makes the major part of the network binarizable, while vector features serve to retain rich structural information and ensure SO(3) equivariance. The proposed approach can be applied to general backbones like PointNet and DGCNN. Meanwhile, experiments on ModelNet40, ShapeNet, and the real-world dataset ScanObjectNN, demonstrated that the method achieves a great trade-off between efficiency, rotation robustness, and accuracy. The codes are available at https://github.com/zhuoinoulu/svnet.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶和机器人等场景中边缘设备的普遍使用，通常需要实时和可靠的响应，3D 点云上的应用程序越来越需要效率和鲁棒性。该论文通过设计一个通用框架来构建具有 SO(3) 等方差和网络二值化的 3D 学习架构来应对这一挑战。然而，等变网络和二值化的简单组合要么导致计算效率次优，要么导致几何模糊。我们建议在网络中同时定位标量和向量特征，以避免这两种情况。准确地说，标量特征的存在使得网络的主要部分可二值化，而向量特征则用于保留丰富的结构信息并确保 SO(3) 等方差。所提出的方法可以应用于 PointNet 和 DGCNN 等通用骨干网络。同时，在 ModelNet40、ShapeNet 和真实数据集 ScanObjectNN 上的实验表明，该方法在效率、旋转鲁棒性和准确性之间实现了很好的权衡。代码可在 https://github.com/zhuoinoulu/svnet 获取。

AI.tldr: 设计结合SO(3)等变性和网络二值化的框架，提升点云处理的效率与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备在自动驾驶和机器人场景中需要实时可靠处理点云数据，传统方法组合存在计算效率低或几何模糊问题。
AI.method: 分离标量与向量特征：标量特征实现网络二值化，向量特征保留结构信息并确保SO(3)等变性，适配PointNet等骨干网络。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40、ShapeNet和ScanObjectNN数据集上实现效率、旋转鲁棒性与准确性的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合等变性与二值化，为点云处理提供高效且几何鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: SVNet: Where SO(3) Equivariance Meets Binarization on Point Cloud Representation SVNet：SO(3) 等方差满足点云表示二值化的地方 Efficiency and robustness are increasingly needed for applications on 3D point clouds, with the ubiquitous use of edge devices in scenarios like autonomous driving and robotics, which often demand real-time and reliable responses. The paper tackles the challenge by designing a general framework to construct 3D learning architectures with SO(3) equivariance and network binarization. However, a naive combination of equivariant networks and binarization either causes sub-optimal computational efficiency or geometric ambiguity. We propose to locate both scalar and vector features in our networks to avoid both cases. Precisely, the presence of scalar features makes the major part of the network binarizable, while vector features serve to retain rich structural information and ensure SO(3) equivariance. The proposed approach can be applied to general backbones like PointNet and DGCNN. Meanwhile, experiments on ModelNet40, ShapeNet, and the real-world dataset ScanObjectNN, demonstrated that the method achieves a great trade-off between efficiency, rotation robustness, and accuracy. The codes are available at https://github.com/zhuoinoulu/svnet. 随着自动驾驶和机器人等场景中边缘设备的普遍使用，通常需要实时和可靠的响应，3D 点云上的应用程序越来越需要效率和鲁棒性。该论文通过设计一个通用框架来构建具有 SO(3) 等方差和网络二值化的 3D 学习架构来应对这一挑战。然而，等变网络和二值化的简单组合要么导致计算效率次优，要么导致几何模糊。我们建议在网络中同时定位标量和向量特征，以避免这两种情况。准确地说，标量特征的存在使得网络的主要部分可二值化，而向量特征则用于保留丰富的结构信息并确保 SO(3) 等方差。所提出的方法可以应用于 PointNet 和 DGCNN 等通用骨干网络。同时，在 ModelNet40、ShapeNet 和真实数据集 ScanObjectNN 上的实验表明，该方法在效率、旋转鲁棒性和准确性之间实现了很好的权衡。代码可在 https://github.com/zhuoinoulu/svnet 获取。 设计结合SO(3)等变性和网络二值化的框架，提升点云处理的效率与鲁棒性。 Zhuo Su,Max Welling,Matti Pietikäinen,Li Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Bulla Rajesh,Manav Kamlesh Agrawal,Milan Bhuva,Kisalaya Kishore,Mohammed Javed
title: Document Image Binarization in JPEG Compressed Domain using Dual Discriminator Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用双鉴别器生成对抗网络在 JPEG 压缩域中进行文档图像二值化
comment: Accepted in IAPR endorsed first International Conference on Computer Vision and Machine Intelligence (CVMI2022), held at IIIT Allahabad
comments: Accepted in IAPR endorsed first International Conference on Computer Vision and Machine Intelligence (CVMI2022), held at IIIT Allahabad
abstract: Image binarization techniques are being popularly used in enhancement of noisy and/or degraded images catering different Document Image Anlaysis (DIA) applications like word spotting, document retrieval, and OCR. Most of the existing techniques focus on feeding pixel images into the Convolution Neural Networks to accomplish document binarization, which may not produce effective results when working with compressed images that need to be processed without full decompression. Therefore in this research paper, the idea of document image binarization directly using JPEG compressed stream of document images is proposed by employing Dual Discriminator Generative Adversarial Networks (DD-GANs). Here the two discriminator networks - Global and Local work on different image ratios and use focal loss as generator loss. The proposed model has been thoroughly tested with different versions of DIBCO dataset having challenges like holes, erased or smudged ink, dust, and misplaced fibres. The model proved to be highly robust, efficient both in terms of time and space complexities, and also resulted in state-of-the-art performance in JPEG compressed domain.
summary: Image binarization techniques are being popularly used in enhancement of noisy and/or degraded images catering different Document Image Anlaysis (DIA) applications like word spotting, document retrieval, and OCR. Most of the existing techniques focus on feeding pixel images into the Convolution Neural Networks to accomplish document binarization, which may not produce effective results when working with compressed images that need to be processed without full decompression. Therefore in this research paper, the idea of document image binarization directly using JPEG compressed stream of document images is proposed by employing Dual Discriminator Generative Adversarial Networks (DD-GANs). Here the two discriminator networks - Global and Local work on different image ratios and use focal loss as generator loss. The proposed model has been thoroughly tested with different versions of DIBCO dataset having challenges like holes, erased or smudged ink, dust, and misplaced fibres. The model proved to be highly robust, efficient both in terms of time and space complexities, and also resulted in state-of-the-art performance in JPEG compressed domain.
abstract_zh: 图像二值化技术广泛用于增强噪声和/或降级图像，以满足不同的文档图像分析 (DIA) 应用，例如单词识别、文档检索和 OCR。大多数现有技术都集中于将像素图像输入卷积神经网络来完成文档二值化，这在处理需要在不完全解压缩的情况下处理的压缩图像时可能不会产生有效的结果。因此，在本研究论文中，提出了采用双判别器生成对抗网络（DD-GAN）直接使用文档图像的 JPEG 压缩流进行文档图像二值化的想法。这里，两个鉴别器网络 - 全局和局部在不同的图像比例上工作，并使用焦点损失作为生成器损失。所提出的模型已经使用不同版本的 DIBCO 数据集进行了彻底测试，这些数据集面临着孔洞、墨水被擦除或弄脏、灰尘和错位纤维等挑战。事实证明，该模型在时间和空间复杂性方面都具有高度鲁棒性和高效性，并且在 JPEG 压缩域中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在JPEG压缩域直接进行文档图像二值化的方法，无需完全解压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有方法处理压缩图像效果不佳，需高效处理压缩域数据以提升效率和性能。
AI.method: 采用双判别器生成对抗网络（DD-GANs），包含全局和局部判别器，结合焦点损失优化生成器。
AI.result: 在DIBCO数据集上表现出高鲁棒性与效率，达到压缩域内的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升JPEG压缩域图像二值化效果，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zhengguo Li,Chaobing Zheng,Haiyan Shu,Shiqian Wu
title: Dual-Scale Single Image Dehazing Via Neural Augmentation
title_zh: 通过神经增强进行双尺度单图像去雾
comment: Single image dehazing, dual-scale, neural augmentation, haze line averaging, generative adversarial network. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.10943
comments: Single image dehazing, dual-scale, neural augmentation, haze line averaging, generative adversarial network. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.10943
abstract: Model-based single image dehazing algorithms restore haze-free images with sharp edges and rich details for real-world hazy images at the expense of low PSNR and SSIM values for synthetic hazy images. Data-driven ones restore haze-free images with high PSNR and SSIM values for synthetic hazy images but with low contrast, and even some remaining haze for real world hazy images. In this paper, a novel single image dehazing algorithm is introduced by combining model-based and data-driven approaches. Both transmission map and atmospheric light are first estimated by the model-based methods, and then refined by dual-scale generative adversarial networks (GANs) based approaches. The resultant algorithm forms a neural augmentation which converges very fast while the corresponding data-driven approach might not converge. Haze-free images are restored by using the estimated transmission map and atmospheric light as well as the Koschmiederlaw. Experimental results indicate that the proposed algorithm can remove haze well from real-world and synthetic hazy images.
summary: Model-based single image dehazing algorithms restore haze-free images with sharp edges and rich details for real-world hazy images at the expense of low PSNR and SSIM values for synthetic hazy images. Data-driven ones restore haze-free images with high PSNR and SSIM values for synthetic hazy images but with low contrast, and even some remaining haze for real world hazy images. In this paper, a novel single image dehazing algorithm is introduced by combining model-based and data-driven approaches. Both transmission map and atmospheric light are first estimated by the model-based methods, and then refined by dual-scale generative adversarial networks (GANs) based approaches. The resultant algorithm forms a neural augmentation which converges very fast while the corresponding data-driven approach might not converge. Haze-free images are restored by using the estimated transmission map and atmospheric light as well as the Koschmiederlaw. Experimental results indicate that the proposed algorithm can remove haze well from real-world and synthetic hazy images.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的单图像去雾算法可以为现实世界的有雾图像恢复具有锐利边缘和丰富细节的无雾图像，但代价是合成有雾图像的 PSNR 和 SSIM 值较低。数据驱动的图像恢复无雾图像，合成有雾图像具有高 PSNR 和 SSIM 值，但对比度较低，甚至对现实世界的有雾图像有一些剩余的雾度。本文结合基于模型和数据驱动的方法，提出了一种新颖的单图像去雾算法。传输图和大气光首先通过基于模型的方法进行估计，然后通过基于双尺度生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法进行细化。由此产生的算法形成了一种神经增强，其收敛速度非常快，而相应的数据驱动方法可能不会收敛。使用估计的透射图和大气光以及 Koschmiederlaw 来恢复无雾图像。实验结果表明，该算法可以很好地去除现实世界和合成有雾图像中的雾霾。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模型驱动与数据驱动方法的单幅图像去雾算法，通过双尺度生成对抗网络（GAN）优化传输图和大气光，实现对真实世界和合成雾图像的有效去雾。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型的去雾算法在合成雾图像上PSNR和SSIM值较低，而数据驱动方法在真实雾图像中存在对比度低、残留雾的问题，需融合两者优势以提升整体性能。
AI.method: 首先利用模型驱动方法估计传输图和大气光，再通过双尺度GAN进行优化，结合Koschmieder定律恢复无雾图像，形成快速收敛的神经增强框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法能有效去除真实世界和合成雾图像中的雾，兼顾高PSNR/SSIM值与图像对比度，优于单一方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合模型驱动与数据驱动方法，并引入双尺度GAN优化，提出的神经增强算法在去雾任务中取得了更优的综合性能。

conclusion: 通过融合模型驱动与数据驱动方法，并引入双尺度GAN优化，提出的神经增强算法在去雾任务中取得了更优的综合性能。
search_text: Dual-Scale Single Image Dehazing Via Neural Augmentation 通过神经增强进行双尺度单图像去雾 Model-based single image dehazing algorithms restore haze-free images with sharp edges and rich details for real-world hazy images at the expense of low PSNR and SSIM values for synthetic hazy images. Data-driven ones restore haze-free images with high PSNR and SSIM values for synthetic hazy images but with low contrast, and even some remaining haze for real world hazy images. In this paper, a novel single image dehazing algorithm is introduced by combining model-based and data-driven approaches. Both transmission map and atmospheric light are first estimated by the model-based methods, and then refined by dual-scale generative adversarial networks (GANs) based approaches. The resultant algorithm forms a neural augmentation which converges very fast while the corresponding data-driven approach might not converge. Haze-free images are restored by using the estimated transmission map and atmospheric light as well as the Koschmiederlaw. Experimental results indicate that the proposed algorithm can remove haze well from real-world and synthetic hazy images. 基于模型的单图像去雾算法可以为现实世界的有雾图像恢复具有锐利边缘和丰富细节的无雾图像，但代价是合成有雾图像的 PSNR 和 SSIM 值较低。数据驱动的图像恢复无雾图像，合成有雾图像具有高 PSNR 和 SSIM 值，但对比度较低，甚至对现实世界的有雾图像有一些剩余的雾度。本文结合基于模型和数据驱动的方法，提出了一种新颖的单图像去雾算法。传输图和大气光首先通过基于模型的方法进行估计，然后通过基于双尺度生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法进行细化。由此产生的算法形成了一种神经增强，其收敛速度非常快，而相应的数据驱动方法可能不会收敛。使用估计的透射图和大气光以及 Koschmiederlaw 来恢复无雾图像。实验结果表明，该算法可以很好地去除现实世界和合成有雾图像中的雾霾。 本文提出一种结合模型驱动与数据驱动方法的单幅图像去雾算法，通过双尺度生成对抗网络（GAN）优化传输图和大气光，实现对真实世界和合成雾图像的有效去雾。 Zhengguo Li,Chaobing Zheng,Haiyan Shu,Shiqian Wu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Pranav Kant Gaur,Abhilash Bhardwaj,Pritam Shete,Mohini Laghate,Dinesh M Sarode
title: Computer vision based vehicle tracking as a complementary and scalable approach to RFID tagging
title_zh: 基于计算机视觉的车辆跟踪作为 RFID 标签的补充和可扩展方法
abstract: Logging of incoming/outgoing vehicles serves as a piece of critical information for root-cause analysis to combat security breach incidents in various sensitive organizations. RFID tagging hampers the scalability of vehicle tracking solutions on both logistics as well as technical fronts. For instance, requiring each incoming vehicle(departmental or private) to be RFID tagged is a severe constraint and coupling video analytics with RFID to detect abnormal vehicle movement is non-trivial. We leverage publicly available implementations of computer vision algorithms to develop an interpretable vehicle tracking algorithm using finite-state machine formalism. The state-machine consumes input from the cascaded object detection and optical character recognition(OCR) models for state transitions. We evaluated the proposed method on 75 video clips of 285 vehicles from our system deployment site. We observed that the detection rate is most affected by the speed and the type of vehicle. The highest detection rate is achieved when the vehicle movement is restricted to follow a movement restrictions(SOP) at the checkpoint similar to RFID tagging. We further analyzed 700 vehicle tracking predictions on live-data and identified that the majority of vehicle number prediction errors are due to illegible-text, image-blur, text occlusion and out-of-vocab letters in vehicle numbers. Towards system deployment and performance enhancement, we expect our ongoing system monitoring to provide evidences to establish a higher vehicle-throughput SOP at the security checkpoint as well as to drive the fine-tuning of the deployed computer-vision models and the state-machine to establish the proposed approach as a promising alternative to RFID-tagging.

RFID tagging hampers the scalability of vehicle tracking solutions on both logistics as well as technical fronts. For instance, requiring each incoming vehicle(departmental or private) to be RFID tagged is a severe constraint and coupling video analytics with RFID to detect abnormal vehicle movement is non-trivial. We leverage publicly available implementations of computer vision algorithms to develop an interpretable vehicle tracking algorithm using finite-state machine formalism. The state-machine consumes input from the cascaded object detection and optical character recognition(OCR) models for state transitions. We evaluated the proposed method on 75 video clips of 285 vehicles from our system deployment site. We observed that the detection rate is most affected by the speed and the type of vehicle. The highest detection rate is achieved when the vehicle movement is restricted to follow a movement restrictions(SOP) at the checkpoint similar to RFID tagging. We further analyzed 700 vehicle tracking predictions on live-data and identified that the majority of vehicle number prediction errors are due to illegible-text, image-blur, text occlusion and out-of-vocab letters in vehicle numbers. Towards system deployment and performance enhancement, we expect our ongoing system monitoring to provide evidences to establish a higher vehicle-throughput SOP at the security checkpoint as well as to drive the fine-tuning of the deployed computer-vision models and the state-machine to establish the proposed approach as a promising alternative to RFID-tagging.
abstract_zh: 进出车辆的记录可作为根本原因分析的关键信息，以应对各种敏感组织中的安全漏洞事件。 RFID 标签阻碍了车辆跟踪解决方案在物流和技术方面的可扩展性。例如，要求每辆进场车辆（部门或私人）都贴有 RFID 标签是一个严格的限制，而将视频分析与 RFID 相结合以检测异常车辆运动并非易事。我们利用计算机视觉算法的公开实现，使用有限状态机形式开发可解释的车辆跟踪算法。状态机消耗来自级联对象检测和光学字符识别 (OCR) 模型的输入以进行状态转换。我们在系统部署站点的 285 辆车的 75 个视频片段上评估了所提出的方法。我们观察到，检测率受速度和车辆类型的影响最大。当车辆运动被限制在检查站遵循类似于 RFID 标签的运动限制 (SOP) 时，可以实现最高的检测率。我们进一步分析了 700 个实时数据的车辆跟踪预测，发现大多数车号预测错误是由于车号中文本难以辨认、图像模糊、文本遮挡和词汇外字母造成的。在系统部署和性能增强方面，我们期望持续的系统监控能够提供证据，以在安全检查点建立更高的车辆吞吐量 SOP，并推动对已部署的计算机视觉模型和状态机进行微调，从而将所提出的方法作为 RFID 标签的有前途的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的车辆跟踪方法，作为RFID标签的补充和可扩展替代方案，用于安全组织的车辆进出记录。
AI.motivation: RFID标签在车辆跟踪中存在可扩展性限制，如需为每辆车贴标签且与视频分析整合困难，亟需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用公开的计算机视觉算法，结合有限状态机（FSM）框架，通过级联的目标检测和OCR模型实现车辆跟踪与车牌识别。
AI.result: 在285辆车的75个视频片段测试中，检测率受车速和类型影响，遵循标准操作流程（SOP）时效果最佳；700条实时数据预测显示，错误主要源于文本模糊、遮挡和非标准字符。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过系统监控和模型调优，有望成为RFID标签的可行替代方案，提升安检口的车辆通行效率和跟踪精度。

authors_text: Daniel Aleksander Krause,Annamaria Mesaros
title: Binaural Signal Representations for Joint Sound Event Detection and Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 用于联合声音事件检测和声学场景分类的双耳信号表示
abstract: Sound event detection (SED) and Acoustic scene classification (ASC) are two widely researched audio tasks that constitute an important part of research on acoustic scene analysis. Considering shared information between sound events and acoustic scenes, performing both tasks jointly is a natural part of a complex machine listening system. In this paper, we investigate the usefulness of several spatial audio features in training a joint deep neural network (DNN) model performing SED and ASC. Experiments are performed for two different datasets containing binaural recordings and synchronous sound event and acoustic scene labels to analyse the differences between performing SED and ASC separately or jointly. The presented results show that the use of specific binaural features, mainly the Generalized Cross Correlation with Phase Transform (GCC-phat) and sines and cosines of phase differences, result in a better performing model in both separate and joint tasks as compared with baseline methods based on logmel energies only.
summary: Sound event detection (SED) and Acoustic scene classification (ASC) are two widely researched audio tasks that constitute an important part of research on acoustic scene analysis. Considering shared information between sound events and acoustic scenes, performing both tasks jointly is a natural part of a complex machine listening system. In this paper, we investigate the usefulness of several spatial audio features in training a joint deep neural network (DNN) model performing SED and ASC. Experiments are performed for two different datasets containing binaural recordings and synchronous sound event and acoustic scene labels to analyse the differences between performing SED and ASC separately or jointly. The presented results show that the use of specific binaural features, mainly the Generalized Cross Correlation with Phase Transform (GCC-phat) and sines and cosines of phase differences, result in a better performing model in both separate and joint tasks as compared with baseline methods based on logmel energies only.
abstract_zh: 声音事件检测（SED）和声学场景分类（ASC）是两个广泛研究的音频任务，构成声学场景分析研究的重要组成部分。考虑到声音事件和声学场景之间的共享信息，联合执行这两项任务是复杂机器听音系统的自然组成部分。在本文中，我们研究了多个空间音频特征在训练执行 SED 和 ASC 的联合深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型中的有用性。对包含双耳录音、同步声音事件和声学场景标签的两个不同数据集进行实验，以分析单独或联合执行 SED 和 ASC 之间的差异。所提出的结果表明，与仅基于对数能量的基线方法相比，使用特定的双耳特征，主要是广义互相关与相位变换（GCC-phat）以及相位差的正弦和余弦，可以在单独和联合任务中产生更好的性能模型。

AI.tldr: 研究双耳信号表示在联合声事件检测与声学场景分类中的应用，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 由于声事件检测（SED）与声学场景分类（ASC）存在共享信息，联合处理能更高效利用数据，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用双耳信号特征（如GCC-phat及相位差三角函数）构建联合深度神经网络模型，并在双耳录音数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，双耳特征显著优于仅使用对数梅尔能量的基线方法，在单独及联合任务中均取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 特定双耳信号特征能有效增强联合SED与ASC模型的性能，优于传统方法。

Experiments are performed for two different datasets containing binaural recordings and synchronous sound event and acoustic scene labels to analyse the differences between performing SED and ASC separately or jointly. authors_text: Antonios Ntroumpogiannis,Michail Giannoulis,Nikolaos Myrtakis,Vassilis Christophides,Eric Simon,Ioannis Tsamardinos
title: A Meta-level Analysis of Online Anomaly Detectors
title_zh: 在线异常检测器的元级分析
abstract: Real-time detection of anomalies in streaming data is receiving increasing attention as it allows us to raise alerts, predict faults, and detect intrusions or threats across industries. Yet, little attention has been given to compare the effectiveness and efficiency of anomaly detectors for streaming data (i.e., of online algorithms). In this paper, we present a qualitative, synthetic overview of major online detectors from different algorithmic families (i.e., distance, density, tree or projection-based) and highlight their main ideas for constructing, updating and testing detection models. Then, we provide a thorough analysis of the results of a quantitative experimental evaluation of online detection algorithms along with their offline counterparts. The behavior of the detectors is correlated with the characteristics of different datasets (i.e., meta-features), thereby providing a meta-level analysis of their performance. Our study addresses several missing insights from the literature such as (a) how reliable are detectors against a random classifier and what dataset characteristics make them perform randomly; (b) to what extent online detectors approximate the performance of offline counterparts; (c) which sketch strategy and update primitives of detectors are best to detect anomalies visible only within a feature subspace of a dataset; (d) what are the tradeoffs between the effectiveness and the efficiency of detectors belonging to different algorithmic families; (e) which specific characteristics of datasets yield an online algorithm to outperform all others.
summary: Real-time detection of anomalies in streaming data is receiving increasing attention as it allows us to raise alerts, predict faults, and detect intrusions or threats across industries. Yet, little attention has been given to compare the effectiveness and efficiency of anomaly detectors for streaming data (i.e., of online algorithms). In this paper, we present a qualitative, synthetic overview of major online detectors from different algorithmic families (i.e., distance, density, tree or projection-based) and highlight their main ideas for constructing, updating and testing detection models. Then, we provide a thorough analysis of the results of a quantitative experimental evaluation of online detection algorithms along with their offline counterparts. The behavior of the detectors is correlated with the characteristics of different datasets (i.e., meta-features), thereby providing a meta-level analysis of their performance. Our study addresses several missing insights from the literature such as (a) how reliable are detectors against a random classifier and what dataset characteristics make them perform randomly; (b) to what extent online detectors approximate the performance of offline counterparts; (c) which sketch strategy and update primitives of detectors are best to detect anomalies visible only within a feature subspace of a dataset; (d) what are the tradeoffs between the effectiveness and the efficiency of detectors belonging to different algorithmic families; (e) which specific characteristics of datasets yield an online algorithm to outperform all others.
abstract_zh: 流数据异常的实时检测越来越受到关注，因为它使我们能够发出警报、预测故障并检测跨行业的入侵或威胁。然而，很少有人关注比较流数据（即在线算法）异常检测器的有效性和效率。在本文中，我们对不同算法系列（即距离、密度、树或基于投影）的主要在线检测器进行了定性、综合概述，并强调了它们构建、更新和测试检测模型的主要思想。然后，我们对在线检测算法及其离线对应算法的定量实验评估结果进行全面分析。检测器的行为与不同数据集的特征（即元特征）相关，从而提供其性能的元级分析。我们的研究解决了文献中缺失的一些见解，例如（a）检测器针对随机分类器的可靠性如何，以及哪些数据集特征使它们随机执行； (b) 在线检测器的性能在多大程度上接近离线检测器的性能； (c) 哪种草图策略和检测器更新原语最适合检测仅在数据集的特征子空间内可见的异常； (d) 属于不同算法系列的检测器的有效性和效率之间的权衡是什么； (e) 数据集的哪些具体特征产生了优于所有其他算法的在线算法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过元分析方法，比较了在线异常检测算法与离线算法在不同数据集上的性能差异，并探讨了其可靠性、效率及数据集特征的影响。
AI.motivation: 实时流数据异常检测需求增加，但现有研究缺乏对在线检测算法有效性、效率的系统性比较及元特征影响的分析。
AI.method: 对主流在线检测算法进行定性分类，结合定量实验对比其与离线算法的性能，通过元特征分析不同数据集对检测结果的影响。
AI.result: 发现在线算法在特定数据集特征下可能退化为随机分类，部分算法能逼近离线效果；不同算法家族在效率与有效性间存在权衡；特定子空间特征影响检测策略选择。
AI.conclusion: 研究填补了在线异常检测领域关于算法可靠性、元特征影响及效率权衡的空白，为实际应用提供了针对性选型依据。

authors_text: Alessandro Castelnovo,Riccardo Crupi,Nicole Inverardi,Daniele Regoli,Andrea Cosentini
title: Investigating Bias with a Synthetic Data Generator: Empirical Evidence and Philosophical Interpretation
title_zh: 使用合成数据生成器调查偏见：经验证据和哲学解释
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. short version
comments: 8 pages, 2 figures. short version
abstract: Machine learning applications are becoming increasingly pervasive in our society. Since these decision-making systems rely on data-driven learning, risk is that they will systematically spread the bias embedded in data. In this paper, we propose to analyze biases by introducing a framework for generating synthetic data with specific types of bias and their combinations. We delve into the nature of these biases discussing their relationship to moral and justice frameworks. Finally, we exploit our proposed synthetic data generator to perform experiments on different scenarios, with various bias combinations. We thus analyze the impact of biases on performance and fairness metrics both in non-mitigated and mitigated machine learning models.
summary: Machine learning applications are becoming increasingly pervasive in our society. Since these decision-making systems rely on data-driven learning, risk is that they will systematically spread the bias embedded in data. In this paper, we propose to analyze biases by introducing a framework for generating synthetic data with specific types of bias and their combinations. We delve into the nature of these biases discussing their relationship to moral and justice frameworks. Finally, we exploit our proposed synthetic data generator to perform experiments on different scenarios, with various bias combinations. We thus analyze the impact of biases on performance and fairness metrics both in non-mitigated and mitigated machine learning models.
abstract_zh: 机器学习应用在我们的社会中变得越来越普遍。由于这些决策系统依赖于数据驱动的学习，因此风险在于它们会系统地传播数据中嵌入的偏见。在本文中，我们建议通过引入一个框架来分析偏差，该框架用于生成具有特定类型偏差及其组合的合成数据。我们深入研究这些偏见的本质，讨论它们与道德和正义框架的关系。最后，我们利用我们提出的合成数据生成器在不同场景下使用各种偏差组合进行实验。因此，我们分析了非缓解和缓解机器学习模型中偏差对性能和公平性指标的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种合成数据生成框架，用于分析机器学习中的偏见，探讨其对模型性能和公平性的影响，并结合道德与正义框架进行哲学解释。
AI.motivation: 机器学习系统可能传播数据中的偏见，需系统研究偏见的影响及其道德意义。
AI.method: 构建合成数据生成框架，生成含特定偏见的数据集，通过实验分析不同偏见组合对模型性能和公平性指标的影响。
AI.result: 实验显示偏见显著影响模型性能和公平性，缓解方法可部分减轻但无法完全消除偏见影响。
AI.conclusion: 需结合技术方法和道德考量以减少偏见，确保机器学习决策的公平性。

authors_text: Uche Onyekpe,Alicja Szkolnik,Vasile Palade,Stratis Kanarachos,Michael E. Fitzpatrick
title: R-WhONet: Recalibrated Wheel Odometry Neural Network for Vehicular Positioning using Transfer Learning
title_zh: R-WhONet：使用迁移学习重新校准车轮里程计神经网络进行车辆定位
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.02581
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.02581
abstract: This paper proposes a transfer learning approach to recalibrate our previously developed Wheel Odometry Neural Network (WhONet) for vehicle positioning in environments where Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) are unavailable. The WhONet has been shown to possess the capability to learn the uncertainties in the wheel speed measurements needed for correction and accurate positioning of vehicles. These uncertainties may be manifested as tyre pressure changes from driving on muddy and uneven terrains or wheel slips. However, a common cause for concern for data-driven approaches, such as the WhONet model, is usually the inability to generalise the models to a new vehicle. In scenarios where machine learning models are trained in a specific domain but deployed in another domain, the model's performance degrades. In real-life scenarios, several factors are influential to this degradation, from changes to the dynamics of the vehicle to new pattern distributions of the sensor's noise, and bias will make the test sensor data vary from training data. Therefore, the challenge is to explore techniques that allow the trained machine learning models to spontaneously adjust to new vehicle domains. As such, we propose the Recalibrated-Wheel Odometry neural Network (R-WhONet), that adapts the WhONet model from its source domain (a vehicle and environment on which the model is initially trained) to the target domain (a new vehicle on which the trained model is to be deployed). Through a performance evaluation on several GNSS outage scenarios - short-term complex driving scenarios, and on longer-term GNSS outage scenarios. We demonstrate that a model trained in the source domain does not generalise well to a new vehicle in the target domain. However, we show that our new proposed framework improves the generalisation of the WhONet model to new vehicles in the target domains by up to 32%.
summary: This paper proposes a transfer learning approach to recalibrate our previously developed Wheel Odometry Neural Network (WhONet) for vehicle positioning in environments where Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) are unavailable. The WhONet has been shown to possess the capability to learn the uncertainties in the wheel speed measurements needed for correction and accurate positioning of vehicles. These uncertainties may be manifested as tyre pressure changes from driving on muddy and uneven terrains or wheel slips. However, a common cause for concern for data-driven approaches, such as the WhONet model, is usually the inability to generalise the models to a new vehicle. In scenarios where machine learning models are trained in a specific domain but deployed in another domain, the model's performance degrades. In real-life scenarios, several factors are influential to this degradation, from changes to the dynamics of the vehicle to new pattern distributions of the sensor's noise, and bias will make the test sensor data vary from training data. Therefore, the challenge is to explore techniques that allow the trained machine learning models to spontaneously adjust to new vehicle domains. As such, we propose the Recalibrated-Wheel Odometry neural Network (R-WhONet), that adapts the WhONet model from its source domain (a vehicle and environment on which the model is initially trained) to the target domain (a new vehicle on which the trained model is to be deployed). Through a performance evaluation on several GNSS outage scenarios - short-term complex driving scenarios, and on longer-term GNSS outage scenarios. We demonstrate that a model trained in the source domain does not generalise well to a new vehicle in the target domain. However, we show that our new proposed framework improves the generalisation of the WhONet model to new vehicles in the target domains by up to 32%.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种迁移学习方法来重新校准我们之前开发的车轮里程计神经网络（WhONet），用于在全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）不可用的环境中进行车辆定位。 WhONet 已被证明具有学习修正和准确定位车辆所需的轮速测量不确定性的能力。这些不确定性可能表现为在泥泞和不平坦的地形上行驶或车轮打滑时轮胎压力的变化。然而，数据驱动方法（例如 WhONet 模型）的一个常见问题通常是无法将模型推广到新车。在机器学习模型在特定领域进行训练但部署在另一个领域的场景中，模型的性能会下降。在现实场景中，有几个因素会影响这种退化，从车辆动力学的变化到传感器噪声的新模式分布，偏差将使测试传感器数据与训练数据不同。因此，挑战在于探索允许经过训练的机器学习模型自发适应新车辆领域的技术。因此，我们提出了重新校准车轮里程计神经网络（R-WhONet），它将 WhONet 模型从源域（最初训练模型的车辆和环境）调整到目标域（要部署训练模型的新车辆）。通过对几种 GNSS 中断场景（短期复杂驾驶场景）和长期 GNSS 中断场景的性能评估。我们证明，在源域中训练的模型不能很好地推广到目标域中的新车辆。然而，我们表明，我们提出的新框架将 WhONet 模型对目标领域中的新车的泛化能力提高了高达 32%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的R-WhONet方法，用于在GNSS不可用环境下提升车辆定位的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 原始WhONet模型在新车辆上表现不佳，因车辆动力学差异和传感器噪声分布变化导致模型性能退化。
AI.method: 通过迁移学习将源域（原车辆环境）训练的WhONet模型适配到目标域（新车辆），解决跨车辆部署时的泛化问题。
AI.result: 在多种GNSS中断场景下，R-WhONet使模型在新车辆上的定位精度提升最高达32%。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习有效解决了跨车辆部署的模型适配问题，显著提升了GNSS失效时的车辆定位性能。

search_text: R-WhONet: Recalibrated Wheel Odometry Neural Network for Vehicular Positioning using Transfer Learning R-WhONet：使用迁移学习重新校准车轮里程计神经网络进行车辆定位 This paper proposes a transfer learning approach to recalibrate our previously developed Wheel Odometry Neural Network (WhONet) for vehicle positioning in environments where Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) are unavailable. The WhONet has been shown to possess the capability to learn the uncertainties in the wheel speed measurements needed for correction and accurate positioning of vehicles. These uncertainties may be manifested as tyre pressure changes from driving on muddy and uneven terrains or wheel slips. However, a common cause for concern for data-driven approaches, such as the WhONet model, is usually the inability to generalise the models to a new vehicle. In scenarios where machine learning models are trained in a specific domain but deployed in another domain, the model's performance degrades. In real-life scenarios, several factors are influential to this degradation, from changes to the dynamics of the vehicle to new pattern distributions of the sensor's noise, and bias will make the test sensor data vary from training data. Therefore, the challenge is to explore techniques that allow the trained machine learning models to spontaneously adjust to new vehicle domains. As such, we propose the Recalibrated-Wheel Odometry neural Network (R-WhONet), that adapts the WhONet model from its source domain (a vehicle and environment on which the model is initially trained) to the target domain (a new vehicle on which the trained model is to be deployed). Through a performance evaluation on several GNSS outage scenarios - short-term complex driving scenarios, and on longer-term GNSS outage scenarios. We demonstrate that a model trained in the source domain does not generalise well to a new vehicle in the target domain. However, we show that our new proposed framework improves the generalisation of the WhONet model to new vehicles in the target domains by up to 32%. 本文提出了一种迁移学习方法来重新校准我们之前开发的车轮里程计神经网络（WhONet），用于在全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）不可用的环境中进行车辆定位。 WhONet 已被证明具有学习修正和准确定位车辆所需的轮速测量不确定性的能力。这些不确定性可能表现为在泥泞和不平坦的地形上行驶或车轮打滑时轮胎压力的变化。然而，数据驱动方法（例如 WhONet 模型）的一个常见问题通常是无法将模型推广到新车。在机器学习模型在特定领域进行训练但部署在另一个领域的场景中，模型的性能会下降。在现实场景中，有几个因素会影响这种退化，从车辆动力学的变化到传感器噪声的新模式分布，偏差将使测试传感器数据与训练数据不同。因此，挑战在于探索允许经过训练的机器学习模型自发适应新车辆领域的技术。因此，我们提出了重新校准车轮里程计神经网络（R-WhONet），它将 WhONet 模型从源域（最初训练模型的车辆和环境）调整到目标域（要部署训练模型的新车辆）。通过对几种 GNSS 中断场景（短期复杂驾驶场景）和长期 GNSS 中断场景的性能评估。我们证明，在源域中训练的模型不能很好地推广到目标域中的新车辆。然而，我们表明，我们提出的新框架将 WhONet 模型对目标领域中的新车的泛化能力提高了高达 32%。 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的R-WhONet方法，用于在GNSS不可用环境下提升车辆定位的泛化能力。 Uche Onyekpe,Alicja Szkolnik,Vasile Palade,Stratis Kanarachos,Michael E. authors_text: Yu Tian,Zhangkai Ni,Baoliang Chen,Shurun Wang,Shiqi Wang,Hanli Wang,Sam Kwong
title: Just Noticeable Difference Modeling for Face Recognition System
title_zh: 人脸识别系统的显着差异建模
comment: MegaFace dataset we used in the manuscript are no longer publicly available
comments: MegaFace dataset we used in the manuscript are no longer publicly available
abstract: High-quality face images are required to guarantee the stability and reliability of automatic face recognition (FR) systems in surveillance and security scenarios. However, a massive amount of face data is usually compressed before being analyzed due to limitations on transmission or storage. The compressed images may lose the powerful identity information, resulting in the performance degradation of the FR system. Herein, we make the first attempt to study just noticeable difference (JND) for the FR system, which can be defined as the maximum distortion that the FR system cannot notice. More specifically, we establish a JND dataset including 3530 original images and 137,670 compressed images generated by advanced reference encoding/decoding software based on the Versatile Video Coding (VVC) standard (VTM-15.0). Subsequently, we develop a novel JND prediction model to directly infer JND images for the FR system. In particular, in order to maximum redundancy removal without impairment of robust identity information, we apply the encoder with multiple feature extraction and attention-based feature decomposition modules to progressively decompose face features into two uncorrelated components, i.e., identity and residual features, via self-supervised learning. Then, the residual feature is fed into the decoder to generate the residual map. Finally, the predicted JND map is obtained by subtracting the residual map from the original image. Experimental results have demonstrated that the proposed model achieves higher accuracy of JND map prediction compared with the state-of-the-art JND models, and is capable of saving more bits while maintaining the performance of the FR system compared with VTM-15.0.
summary: High-quality face images are required to guarantee the stability and reliability of automatic face recognition (FR) systems in surveillance and security scenarios. However, a massive amount of face data is usually compressed before being analyzed due to limitations on transmission or storage. The compressed images may lose the powerful identity information, resulting in the performance degradation of the FR system. Herein, we make the first attempt to study just noticeable difference (JND) for the FR system, which can be defined as the maximum distortion that the FR system cannot notice. More specifically, we establish a JND dataset including 3530 original images and 137,670 compressed images generated by advanced reference encoding/decoding software based on the Versatile Video Coding (VVC) standard (VTM-15.0). Subsequently, we develop a novel JND prediction model to directly infer JND images for the FR system. In particular, in order to maximum redundancy removal without impairment of robust identity information, we apply the encoder with multiple feature extraction and attention-based feature decomposition modules to progressively decompose face features into two uncorrelated components, i.e., identity and residual features, via self-supervised learning. Then, the residual feature is fed into the decoder to generate the residual map. Finally, the predicted JND map is obtained by subtracting the residual map from the original image. Experimental results have demonstrated that the proposed model achieves higher accuracy of JND map prediction compared with the state-of-the-art JND models, and is capable of saving more bits while maintaining the performance of the FR system compared with VTM-15.0.
abstract_zh: 需要高质量的人脸图像来保证自动人脸识别（FR）系统在监控和安防场景中的稳定性和可靠性。然而，由于传输或存储的限制，大量的人脸数据在分析之前通常会被压缩。压缩后的图像可能会丢失强大的身份信息，导致FR系统的性能下降。在此，我们首次尝试研究 FR 系统的可察觉差异（JND），它可以定义为 FR 系统无法注意到的最大失真。更具体地说，我们建立了一个 JND 数据集，包括 3530 个原始图像和 137,670 个压缩图像，这些图像是由基于通用视频编码（VVC）标准（VTM-15.0）的高级参考编码/解码软件生成的。随后，我们开发了一种新颖的 JND 预测模型来直接推断 FR 系统的 JND 图像。特别是，为了在不损害鲁棒身份信息的情况下最大程度地去除冗余，我们应用具有多个特征提取和基于注意力的特征分解模块的编码器，通过自监督学习逐步将人脸特征分解为两个不相关的分量，即身份和残留特征。然后，将残差特征输入解码器以生成残差图。最后，通过从原始图像中减去残差图来获得预测的JND图。实验结果表明，与最先进的 JND 模型相比，该模型实现了更高的 JND 地图预测精度，并且与 VTM-15.0 相比，能够在保持 FR 系统性能的同时节省更多比特。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在压缩人脸图像时保持人脸识别系统性能，通过建立最小可察觉差异（JND）模型预测最大可接受失真。
AI.motivation: 压缩图像可能导致身份信息丢失，影响人脸识别系统性能，需在压缩率与识别准确率间找到平衡点。
AI.method: 构建包含3530张原始图像和137,670张压缩图像的JND数据集，设计多特征提取与注意力分解模块，通过自监督学习分离身份与残差特征，生成残差图并计算JND图。
AI.result: 提出的方法在JND预测准确率上优于现有模型，且相比VTC-15.0标准压缩算法能节省更多比特数而不损失识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了JND预测精度，为高效压缩与人脸识别性能平衡提供了新思路。

authors_text: Huayu Chen,Huanhuan He,Jing Zhu,Shuting Sun,Jianxiu Li,Xuexiao Shao,Junxiang Li,Xiaowei Li,Bin Hu
title: Weight-based Channel-model Matrix Framework provides a reasonable solution for EEG-based cross-dataset emotion recognition
title_zh: 基于权重的通道模型矩阵框架为基于脑电图的跨数据集情感识别提供了合理的解决方案
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables
comments: 18 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Cross-dataset emotion recognition as an extremely challenging task in the field of EEG-based affective computing is influenced by many factors, which makes the universal models yield unsatisfactory results. Facing the situation that lacks EEG information decoding research, we first analyzed the impact of different EEG information(individual, session, emotion and trial) for emotion recognition by sample space visualization, sample aggregation phenomena quantification, and energy pattern analysis on five public datasets. Based on these phenomena and patterns, we provided the processing methods and interpretable work of various EEG differences. Through the analysis of emotional feature distribution patterns, the Individual Emotional Feature Distribution Difference(IEFDD) was found, which was also considered as the main factor of the stability for emotion recognition. After analyzing the limitations of traditional modeling approach suffering from IEFDD, the Weight-based Channel-model Matrix Framework(WCMF) was proposed. To reasonably characterize emotional feature distribution patterns, four weight extraction methods were designed, and the optimal was the correction T-test(CT) weight extraction method. Finally, the performance of WCMF was validated on cross-dataset tasks in two kinds of experiments that simulated different practical scenarios, and the results showed that WCMF had more stable and better emotion recognition ability.
summary: Cross-dataset emotion recognition as an extremely challenging task in the field of EEG-based affective computing is influenced by many factors, which makes the universal models yield unsatisfactory results. Facing the situation that lacks EEG information decoding research, we first analyzed the impact of different EEG information(individual, session, emotion and trial) for emotion recognition by sample space visualization, sample aggregation phenomena quantification, and energy pattern analysis on five public datasets. Based on these phenomena and patterns, we provided the processing methods and interpretable work of various EEG differences. Through the analysis of emotional feature distribution patterns, the Individual Emotional Feature Distribution Difference(IEFDD) was found, which was also considered as the main factor of the stability for emotion recognition. After analyzing the limitations of traditional modeling approach suffering from IEFDD, the Weight-based Channel-model Matrix Framework(WCMF) was proposed. To reasonably characterize emotional feature distribution patterns, four weight extraction methods were designed, and the optimal was the correction T-test(CT) weight extraction method. Finally, the performance of WCMF was validated on cross-dataset tasks in two kinds of experiments that simulated different practical scenarios, and the results showed that WCMF had more stable and better emotion recognition ability.
abstract_zh: 跨数据集情感识别作为基于脑电图的情感计算领域中一项极具挑战性的任务，受到多种因素的影响，这使得通用模型的结果并不令人满意。面对缺乏脑电信息解码研究的情况，我们首先通过样本空间可视化、样本聚合现象量化和能量模式分析对五个公共数据集分析不同脑电信息（个体、会话、情感和试验）对情绪识别的影响。基于这些现象和模式，我们提供了各种脑电差异的处理方法和解释工作。通过对情绪特征分布模式的分析，发现了个体情绪特征分布差异（IEFDD），这也被认为是情绪识别稳定性的主要因素。在分析了传统建模方法受到IEFDD影响的局限性后，提出了基于权重的信道模型矩阵框架(WCMF)。为了合理表征情感特征分布模式，设计了四种权重提取方法，其中最优的是校正T检验（CT）权重提取方法。最后，通过模拟不同实际场景的两种实验在跨数据集任务上验证了 WCMF 的性能，结果表明 WCMF 具有更稳定、更好的情感识别能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于权重的通道模型矩阵框架(WCMF)，用于解决EEG跨数据集情绪识别中的稳定性与性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有通用模型在跨数据集情绪识别中因个体情绪特征分布差异(IEFDD)导致性能不稳定，需设计可解释的处理方法应对EEG信息差异。
AI.method: 通过样本空间可视化等方法分析EEG信息差异，提出WCMF框架并设计四种权重提取方法，最终采用修正T检验(CT)方法优化特征分布表征。
AI.result: WCMF在两类跨数据集实验中展现出更稳定且优越的情绪识别能力，有效缓解了IEFDD带来的性能波动。
AI.conclusion: WCMF通过合理表征情绪特征分布模式，成功解决了跨数据集情绪识别中的稳定性难题，为EEG情感计算提供新思路。

search_text: Weight-based Channel-model Matrix Framework provides a reasonable solution for EEG-based cross-dataset emotion recognition 基于权重的通道模型矩阵框架为基于脑电图的跨数据集情感识别提供了合理的解决方案 Cross-dataset emotion recognition as an extremely challenging task in the field of EEG-based affective computing is influenced by many factors, which makes the universal models yield unsatisfactory results. Facing the situation that lacks EEG information decoding research, we first analyzed the impact of different EEG information(individual, session, emotion and trial) for emotion recognition by sample space visualization, sample aggregation phenomena quantification, and energy pattern analysis on five public datasets. Based on these phenomena and patterns, we provided the processing methods and interpretable work of various EEG differences. Through the analysis of emotional feature distribution patterns, the Individual Emotional Feature Distribution Difference(IEFDD) was found, which was also considered as the main factor of the stability for emotion recognition. After analyzing the limitations of traditional modeling approach suffering from IEFDD, the Weight-based Channel-model Matrix Framework(WCMF) was proposed. To reasonably characterize emotional feature distribution patterns, four weight extraction methods were designed, and the optimal was the correction T-test(CT) weight extraction method. Finally, the performance of WCMF was validated on cross-dataset tasks in two kinds of experiments that simulated different practical scenarios, and the results showed that WCMF had more stable and better emotion recognition ability. 跨数据集情感识别作为基于脑电图的情感计算领域中一项极具挑战性的任务，受到多种因素的影响，这使得通用模型的结果并不令人满意。面对缺乏脑电信息解码研究的情况，我们首先通过样本空间可视化、样本聚合现象量化和能量模式分析对五个公共数据集分析不同脑电信息（个体、会话、情感和试验）对情绪识别的影响。基于这些现象和模式，我们提供了各种脑电差异的处理方法和解释工作。通过对情绪特征分布模式的分析，发现了个体情绪特征分布差异（IEFDD），这也被认为是情绪识别稳定性的主要因素。在分析了传统建模方法受到IEFDD影响的局限性后，提出了基于权重的信道模型矩阵框架(WCMF)。为了合理表征情感特征分布模式，设计了四种权重提取方法，其中最优的是校正T检验（CT）权重提取方法。最后，通过模拟不同实际场景的两种实验在跨数据集任务上验证了 WCMF 的性能，结果表明 WCMF 具有更稳定、更好的情感识别能力。 本文提出基于权重的通道模型矩阵框架(WCMF)，用于解决EEG跨数据集情绪识别中的稳定性与性能问题。 Huayu Chen,Huanhuan He,Jing Zhu,Shuting Sun,Jianxiu Li,Xuexiao Shao,Junxiang Li,Xiaowei Li,Bin Hu eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Tomasz Sluzalec,Rafal Grzeszczuk,Sergio Rojas,Witold Dzwinel,Maciej Paszynski
title: Quasi-optimal $hp$-finite element refinements towards singularities via deep neural network prediction
title_zh: 通过深度神经网络预测对奇点进行准最优$hp$有限元细化
comment: 30 pages, 19 figures
comments: 30 pages, 19 figures
abstract: We show how to construct the deep neural network (DNN) expert to predict quasi-optimal $hp$-refinements for a given computational problem. The main idea is to train the DNN expert during executing the self-adaptive $hp$-finite element method ($hp$-FEM) algorithm and use it later to predict further $hp$ refinements. For the training, we use a two-grid paradigm self-adaptive $hp$-FEM algorithm. It employs the fine mesh to provide the optimal $hp$ refinements for coarse mesh elements. We aim to construct the DNN expert to identify quasi-optimal $hp$ refinements of the coarse mesh elements. During the training phase, we use the direct solver to obtain the solution for the fine mesh to guide the optimal refinements over the coarse mesh element. After training, we turn off the self-adaptive $hp$-FEM algorithm and continue with quasi-optimal refinements as proposed by the DNN expert trained. We test our method on three-dimensional Fichera and two-dimensional L-shaped domain problems. We verify the convergence of the numerical accuracy with respect to the mesh size. We show that the exponential convergence delivered by the self-adaptive $hp$-FEM can be preserved if we continue refinements with a properly trained DNN expert. Thus, in this paper, we show that from the self-adaptive $hp$-FEM it is possible to train the DNN expert the location of the singularities, and continue with the selection of the quasi-optimal $hp$ refinements, preserving the exponential convergence of the method.
summary: We show how to construct the deep neural network (DNN) expert to predict quasi-optimal $hp$-refinements for a given computational problem. The main idea is to train the DNN expert during executing the self-adaptive $hp$-finite element method ($hp$-FEM) algorithm and use it later to predict further $hp$ refinements. For the training, we use a two-grid paradigm self-adaptive $hp$-FEM algorithm. It employs the fine mesh to provide the optimal $hp$ refinements for coarse mesh elements. We aim to construct the DNN expert to identify quasi-optimal $hp$ refinements of the coarse mesh elements. During the training phase, we use the direct solver to obtain the solution for the fine mesh to guide the optimal refinements over the coarse mesh element. After training, we turn off the self-adaptive $hp$-FEM algorithm and continue with quasi-optimal refinements as proposed by the DNN expert trained. We test our method on three-dimensional Fichera and two-dimensional L-shaped domain problems. We verify the convergence of the numerical accuracy with respect to the mesh size. We show that the exponential convergence delivered by the self-adaptive $hp$-FEM can be preserved if we continue refinements with a properly trained DNN expert. Thus, in this paper, we show that from the self-adaptive $hp$-FEM it is possible to train the DNN expert the location of the singularities, and continue with the selection of the quasi-optimal $hp$ refinements, preserving the exponential convergence of the method.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何构建深度神经网络 (DNN) 专家来预测给定计算问题的准最优 $hp$ 细化。主要思想是在执行自适应 $hp$-有限元法 ($hp$-FEM) 算法期间训练 DNN 专家，并在以后使用它来预测进一步的 $hp$ 细化。对于训练，我们使用两网格范式自适应 $hp$-FEM 算法。它利用精细网格为粗网格元素提供最佳的 $hp$ 细化。我们的目标是构建 DNN 专家来识别粗网格元素的准最优 $hp$ 细化。在训练阶段，我们使用直接求解器来获得细网格的解，以指导粗网格元素的最佳细化。训练后，我们关闭自适应 $hp$-FEM 算法，并继续按照受训 DNN 专家的建议进行准最优细化。我们在三维 Fichera 和二维 L 形域问题上测试了我们的方法。我们验证了数值精度相对于网格尺寸的收敛性。我们证明，如果我们继续与经过适当培训的 DNN 专家进行改进，则可以保留自适应 $hp$-FEM 提供的指数收敛性。因此，在本文中，我们表明，通过自适应 $hp$-FEM，可以训练 DNN 专家确定奇点的位置，并继续选择准最优 $hp$ 细化，从而保持方法的指数收敛性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度神经网络（DNN）预测自适应hp有限元方法中的准最优网格细化策略，以解决奇异性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应hp有限元方法计算成本高，且难以高效识别奇异性位置。通过训练DNN专家模型，可降低计算复杂度并保持指数收敛性。
AI.method: 采用两网格自适应hp-FEM算法，利用细网格解训练DNN以预测粗网格元素的准最优细化方案，训练后用DNN替代自适应算法进行后续细化。
AI.result: 在三维Fichera问题和二维L型区域测试中验证了方法有效性，数值精度随网格尺寸收敛，且DNN辅助细化保留了原方法的指数收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 通过DNN可高效识别奇异性位置并生成准最优hp细化策略，在保证收敛性的同时显著降低计算成本。

authors_text: Vlad Stirbu,Tuomas Granlund,Tommi Mikkonen
title: Continuous Design Control for Machine Learning in Certified Medical Systems
title_zh: 认证医疗系统中机器学习的连续设计控制
abstract: Continuous software engineering has become commonplace in numerous fields. However, in regulating intensive sectors, where additional concerns needs to be taken into account, it is often considered difficult to apply continuous development approaches, such as devops. In this paper, we present an approach for using pull requests as design controls, and apply this approach to machine learning in certified medical systems leveraging model cards, a novel technique developed to add explainability to machine learning systems, as a regulatory audit trail. The approach is demonstrated with an industrial system that we have used previously to show how medical systems can be developed in a continuous fashion.
summary: Continuous software engineering has become commonplace in numerous fields. However, in regulating intensive sectors, where additional concerns needs to be taken into account, it is often considered difficult to apply continuous development approaches, such as devops. In this paper, we present an approach for using pull requests as design controls, and apply this approach to machine learning in certified medical systems leveraging model cards, a novel technique developed to add explainability to machine learning systems, as a regulatory audit trail. The approach is demonstrated with an industrial system that we have used previously to show how medical systems can be developed in a continuous fashion.
abstract_zh: 持续软件工程在许多领域已经变得司空见惯。然而，在监管密集型行业时，需要考虑其他问题，通常认为很难应用持续开发方法，例如 DevOps。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用拉取请求作为设计控制的方法，并将这种方法应用于经过认证的医疗系统中的机器学习，利用模型卡（一种为增加机器学习系统的可解释性而开发的新技术）作为监管审计跟踪。该方法通过我们之前用来展示如何以连续方式开发医疗系统的工业系统进行了演示。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在认证医疗系统中应用持续设计控制的方法，利用拉取请求和模型卡片作为监管审计追踪。
AI.motivation: 传统持续开发方法在医疗等严格监管领域难以应用，需结合监管要求与开发流程。
AI.method: 利用拉取请求作为设计控制，结合模型卡片技术，为医疗系统的机器学习开发建立监管审计追踪。
AI.result: 通过工业案例验证了该方法在医疗系统中实现持续开发的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效整合了持续开发流程与医疗监管要求，为认证医疗系统的机器学习开发提供了可行路径。

search_text: Continuous Design Control for Machine Learning in Certified Medical Systems 认证医疗系统中机器学习的连续设计控制 Continuous software engineering has become commonplace in numerous fields. However, in regulating intensive sectors, where additional concerns needs to be taken into account, it is often considered difficult to apply continuous development approaches, such as devops. In this paper, we present an approach for using pull requests as design controls, and apply this approach to machine learning in certified medical systems leveraging model cards, a novel technique developed to add explainability to machine learning systems, as a regulatory audit trail. The approach is demonstrated with an industrial system that we have used previously to show how medical systems can be developed in a continuous fashion. 持续软件工程在许多领域已经变得司空见惯。然而，在监管密集型行业时，需要考虑其他问题，通常认为很难应用持续开发方法，例如 DevOps。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用拉取请求作为设计控制的方法，并将这种方法应用于经过认证的医疗系统中的机器学习，利用模型卡（一种为增加机器学习系统的可解释性而开发的新技术）作为监管审计跟踪。该方法通过我们之前用来展示如何以连续方式开发医疗系统的工业系统进行了演示。 提出一种在认证医疗系统中应用持续设计控制的方法，利用拉取请求和模型卡片作为监管审计追踪。 Vlad Stirbu,Tuomas Granlund,Tommi Mikkonen cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhen Yu,Toan Nguyen,Yaniv Gal,Lie Ju,Shekhar S. Chandra,Lei Zhang,Paul Bonnington,Victoria Mar,Zhiyong Wang,Zongyuan Ge
title: Skin Lesion Recognition with Class-Hierarchy Regularized Hyperbolic Embeddings
title_zh: 使用类层次结构正则化双曲嵌入进行皮肤病变识别
comment: in The 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention
comments: in The 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention
abstract: In practice, many medical datasets have an underlying taxonomy defined over the disease label space. However, existing classification algorithms for medical diagnoses often assume semantically independent labels. In this study, we aim to leverage class hierarchy with deep learning algorithms for more accurate and reliable skin lesion recognition. We propose a hyperbolic network to learn image embeddings and class prototypes jointly. The hyperbola provably provides a space for modeling hierarchical relations better than Euclidean geometry. Meanwhile, we restrict the distribution of hyperbolic prototypes with a distance matrix that is encoded from the class hierarchy. Accordingly, the learned prototypes preserve the semantic class relations in the embedding space and we can predict the label of an image by assigning its feature to the nearest hyperbolic class prototype. We use an in-house skin lesion dataset which consists of around 230k dermoscopic images on 65 skin diseases to verify our method. Extensive experiments provide evidence that our model can achieve higher accuracy with less severe classification errors than models without considering class relations.
summary: In practice, many medical datasets have an underlying taxonomy defined over the disease label space. However, existing classification algorithms for medical diagnoses often assume semantically independent labels. In this study, we aim to leverage class hierarchy with deep learning algorithms for more accurate and reliable skin lesion recognition. We propose a hyperbolic network to learn image embeddings and class prototypes jointly. The hyperbola provably provides a space for modeling hierarchical relations better than Euclidean geometry. Meanwhile, we restrict the distribution of hyperbolic prototypes with a distance matrix that is encoded from the class hierarchy. Accordingly, the learned prototypes preserve the semantic class relations in the embedding space and we can predict the label of an image by assigning its feature to the nearest hyperbolic class prototype. We use an in-house skin lesion dataset which consists of around 230k dermoscopic images on 65 skin diseases to verify our method. Extensive experiments provide evidence that our model can achieve higher accuracy with less severe classification errors than models without considering class relations.
abstract_zh: 在实践中，许多医学数据集都有在疾病标签空间上定义的基础分类法。然而，现有的医学诊断分类算法通常采用语义独立的标签。在本研究中，我们的目标是利用深度学习算法的类层次结构来实现更准确、更可靠的皮肤病变识别。我们提出了一个双曲网络来联合学习图像嵌入和类原型。事实证明，双曲线提供了比欧几里得几何更好的层次关系建模空间。同时，我们使用从类层次结构编码的距离矩阵来限制双曲原型的分布。因此，学习到的原型保留了嵌入空间中的语义类关系，我们可以通过将图像的特征分配给最近的双曲类原型来预测图像的标签。我们使用内部皮肤病变数据集来验证我们的方法，该数据集包含 65 种皮肤疾病的约 23 万张皮肤镜图像。大量的实验证明，与不考虑类别关系的模型相比，我们的模型可以实现更高的准确度，并且分类错误更严重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双曲嵌入和类层次结构的深度学习方法，用于提高皮肤病变识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗分类算法通常假设疾病标签语义独立，而实际医学数据中疾病标签存在潜在的层次关系，利用这种结构可提升分类性能。
AI.method: 构建双曲神经网络联合学习图像嵌入与类原型，通过类层次结构生成的距离矩阵约束双曲空间中原型分布，利用最近邻原则进行分类。
AI.result: 在包含23万张图像的皮肤病变数据集上，该方法在准确率和分类错误率上均优于传统不考虑类关系的模型。
AI.conclusion: 双曲几何能有效建模疾病层次关系，结合类层次正则化的嵌入学习可显著提升医疗图像分类的准确性与可靠性。

authors_text: Keisuke Shirai,Atsushi Hashimoto,Taichi Nishimura,Hirotaka Kameko,Shuhei Kurita,Yoshitaka Ushiku,Shinsuke Mori
title: Visual Recipe Flow: A Dataset for Learning Visual State Changes of Objects with Recipe Flows
title_zh: 视觉配方流：用于学习具有配方流的对象视觉状态变化的数据集
comment: COLING 2022
comments: COLING 2022
abstract: We present a new multimodal dataset called Visual Recipe Flow, which enables us to learn each cooking action result in a recipe text. The dataset consists of object state changes and the workflow of the recipe text. The state change is represented as an image pair, while the workflow is represented as a recipe flow graph (r-FG). The image pairs are grounded in the r-FG, which provides the cross-modal relation. With our dataset, one can try a range of applications, from multimodal commonsense reasoning and procedural text generation.
summary: We present a new multimodal dataset called Visual Recipe Flow, which enables us to learn each cooking action result in a recipe text. The dataset consists of object state changes and the workflow of the recipe text. The state change is represented as an image pair, while the workflow is represented as a recipe flow graph (r-FG). The image pairs are grounded in the r-FG, which provides the cross-modal relation. With our dataset, one can try a range of applications, from multimodal commonsense reasoning and procedural text generation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为“视觉食谱流”的新多模式数据集，它使我们能够了解食谱文本中的每个烹饪操作结果。该数据集由对象状态变化和配方文本的工作流程组成。状态变化表示为图像对，而工作流程表示为配方流程图（r-FG）。图像对以 r-FG 为基础，提供跨模态关系。通过我们的数据集，人们可以尝试一系列应用程序，从多模式常识推理到程序文本生成。

AI.tldr: 提出一个名为Visual Recipe Flow的数据集，用于学习烹饪过程中物体状态变化与食谱流程的关联。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对烹饪过程中物体状态变化与流程的跨模态关联，需构建新数据集以支持多模态任务。
AI.method: 构建包含图像对（展示状态变化）和食谱流程图（r-FG）的数据集，并建立跨模态关联。
AI.result: 成功构建数据集，并验证其在多模态常识推理和过程文本生成中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为多模态学习和烹饪流程理解提供了新资源，推动相关研究进展。

authors_text: Tim Holzenkamp,Kevin Kuryshev,Thomas Oltmann,Lucas Wäldele,Johann Zuber,Tobias Heuer,Markus Iser
title: SATViz: Real-Time Visualization of Clausal Proofs
title_zh: SATViz：子句证明的实时可视化
comment: Presented at Pragmatics of SAT Workshop (no proceedings)
comments: Presented at Pragmatics of SAT Workshop (no proceedings)
abstract: Visual layouts of graphs representing SAT instances can highlight the community structure of SAT instances. The community structure of SAT instances has been associated with both instance hardness and known clause quality heuristics. Our tool SATViz visualizes CNF formulas using the variable interaction graph and a force-directed layout algorithm. With SATViz, clause proofs can be animated to continuously highlight variables that occur in a moving window of recently learned clauses. If needed, SATViz can also create new layouts of the variable interaction graph with the adjusted edge weights. In this paper, we describe the structure and feature set of SATViz. We also present some interesting visualizations created with SATViz.
summary: Visual layouts of graphs representing SAT instances can highlight the community structure of SAT instances. The community structure of SAT instances has been associated with both instance hardness and known clause quality heuristics. Our tool SATViz visualizes CNF formulas using the variable interaction graph and a force-directed layout algorithm. With SATViz, clause proofs can be animated to continuously highlight variables that occur in a moving window of recently learned clauses. If needed, SATViz can also create new layouts of the variable interaction graph with the adjusted edge weights. In this paper, we describe the structure and feature set of SATViz. We also present some interesting visualizations created with SATViz.
abstract_zh: 代表 SAT 实例的图形的视觉布局可以突出显示 SAT 实例的社区结构。 SAT 实例的社区结构与实例硬度和已知子句质量启发法相关。我们的工具 SATViz 使用变量交互图和力导向布局算法来可视化 CNF 公式。使用 SATViz，可以对子句证明进行动画处理，以连续突出显示最近学习的子句的移动窗口中出现的变量。如果需要，SATViz 还可以使用调整后的边权重创建变量交互图的新布局。在本文中，我们描述了 SATViz 的结构和功能集。我们还展示了一些使用 SATViz 创建的有趣的可视化效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SATViz工具，用于实时可视化SAT问题的子句证明过程，通过变量交互图和力导向布局算法展示SAT实例的社区结构。
AI.motivation: SAT实例的社区结构与问题难度及子句质量启发式方法相关，可视化该结构有助于分析SAT求解过程和优化策略。
AI.method: 基于变量交互图构建力导向布局，通过动画动态高亮近期学习子句中的变量，并可根据需要调整边权重生成新布局。
AI.result: 描述了SATViz的架构与功能，并展示了其生成的可视化案例，验证了工具在分析SAT实例结构中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SATViz为研究SAT问题的社区结构和子句证明提供了直观的可视化工具，有助于深入理解求解过程与优化方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SATViz工具，用于实时可视化SAT问题的子句证明过程，通过变量交互图和力导向布局算法展示SAT实例的社区结构。
ai_content.motivation: SAT实例的社区结构与问题难度及子句质量启发式方法相关，可视化该结构有助于分析SAT求解过程和优化策略。

search_text: SATViz: Real-Time Visualization of Clausal Proofs SATViz：子句证明的实时可视化 Visual layouts of graphs representing SAT instances can highlight the community structure of SAT instances. The community structure of SAT instances has been associated with both instance hardness and known clause quality heuristics. Our tool SATViz visualizes CNF formulas using the variable interaction graph and a force-directed layout algorithm. With SATViz, clause proofs can be animated to continuously highlight variables that occur in a moving window of recently learned clauses. If needed, SATViz can also create new layouts of the variable interaction graph with the adjusted edge weights. In this paper, we describe the structure and feature set of SATViz. We also present some interesting visualizations created with SATViz. 代表 SAT 实例的图形的视觉布局可以突出显示 SAT 实例的社区结构。 SAT 实例的社区结构与实例硬度和已知子句质量启发法相关。我们的工具 SATViz 使用变量交互图和力导向布局算法来可视化 CNF 公式。使用 SATViz，可以对子句证明进行动画处理，以连续突出显示最近学习的子句的移动窗口中出现的变量。如果需要，SATViz 还可以使用调整后的边权重创建变量交互图的新布局。在本文中，我们描述了 SATViz 的结构和功能集。我们还展示了一些使用 SATViz 创建的有趣的可视化效果。 本文提出SATViz工具，用于实时可视化SAT问题的子句证明过程，通过变量交互图和力导向布局算法展示SAT实例的社区结构。 Tim Holzenkamp,Kevin Kuryshev,Thomas Oltmann,Lucas Wäldele,Johann Zuber,Tobias Heuer,Markus Iser cs.AI

authors_text: Chen Rothschild
title: Computer vision system to count crustacean larvae
title_zh: 计算甲壳类幼虫的计算机视觉系统
abstract: Fish products account for about 16 percent of the human diet worldwide, as of 2017. The counting action is a significant component in growing and producing these products. Growers must count the fish accurately, to do so technological solutions are needed. Two computer vision systems to automatically count crustacean larvae grown in industrial ponds were developed. The first system included an iPhone 11 camera with 3024X4032 resolution which acquired images from an industrial pond in indoor conditions. Two experiments were performed with this system, the first one included 200 images acquired in one day on growth stages 9,10 with an iPhone 11 camera on specific illumination condition. In the second experiment, a larvae industrial pond was photographed for 11 days with two devices an iPhone 11 and a SONY DSCHX90V cameras. With the first device (iPhone 11) two illumination conditions were tested. In each condition, 110 images were acquired. That system resulted in an accuracy of 88.4 percent image detection. The second system included a DSLR Nikon D510 camera with a 2000X2000 resolution with which seven experiments were performed outside the industrial pond. Images were acquired on day 1 of larvae growing stage resulting in the acquisition of a total of 700 images. That system resulted in an accuracy of 86 percent for a density of 50. An algorithm that automatically counts the number of larvae was developed for both cases based on the YOLOv5 CNN model. In addition, in this study, a larvae growth function was developed. Daily, several larvae were taken manually from the industrial pond and analyzed under a microscope. Once the growth stage was determined, images of the larva were acquired. Each larva's length was measured manually from the images. The most suitable model was the Gompertz model with a goodness of fit index of R squared of 0.983.

abstract_zh: 截至 2017 年，鱼产品约占全球人类饮食的 16%。计数操作是种植和生产这些产品的重要组成部分。养殖者必须准确计数鱼的数量，为此需要技术解决方案。开发了两种计算机视觉系统来自动计数工业池塘中生长的甲壳类幼虫。第一个系统包括分辨率为 3024X4032 的 iPhone 11 摄像头，可在室内条件下从工业池塘获取图像。使用该系统进行了两项实验，第一个实验包括使用 iPhone 11 相机在特定照明条件下一天在生长阶段 9,10 采集的 200 张图像。在第二个实验中，使用两台设备（iPhone 11 和 SONY DSCHX90V 相机）对一个幼虫工业池塘进行了 11 天的拍摄。对于第一台设备（iPhone 11），测试了两种照明条件。在每种条件下，采集了 110 张图像。该系统的图像检测准确率为 88.4%。第二个系统包括分辨率为 2000X2000 的 DSLR Nikon D510 相机，在工业池塘外进行了七次实验。在幼虫生长阶段的第一天采集图像，总共采集了 700 张图像。该系统在密度为 50 时的准确率为 86%。基于 YOLOv5 CNN 模型，针对这两种情况开发了一种自动计算幼虫数量的算法。此外，在这项研究中，还开发了幼虫生长功能。每天，人工从工业池塘中取出一些幼虫并在显微镜下进行分析。一旦确定了生长阶段，就获取幼虫的图像。每个幼虫的长度都是根据图像手动测量的。最合适的模型是 Gompertz 模型，拟合优度指数 R 平方为 0.983。

AI.tldr: 开发基于计算机视觉的系统，用于自动计数工业池中甲壳类幼虫。
AI.motivation: 准确统计水产养殖中的幼虫数量对提高鱼类产品产量至关重要，传统方法效率低且易出错，需技术解决方案。
AI.method: 采用iPhone 11和尼康DSLR相机分别在不同光照条件下拍摄幼虫图像，基于YOLOv5 CNN模型开发自动计数算法，并结合显微镜测量数据建立幼虫生长模型。
AI.result: iPhone 11系统检测准确率达88.4%，DSLR系统在密度50时达86%；Gompertz生长模型拟合优度R²为0.983。
AI.conclusion: 两种计算机视觉系统均有效，YOLOv5模型结合生长函数可为水产养殖提供可靠自动化解决方案。

authors_text: Sumit Neelam,Udit Sharma,Sumit Bhatia,Hima Karanam,Ankita Likhyani,Ibrahim Abdelaziz,Achille Fokoue,L. V. Subramaniam
title: Expressive Reasoning Graph Store: A Unified Framework for Managing RDF and Property Graph Databases
title_zh: 表达推理图存储：管理 RDF 和属性图数据库的统一框架
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables
comments: 16 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables
abstract: Resource Description Framework (RDF) and Property Graph (PG) are the two most commonly used data models for representing, storing, and querying graph data. We present Expressive Reasoning Graph Store (ERGS) -- a graph store built on top of JanusGraph (a Property Graph store) that also allows storing and querying of RDF datasets. First, we describe how RDF data can be translated into a Property Graph representation and then describe a query translation module that converts SPARQL queries into a series of Gremlin traversals. The converters and translators thus developed can allow any Apache Tinkerpop compliant graph database to store and query RDF datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach using JanusGraph as the base Property Graph store and compare its performance with standard RDF systems.
summary: Resource Description Framework (RDF) and Property Graph (PG) are the two most commonly used data models for representing, storing, and querying graph data. We present Expressive Reasoning Graph Store (ERGS) -- a graph store built on top of JanusGraph (a Property Graph store) that also allows storing and querying of RDF datasets. First, we describe how RDF data can be translated into a Property Graph representation and then describe a query translation module that converts SPARQL queries into a series of Gremlin traversals. The converters and translators thus developed can allow any Apache Tinkerpop compliant graph database to store and query RDF datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach using JanusGraph as the base Property Graph store and compare its performance with standard RDF systems.
abstract_zh: 资源描述框架（RDF）和属性图（PG）是用于表示、存储和查询图数据的两种最常用的数据模型。我们提出了表达推理图存储 (ERGS)——一种构建在 JanusGraph（属性图存储）之上的图存储，它还允许存储和查询 RDF 数据集。首先，我们描述如何将 RDF 数据转换为属性图表示，然后描述将 SPARQL 查询转换为一系列 Gremlin 遍历的查询转换模块。由此开发的转换器和翻译器可以允许任何兼容 Apache Tinkerpop 的图形数据库存储和查询 RDF 数据集。我们使用 JanusGraph 作为基础属性图存储来展示我们提出的方法的有效性，并将其性能与标准 RDF 系统进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架ERGS，基于JanusGraph属性图数据库，实现对RDF数据集的存储与查询。
AI.motivation: RDF和属性图是两种主流图数据模型，但现有系统难以统一管理，需解决两者间的互操作性问题。
AI.method: 将RDF数据转换为属性图表示，并开发SPARQL到Gremlin遍历的查询转换模块，使TinkerPop兼容数据库支持RDF操作。
AI.result: 以JanusGraph为底层验证了ERGS的有效性，并与标准RDF系统进行了性能对比。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了RDF与属性图的统一管理，为利用现有属性图基础设施处理RDF数据提供了可行方案。
