First, we describe how RDF data can be translated into a Property Graph representation and then describe a query translation module that converts SPARQL queries into a series of Gremlin traversals. The converters and translators thus developed can allow any Apache Tinkerpop compliant graph database to store and query RDF datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach using JanusGraph as the base Property Graph store and compare its performance with standard RDF systems. 资源描述框架（RDF）和属性图（PG）是用于表示、存储和查询图数据的两种最常用的数据模型。我们提出了表达推理图存储 (ERGS)——一种构建在 JanusGraph（属性图存储）之上的图存储，它还允许存储和查询 RDF 数据集。首先，我们描述如何将 RDF 数据转换为属性图表示，然后描述将 SPARQL 查询转换为一系列 Gremlin 遍历的查询转换模块。由此开发的转换器和翻译器可以允许任何兼容 Apache Tinkerpop 的图形数据库存储和查询 RDF 数据集。我们使用 JanusGraph 作为基础属性图存储来展示我们提出的方法的有效性，并将其性能与标准 RDF 系统进行比较。 本文提出了一种统一框架ERGS，基于JanusGraph属性图数据库，实现对RDF数据集的存储与查询。 Sumit Neelam,Udit Sharma,Sumit Bhatia,Hima Karanam,Ankita Likhyani,Ibrahim Abdelaziz,Achille Fokoue,L. V. Subramaniam cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Guangyang Zeng,Shiyu Chen,Biqiang Mu,Guodong Shi,Junfeng Wu
title: CPnP: Consistent Pose Estimator for Perspective-n-Point Problem with Bias Elimination
title_zh: CPnP：消除偏差的透视 n 点问题的一致姿势估计器
abstract: The Perspective-n-Point (PnP) problem has been widely studied in both computer vision and photogrammetry societies. With the development of feature extraction techniques, a large number of feature points might be available in a single shot. It is promising to devise a consistent estimator, i.e., the estimate can converge to the true camera pose as the number of points increases. To this end, we propose a consistent PnP solver, named \emph{CPnP}, with bias elimination. Specifically, linear equations are constructed from the original projection model via measurement model modification and variable elimination, based on which a closed-form least-squares solution is obtained. We then analyze and subtract the asymptotic bias of this solution, resulting in a consistent estimate. Additionally, Gauss-Newton (GN) iterations are executed to refine the consistent solution. Our proposed estimator is efficient in terms of computations -- it has $O(n)$ computational complexity. Experimental tests on both synthetic data and real images show that our proposed estimator is superior to some well-known ones for images with dense visual features, in terms of estimation precision and computing time.
summary: The Perspective-n-Point (PnP) problem has been widely studied in both computer vision and photogrammetry societies. With the development of feature extraction techniques, a large number of feature points might be available in a single shot. It is promising to devise a consistent estimator, i.e., the estimate can converge to the true camera pose as the number of points increases. To this end, we propose a consistent PnP solver, named \emph{CPnP}, with bias elimination. Specifically, linear equations are constructed from the original projection model via measurement model modification and variable elimination, based on which a closed-form least-squares solution is obtained. We then analyze and subtract the asymptotic bias of this solution, resulting in a consistent estimate. Additionally, Gauss-Newton (GN) iterations are executed to refine the consistent solution. Our proposed estimator is efficient in terms of computations -- it has $O(n)$ computational complexity. Experimental tests on both synthetic data and real images show that our proposed estimator is superior to some well-known ones for images with dense visual features, in terms of estimation precision and computing time.
abstract_zh: 透视 n 点 (PnP) 问题已在计算机视觉和摄影测量协会中得到广泛研究。随着特征提取技术的发展，单次拍摄中可能会获得大量特征点。设计一个一致的估计器是有希望的，即随着点数的增加，估计可以收敛到真实的相机姿态。为此，我们提出了一个一致的 PnP 求解器，名为 \emph{CPnP}，具有偏差消除功能。具体来说，通过测量模型修正和变量消除，从原始投影模型构建线性方程，并在此基础上获得闭式最小二乘解。然后，我们分析并减去该解的渐近偏差，从而得到一致的估计。此外，还执行高斯-牛顿 (GN) 迭代来细化一致的解决方案。我们提出的估计器在计算方面是高效的——它的计算复杂度为 $O(n)$。对合成数据和真实图像的实验测试表明，我们提出的估计器在估计精度和计算时间方面优于一些具有密集视觉特征的图像的众所周知的估计器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CPnP的新型一致姿态估计方法，用于解决具有偏差消除的透视n点问题。
AI.motivation: 传统PnP方法在特征点数量增加时难以保证估计一致性，尤其在密集视觉特征场景下存在偏差问题。
AI.method: 通过修改测量模型与变量消除构建线性方程，求解闭式最小二乘解并消除渐进偏差，结合高斯-牛顿迭代优化，实现O(n)复杂度的高效计算。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实图像实验中，CPnP在估计精度和计算效率上均优于现有主流方法，尤其适用于密集特征场景。
AI.conclusion: CPnP通过偏差消除和迭代优化有效解决了PnP问题，为高密度特征场景提供了高效一致的姿态估计方案。

authors_text: Ziwei Zhao,Dong Wang,Yihong Chen,Ziteng Wang,Liwei Wang
title: Check and Link: Pairwise Lesion Correspondence Guides Mammogram Mass Detection
title_zh: 检查和链接：成对病变对应指南乳房 X 线照片质量检测
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: Detecting mass in mammogram is significant due to the high occurrence and mortality of breast cancer. In mammogram mass detection, modeling pairwise lesion correspondence explicitly is particularly important. However, most of the existing methods build relatively coarse correspondence and have not utilized correspondence supervision. In this paper, we propose a new transformer-based framework CL-Net to learn lesion detection and pairwise correspondence in an end-to-end manner. In CL-Net, View-Interactive Lesion Detector is proposed to achieve dynamic interaction across candidates of cross views, while Lesion Linker employs the correspondence supervision to guide the interaction process more accurately. The combination of these two designs accomplishes precise understanding of pairwise lesion correspondence for mammograms. Experiments show that CL-Net yields state-of-the-art performance on the public DDSM dataset and our in-house dataset. Moreover, it outperforms previous methods by a large margin in low FPI regime.
summary: Detecting mass in mammogram is significant due to the high occurrence and mortality of breast cancer. In mammogram mass detection, modeling pairwise lesion correspondence explicitly is particularly important. However, most of the existing methods build relatively coarse correspondence and have not utilized correspondence supervision. In this paper, we propose a new transformer-based framework CL-Net to learn lesion detection and pairwise correspondence in an end-to-end manner. In CL-Net, View-Interactive Lesion Detector is proposed to achieve dynamic interaction across candidates of cross views, while Lesion Linker employs the correspondence supervision to guide the interaction process more accurately. The combination of these two designs accomplishes precise understanding of pairwise lesion correspondence for mammograms. Experiments show that CL-Net yields state-of-the-art performance on the public DDSM dataset and our in-house dataset. Moreover, it outperforms previous methods by a large margin in low FPI regime.
abstract_zh: 由于乳腺癌的高发病率和死亡率，在乳房X光检查中检测肿块具有重要意义。在乳房X光检查质量检测中，明确地建模成对病变对应关系尤为重要。然而，大多数现有方法建立的对应关系相对粗糙，并且没有利用对应监督。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于变压器的框架 CL-Net，以端到端的方式学习病变检测和成对对应。在CL-Net中，提出了View-Interactive Lesion Detector来实现交叉视图候选之间的动态交互，而Lesion Linker则采用对应监督来更准确地指导交互过程。这两种设计的结合实现了对乳房 X 光检查的成对病变对应关系的精确理解。实验表明，CL-Net 在公共 DDSM 数据集和我们的内部数据集上产生了最先进的性能。此外，在低 FPI 情况下，它的性能大大优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的框架CL-Net，通过建模乳腺X光片中病灶的成对对应关系来提升肿块检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模病灶对应关系时存在粒度粗糙且未利用对应监督的问题，导致检测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计View-Interactive Lesion Detector实现跨视图候选区域动态交互，并引入Lesion Linker通过对应监督引导更精确的交互过程。
AI.result: 在DDSM公开数据集和内部数据集上均达到SOTA性能，尤其在低假阳性率（FPI）场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化病灶检测与成对对应关系建模，CL-Net有效提升了乳腺X光片肿块检测的准确性。

authors_text: Frank Kulwa,Oluwarotimi Williams Samuel,Mojisola Grace Asogbon,Olumide Olayinka Obe,Guanglin Li
title: Analyzing the Impact of Varied Window Hyper-parameters on Deep CNN for sEMG based Motion Intent Classification
title_zh: 分析不同窗口超参数对基于 sEMG 的运动意图分类的深度 CNN 的影响
abstract: The use of deep neural networks in electromyogram (EMG) based prostheses control provides a promising alternative to the hand-crafted features by automatically learning muscle activation patterns from the EMG signals. Meanwhile, the use of raw EMG signals as input to convolution neural networks (CNN) offers a simple, fast, and ideal scheme for effective control of prostheses. Therefore, this study investigates the relationship between window length and overlap, which may influence the generation of robust raw EMG 2-dimensional (2D) signals for application in CNN. And a rule of thumb for a proper combination of these parameters that could guarantee optimal network performance was derived. Moreover, we investigate the relationship between the CNN receptive window size and the raw EMG signal size. Experimental results show that the performance of the CNN increases with the increase in overlap within the generated signals, with the highest improvement of 9.49% accuracy and 23.33% F1-score realized when the overlap is 75% of the window length. Similarly, the network performance increases with the increase in receptive window (kernel) size. Findings from this study suggest that a combination of 75% overlap in 2D EMG signals and wider network kernels may provide ideal motor intents classification for adequate EMG-CNN based prostheses control scheme.
summary: The use of deep neural networks in electromyogram (EMG) based prostheses control provides a promising alternative to the hand-crafted features by automatically learning muscle activation patterns from the EMG signals. Meanwhile, the use of raw EMG signals as input to convolution neural networks (CNN) offers a simple, fast, and ideal scheme for effective control of prostheses. Therefore, this study investigates the relationship between window length and overlap, which may influence the generation of robust raw EMG 2-dimensional (2D) signals for application in CNN. And a rule of thumb for a proper combination of these parameters that could guarantee optimal network performance was derived. Moreover, we investigate the relationship between the CNN receptive window size and the raw EMG signal size. Experimental results show that the performance of the CNN increases with the increase in overlap within the generated signals, with the highest improvement of 9.49% accuracy and 23.33% F1-score realized when the overlap is 75% of the window length. Similarly, the network performance increases with the increase in receptive window (kernel) size. Findings from this study suggest that a combination of 75% overlap in 2D EMG signals and wider network kernels may provide ideal motor intents classification for adequate EMG-CNN based prostheses control scheme.
abstract_zh: 在基于肌电图 (EMG) 的假肢控制中使用深度神经网络，通过从肌电图信号中自动学习肌肉激活模式，为手工制作的特征提供了一种有前途的替代方案。同时，使用原始肌电信号作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的输入为有效控制假肢提供了一种简单、快速且理想的方案。因此，本研究研究了窗口长度和重叠之间的关系，这可能会影响 CNN 中应用的鲁棒原始 EMG 二维 (2D) 信号的生成。并得出了正确组合这些参数以保证最佳网络性能的经验法则。此外，我们研究了 CNN 接收窗口大小和原始 EMG 信号大小之间的关系。实验结果表明，CNN 的性能随着生成信号内重叠的增加而提高，当重叠为窗口长度的 75% 时，准确率最高提高 9.49%，F1 分数达到 23.33%。同样，网络性能随着接收窗口（内核）大小的增加而增加。这项研究的结果表明，2D EMG 信号中 75% 的重叠和更宽的网络内核的组合可以为基于 EMG-CNN 的适当假肢控制方案提供理想的运动意图分类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同窗口超参数对基于表面肌电图(sEMG)运动意图分类的深度卷积神经网络(CNN)性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统手工特征提取方法在sEMG假肢控制中存在局限性，而直接使用原始sEMG信号输入CNN可自动学习肌肉激活模式，但需确定最佳窗口参数以生成稳健的2D信号。
AI.method: 通过调整窗口长度与重叠比例生成2D sEMG信号，并分析CNN感受野大小与信号尺寸的关系，实验验证不同参数组合对分类性能的影响。
AI.result: 当窗口重叠达75%时，CNN分类准确率提升9.49%，F1分数提升23.33%；同时网络性能随感受野（卷积核）尺寸增大而提高。
AI.conclusion: 75%重叠的2D sEMG信号结合更宽的卷积核可优化CNN性能，为基于sEMG的假肢控制提供理想参数配置方案。

search_text: Analyzing the Impact of Varied Window Hyper-parameters on Deep CNN for sEMG based Motion Intent Classification 分析不同窗口超参数对基于 sEMG 的运动意图分类的深度 CNN 的影响 The use of deep neural networks in electromyogram (EMG) based prostheses control provides a promising alternative to the hand-crafted features by automatically learning muscle activation patterns from the EMG signals. Meanwhile, the use of raw EMG signals as input to convolution neural networks (CNN) offers a simple, fast, and ideal scheme for effective control of prostheses. Therefore, this study investigates the relationship between window length and overlap, which may influence the generation of robust raw EMG 2-dimensional (2D) signals for application in CNN. And a rule of thumb for a proper combination of these parameters that could guarantee optimal network performance was derived. Moreover, we investigate the relationship between the CNN receptive window size and the raw EMG signal size. Experimental results show that the performance of the CNN increases with the increase in overlap within the generated signals, with the highest improvement of 9.49% accuracy and 23.33% F1-score realized when the overlap is 75% of the window length. Similarly, the network performance increases with the increase in receptive window (kernel) size. Findings from this study suggest that a combination of 75% overlap in 2D EMG signals and wider network kernels may provide ideal motor intents classification for adequate EMG-CNN based prostheses control scheme. 在基于肌电图 (EMG) 的假肢控制中使用深度神经网络，通过从肌电图信号中自动学习肌肉激活模式，为手工制作的特征提供了一种有前途的替代方案。同时，使用原始肌电信号作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的输入为有效控制假肢提供了一种简单、快速且理想的方案。因此，本研究研究了窗口长度和重叠之间的关系，这可能会影响 CNN 中应用的鲁棒原始 EMG 二维 (2D) 信号的生成。并得出了正确组合这些参数以保证最佳网络性能的经验法则。此外，我们研究了 CNN 接收窗口大小和原始 EMG 信号大小之间的关系。实验结果表明，CNN 的性能随着生成信号内重叠的增加而提高，当重叠为窗口长度的 75% 时，准确率最高提高 9.49%，F1 分数达到 23.33%。同样，网络性能随着接收窗口（内核）大小的增加而增加。这项研究的结果表明，2D EMG 信号中 75% 的重叠和更宽的网络内核的组合可以为基于 EMG-CNN 的适当假肢控制方案提供理想的运动意图分类。 本文研究了不同窗口超参数对基于表面肌电图(sEMG)运动意图分类的深度卷积神经网络(CNN)性能的影响。 Frank Kulwa,Oluwarotimi Williams Samuel,Mojisola Grace Asogbon,Olumide Olayinka Obe,Guanglin Li cs.CV

authors_text: Giulio Schiavi,Paula Wulkop,Giuseppe Rizzi,Lionel Ott,Roland Siegwart,Jen Jen Chung
title: Learning Agent-Aware Affordances for Closed-Loop Interaction with Articulated Objects
title_zh: 学习与铰接对象闭环交互的代理感知功能可供性
comment: First two authors contributed equally. ICRA 2023. Project page: https://paulawulkop.github.io/agent_aware_affordances
comments: First two authors contributed equally. ICRA 2023. Project page: https://paulawulkop.github.io/agent_aware_affordances
abstract: Interactions with articulated objects are a challenging but important task for mobile robots. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel closed-loop control pipeline, which integrates manipulation priors from affordance estimation with sampling-based whole-body control. We introduce the concept of agent-aware affordances which fully reflect the agent's capabilities and embodiment and we show that they outperform their state-of-the-art counterparts which are only conditioned on the end-effector geometry. Additionally, closed-loop affordance inference is found to allow the agent to divide a task into multiple non-continuous motions and recover from failure and unexpected states. Finally, the pipeline is able to perform long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks, i.e. opening and closing an oven, in the real world with high success rates (opening: 71%, closing: 72%).
summary: Interactions with articulated objects are a challenging but important task for mobile robots. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel closed-loop control pipeline, which integrates manipulation priors from affordance estimation with sampling-based whole-body control. We introduce the concept of agent-aware affordances which fully reflect the agent's capabilities and embodiment and we show that they outperform their state-of-the-art counterparts which are only conditioned on the end-effector geometry. Additionally, closed-loop affordance inference is found to allow the agent to divide a task into multiple non-continuous motions and recover from failure and unexpected states. Finally, the pipeline is able to perform long-horizon mobile manipulation tasks, i.e. opening and closing an oven, in the real world with high success rates (opening: 71%, closing: 72%).
abstract_zh: 对于移动机器人来说，与铰接物体的交互是一项具有挑战性但又重要的任务。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的闭环控制管道，它将来自可供性估计的操作先验与基于采样的全身控制相结合。我们引入了代理感知功能可供性的概念，它充分反映了代理的能力和体现，并且我们表明它们优于仅以末端执行器几何形状为条件的最先进的同行。此外，还发现闭环可供性推理允许代理将任务划分为多个非连续运动，并从失败和意外状态中恢复。最后，该管道能够在现实世界中执行长视野移动操作任务，即打开和关闭烤箱，成功率很高（打开：71％，关闭：72％）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种闭环控制方法，使移动机器人能够通过考虑自身能力的可操作性估计，与可移动物体进行有效交互。
AI.motivation: 与可移动物体的交互对移动机器人具有挑战性，现有方法依赖末端执行器几何的可操作性估计，难以适应复杂任务和失败恢复。
AI.method: 集成基于可操作性估计的操作先验与全身控制，引入考虑机器人自身能力的agent-aware可操作性，并通过闭环推断实现任务分解与失败恢复。
AI.result: 在真实世界中成功完成烤箱开合任务，成功率分别为71%（打开）和72%（关闭）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合机器人自身特性的可操作性估计与闭环控制，有效提升了复杂移动操作任务的成功率与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yingshu Chen,Tuan-Anh Vu,Ka-Chun Shum,Binh-Son Hua,Sai-Kit Yeung
title: Time-of-Day Neural Style Transfer for Architectural Photographs
title_zh: 建筑照片的时间神经风格迁移
comment: Updated version with corrected equations. Paper published at the International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP) 2022. 12 pages of content with 6 pages of supplementary materials
comments: Updated version with corrected equations. Paper published at the International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP) 2022. 12 pages of content with 6 pages of supplementary materials
abstract: Architectural photography is a genre of photography that focuses on capturing a building or structure in the foreground with dramatic lighting in the background. Inspired by recent successes in image-to-image translation methods, we aim to perform style transfer for architectural photographs. However, the special composition in architectural photography poses great challenges for style transfer in this type of photographs. Existing neural style transfer methods treat the architectural images as a single entity, which would generate mismatched chrominance and destroy geometric features of the original architecture, yielding unrealistic lighting, wrong color rendition, and visual artifacts such as ghosting, appearance distortion, or color mismatching. In this paper, we specialize a neural style transfer method for architectural photography. Our method addresses the composition of the foreground and background in an architectural photograph in a two-branch neural network that separately considers the style transfer of the foreground and the background, respectively. Our method comprises a segmentation module, a learning-based image-to-image translation module, and an image blending optimization module. We trained our image-to-image translation neural network with a new dataset of unconstrained outdoor architectural photographs captured at different magic times of a day, utilizing additional semantic information for better chrominance matching and geometry preservation. Our experiments show that our method can produce photorealistic lighting and color rendition on both the foreground and background, and outperforms general image-to-image translation and arbitrary style transfer baselines quantitatively and qualitatively. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hkust-vgd/architectural_style_transfer.
summary: Architectural photography is a genre of photography that focuses on capturing a building or structure in the foreground with dramatic lighting in the background. Inspired by recent successes in image-to-image translation methods, we aim to perform style transfer for architectural photographs. However, the special composition in architectural photography poses great challenges for style transfer in this type of photographs. Existing neural style transfer methods treat the architectural images as a single entity, which would generate mismatched chrominance and destroy geometric features of the original architecture, yielding unrealistic lighting, wrong color rendition, and visual artifacts such as ghosting, appearance distortion, or color mismatching. In this paper, we specialize a neural style transfer method for architectural photography. Our method addresses the composition of the foreground and background in an architectural photograph in a two-branch neural network that separately considers the style transfer of the foreground and the background, respectively. Our method comprises a segmentation module, a learning-based image-to-image translation module, and an image blending optimization module. We trained our image-to-image translation neural network with a new dataset of unconstrained outdoor architectural photographs captured at different magic times of a day, utilizing additional semantic information for better chrominance matching and geometry preservation. Our experiments show that our method can produce photorealistic lighting and color rendition on both the foreground and background, and outperforms general image-to-image translation and arbitrary style transfer baselines quantitatively and qualitatively. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hkust-vgd/architectural_style_transfer.
abstract_zh: 建筑摄影是一种摄影类型，专注于捕捉前景中的建筑物或结构，背景中的戏剧性灯光。受到图像到图像转换方法最近成功的启发，我们的目标是对建筑照片进行风格转换。然而，建筑摄影的特殊构图对此类照片的风格转换提出了巨大的挑战。现有的神经风格迁移方法将建筑图像视为单个实体，这会产生不匹配的色度并破坏原始建筑的几何特征，产生不切实际的照明、错误的色彩再现以及重影、外观扭曲或颜色不匹配等视觉伪影。在本文中，我们专门研究了建筑摄影的神经风格迁移方法。我们的方法在两分支神经网络中解决建筑照片中前景和背景的组成问题，该网络分别考虑前景和背景的风格迁移。我们的方法包括分割模块、基于学习的图像到图像翻译模块和图像混合优化模块。我们使用在一天中不同神奇时间拍摄的无约束户外建筑照片的新数据集来训练图像到图像转换神经网络，利用额外的语义信息来实现更好的色度匹配和几何保存。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以在前景和背景上产生照片级真实感照明和色彩再现，并且在定量和定性上优于一般图像到图像转换和任意风格转移基线。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/hkust-vgd/architectural_style_transfer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对建筑摄影的时域神经风格迁移方法，解决现有方法在处理建筑照片时出现的颜色失真和几何特征破坏问题。
AI.motivation: 建筑摄影具有前景结构与背景光影的特殊构图，现有神经风格迁移方法将其视为整体处理，导致色度不匹配、几何特征丢失及视觉伪影等问题。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络分别处理前景与背景，包含分割模块、基于学习的图像翻译模块和图像融合优化模块，并利用不同时间段的建筑照片数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在前景与背景的光照和色彩还原上均优于通用图像翻译和任意风格迁移基线，定性和定量结果均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离处理建筑照片的前景与背景，有效解决了风格迁移中的色度匹配与几何保持问题，实现了更逼真的视觉效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种针对建筑摄影的时域神经风格迁移方法，解决现有方法在处理建筑照片时出现的颜色失真和几何特征破坏问题。

search_text: Time-of-Day Neural Style Transfer for Architectural Photographs 建筑照片的时间神经风格迁移 Architectural photography is a genre of photography that focuses on capturing a building or structure in the foreground with dramatic lighting in the background. Inspired by recent successes in image-to-image translation methods, we aim to perform style transfer for architectural photographs. However, the special composition in architectural photography poses great challenges for style transfer in this type of photographs. Existing neural style transfer methods treat the architectural images as a single entity, which would generate mismatched chrominance and destroy geometric features of the original architecture, yielding unrealistic lighting, wrong color rendition, and visual artifacts such as ghosting, appearance distortion, or color mismatching. In this paper, we specialize a neural style transfer method for architectural photography. Our method addresses the composition of the foreground and background in an architectural photograph in a two-branch neural network that separately considers the style transfer of the foreground and the background, respectively. Our method comprises a segmentation module, a learning-based image-to-image translation module, and an image blending optimization module. We trained our image-to-image translation neural network with a new dataset of unconstrained outdoor architectural photographs captured at different magic times of a day, utilizing additional semantic information for better chrominance matching and geometry preservation. Our experiments show that our method can produce photorealistic lighting and color rendition on both the foreground and background, and outperforms general image-to-image translation and arbitrary style transfer baselines quantitatively and qualitatively. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hkust-vgd/architectural_style_transfer. 建筑摄影是一种摄影类型，专注于捕捉前景中的建筑物或结构，背景中的戏剧性灯光。受到图像到图像转换方法最近成功的启发，我们的目标是对建筑照片进行风格转换。然而，建筑摄影的特殊构图对此类照片的风格转换提出了巨大的挑战。现有的神经风格迁移方法将建筑图像视为单个实体，这会产生不匹配的色度并破坏原始建筑的几何特征，产生不切实际的照明、错误的色彩再现以及重影、外观扭曲或颜色不匹配等视觉伪影。在本文中，我们专门研究了建筑摄影的神经风格迁移方法。我们的方法在两分支神经网络中解决建筑照片中前景和背景的组成问题，该网络分别考虑前景和背景的风格迁移。我们的方法包括分割模块、基于学习的图像到图像翻译模块和图像混合优化模块。我们使用在一天中不同神奇时间拍摄的无约束户外建筑照片的新数据集来训练图像到图像转换神经网络，利用额外的语义信息来实现更好的色度匹配和几何保存。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以在前景和背景上产生照片级真实感照明和色彩再现，并且在定量和定性上优于一般图像到图像转换和任意风格转移基线。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/hkust-vgd/architectural_style_transfer 获取。 本文提出一种针对建筑摄影的时域神经风格迁移方法，解决现有方法在处理建筑照片时出现的颜色失真和几何特征破坏问题。 Yingshu Chen,Tuan-Anh Vu,Ka-Chun Shum,Binh-Son Hua,Sai-Kit Yeung cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.MM

authors_text: Adrià Luque,David Parent,Adrià Colomé,Carlos Ocampo-Martinez,Carme Torras
title: Model Predictive Control for Dynamic Cloth Manipulation: Parameter Learning and Experimental Validation
title_zh: 动态布料操纵的模型预测控制：参数学习和实验验证
abstract: Robotic cloth manipulation is a relevant challenging problem for autonomous robotic systems. Highly deformable objects as textile items can adopt multiple configurations and shapes during their manipulation. Hence, robots should not only understand the current cloth configuration but also be able to predict the future possible behaviors of the cloth. This paper addresses the problem of indirectly controlling the configuration of certain points of a textile object, by applying actions on other parts of the object through the use of a Model Predictive Control (MPC) strategy, which also allows to foresee the behavior of indirectly controlled points. The designed controller finds the optimal control signals to attain the desired future target configuration. The explored scenario in this paper considers tracking a reference trajectory with the lower corners of a square piece of cloth by grasping its upper corners. To do so, we propose and validate a linear cloth model that allows solving the MPC-related optimization problem in real time. Reinforcement Learning (RL) techniques are used to learn the optimal parameters of the proposed cloth model and also to tune the resulting MPC. After obtaining accurate tracking results in simulation, the full control scheme was implemented and executed in a real robot, obtaining accurate tracking even in adverse conditions. While total observed errors reach the 5 cm mark, for a 30x30 cm cloth, an analysis shows the MPC contributes less than 30% to that value.
summary: Robotic cloth manipulation is a relevant challenging problem for autonomous robotic systems. Highly deformable objects as textile items can adopt multiple configurations and shapes during their manipulation. Hence, robots should not only understand the current cloth configuration but also be able to predict the future possible behaviors of the cloth. This paper addresses the problem of indirectly controlling the configuration of certain points of a textile object, by applying actions on other parts of the object through the use of a Model Predictive Control (MPC) strategy, which also allows to foresee the behavior of indirectly controlled points. The designed controller finds the optimal control signals to attain the desired future target configuration. The explored scenario in this paper considers tracking a reference trajectory with the lower corners of a square piece of cloth by grasping its upper corners. To do so, we propose and validate a linear cloth model that allows solving the MPC-related optimization problem in real time. Reinforcement Learning (RL) techniques are used to learn the optimal parameters of the proposed cloth model and also to tune the resulting MPC. After obtaining accurate tracking results in simulation, the full control scheme was implemented and executed in a real robot, obtaining accurate tracking even in adverse conditions. While total observed errors reach the 5 cm mark, for a 30x30 cm cloth, an analysis shows the MPC contributes less than 30% to that value.
abstract_zh: 机器人布料操作对于自主机器人系统来说是一个相关的挑战性问题。像纺织品这样高度变形的物体在操作过程中可以采用多种配置和形状。因此，机器人不仅应该了解当前的布料配置，还应该能够预测布料未来可能的行为。本文解决了通过使用模型预测控制（MPC）策略对对象的其他部分应用动作来间接控制纺织对象的某些点的配置的问题，该策略还允许预见间接控制点的行为。设计的控制器找到最佳控制信号以获得所需的未来目标配置。本文探索的场景考虑通过抓住一块正方形布的上角来跟踪其下角的参考轨迹。为此，我们提出并验证了一个线性布料模型，该模型允许实时解决与 MPC 相关的优化问题。强化学习 (RL) 技术用于学习所提出的布料模型的最佳参数，并调整生成的 MPC。在仿真中获得准确的跟踪结果后，在真实的机器人中实现并执行完整的控制方案，即使在不利的条件下也能获得准确的跟踪。虽然观察到的总误差达到 5 厘米，但对于 30x30 厘米的布料，分析显示 MPC 对该值的贡献不到 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）和强化学习的动态布料操控方法，通过参数学习和实验验证实现对布料的间接控制。
AI.motivation: 布料等高度变形物体的操控对自主机器人系统具有挑战性，需同时理解当前状态并预测未来行为，传统方法难以满足实时性和精度要求。
AI.method: 设计MPC控制器通过抓取布料上部角落间接控制下部角落轨迹，结合线性布料模型实现实时优化，并利用强化学习学习模型参数及调优MPC策略。
AI.result: 仿真与真实机器人实验均实现高精度轨迹跟踪，30x30cm布料总误差达5cm时，MPC贡献误差低于30%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了MPC与强化学习结合在动态布料操控中的有效性，为复杂变形物体控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Hadi M. Dolatabadi,Sarah Erfani,Christopher Leckie
title: Adversarial Coreset Selection for Efficient Robust Training
title_zh: 用于高效稳健训练的对抗性核心集选择
comment: Accepted to the International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). Extended version of the ECCV2022 paper: arXiv:2112.00378. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.00378
comments: Accepted to the International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV). Extended version of the ECCV2022 paper: arXiv:2112.00378. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.00378
abstract: Neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding well-crafted, imperceptible perturbations to their input can modify their output. Adversarial training is one of the most effective approaches to training robust models against such attacks. Unfortunately, this method is much slower than vanilla training of neural networks since it needs to construct adversarial examples for the entire training data at every iteration. By leveraging the theory of coreset selection, we show how selecting a small subset of training data provides a principled approach to reducing the time complexity of robust training. To this end, we first provide convergence guarantees for adversarial coreset selection. In particular, we show that the convergence bound is directly related to how well our coresets can approximate the gradient computed over the entire training data. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we propose using this gradient approximation error as our adversarial coreset selection objective to reduce the training set size effectively. Once built, we run adversarial training over this subset of the training data. Unlike existing methods, our approach can be adapted to a wide variety of training objectives, including TRADES, $\ell_p$-PGD, and Perceptual Adversarial Training. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that our approach speeds up adversarial training by 2-3 times while experiencing a slight degradation in the clean and robust accuracy.
summary: Neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding well-crafted, imperceptible perturbations to their input can modify their output. Adversarial training is one of the most effective approaches to training robust models against such attacks. Unfortunately, this method is much slower than vanilla training of neural networks since it needs to construct adversarial examples for the entire training data at every iteration. By leveraging the theory of coreset selection, we show how selecting a small subset of training data provides a principled approach to reducing the time complexity of robust training. To this end, we first provide convergence guarantees for adversarial coreset selection. In particular, we show that the convergence bound is directly related to how well our coresets can approximate the gradient computed over the entire training data. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we propose using this gradient approximation error as our adversarial coreset selection objective to reduce the training set size effectively. Once built, we run adversarial training over this subset of the training data. Unlike existing methods, our approach can be adapted to a wide variety of training objectives, including TRADES, $\ell_p$-PGD, and Perceptual Adversarial Training. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that our approach speeds up adversarial training by 2-3 times while experiencing a slight degradation in the clean and robust accuracy.
abstract_zh: 神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击：在其输入中添加精心设计的、难以察觉的扰动可以修改其输出。对抗性训练是训练针对此类攻击的稳健模型的最有效方法之一。不幸的是，这种方法比神经网络的普通训练慢得多，因为它需要在每次迭代时为整个训练数据构建对抗性示例。通过利用核心集选择理论，我们展示了选择一小部分训练数据如何提供一种原则性方法来降低稳健训练的时间复杂度。为此，我们首先为对抗性核心集选择提供收敛保证。特别是，我们表明收敛界限与我们的核心集对整个训练数据计算的梯度的近似程度直接相关。在我们的理论分析的推动下，我们建议使用这种梯度近似误差作为我们的对抗性核心集选择目标，以有效地减少训练集大小。一旦构建完成，我们就对这部分训练数据进行对抗性训练。与现有方法不同，我们的方法可以适应各种训练目标，包括 TRADES、$\ell_p$-PGD 和感知对抗训练。我们进行了大量的实验来证明我们的方法可以将对抗性训练速度提高 2-3 倍，同时干净和鲁棒的准确性略有下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性核心集选择方法，通过选取训练数据的子集来加速鲁棒训练过程。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽有效但计算成本高，需为全部训练数据生成对抗样本，导致训练速度显著下降。
AI.method: 基于核心集选择理论，通过收敛性保证将梯度近似误差作为选择目标，构建小型训练子集并进行对抗训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持模型鲁棒性的同时，将对抗训练速度提升2-3倍，仅略微降低干净数据和对抗样本的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多种训练目标提供通用解决方案，在效率与鲁棒性之间取得平衡，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性核心集选择方法，通过选取训练数据的子集来加速鲁棒训练过程。
ai_content.motivation: 对抗训练虽有效但计算成本高，需为全部训练数据生成对抗样本，导致训练速度显著下降。
ai_content.method: 基于核心集选择理论，通过收敛性保证将梯度近似误差作为选择目标，构建小型训练子集并进行对抗训练。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在保持模型鲁棒性的同时，将对抗训练速度提升2-3倍，仅略微降低干净数据和对抗样本的准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为多种训练目标提供通用解决方案，在效率与鲁棒性之间取得平衡，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Adversarial Coreset Selection for Efficient Robust Training 用于高效稳健训练的对抗性核心集选择 Neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding well-crafted, imperceptible perturbations to their input can modify their output. Adversarial training is one of the most effective approaches to training robust models against such attacks. Unfortunately, this method is much slower than vanilla training of neural networks since it needs to construct adversarial examples for the entire training data at every iteration. By leveraging the theory of coreset selection, we show how selecting a small subset of training data provides a principled approach to reducing the time complexity of robust training. To this end, we first provide convergence guarantees for adversarial coreset selection. In particular, we show that the convergence bound is directly related to how well our coresets can approximate the gradient computed over the entire training data. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we propose using this gradient approximation error as our adversarial coreset selection objective to reduce the training set size effectively. Once built, we run adversarial training over this subset of the training data. Unlike existing methods, our approach can be adapted to a wide variety of training objectives, including TRADES, $\ell_p$-PGD, and Perceptual Adversarial Training. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that our approach speeds up adversarial training by 2-3 times while experiencing a slight degradation in the clean and robust accuracy. 神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击：在其输入中添加精心设计的、难以察觉的扰动可以修改其输出。对抗性训练是训练针对此类攻击的稳健模型的最有效方法之一。不幸的是，这种方法比神经网络的普通训练慢得多，因为它需要在每次迭代时为整个训练数据构建对抗性示例。通过利用核心集选择理论，我们展示了选择一小部分训练数据如何提供一种原则性方法来降低稳健训练的时间复杂度。为此，我们首先为对抗性核心集选择提供收敛保证。特别是，我们表明收敛界限与我们的核心集对整个训练数据计算的梯度的近似程度直接相关。在我们的理论分析的推动下，我们建议使用这种梯度近似误差作为我们的对抗性核心集选择目标，以有效地减少训练集大小。一旦构建完成，我们就对这部分训练数据进行对抗性训练。与现有方法不同，我们的方法可以适应各种训练目标，包括 TRADES、$\ell_p$-PGD 和感知对抗训练。我们进行了大量的实验来证明我们的方法可以将对抗性训练速度提高 2-3 倍，同时干净和鲁棒的准确性略有下降。 本文提出一种对抗性核心集选择方法，通过选取训练数据的子集来加速鲁棒训练过程。 Hadi M. Dolatabadi,Sarah Erfani,Christopher Leckie cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Cordier,Victor Bouvier,Gilles Hénaff,Céline Hudelot
title: Test-Time Adaptation with Principal Component Analysis
title_zh: 通过主成分分析进行测试时间调整
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, accepted at Workshop on Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence in conjunction with ECML/PKDD 22
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, accepted at Workshop on Trustworthy Artificial Intelligence in conjunction with ECML/PKDD 22
abstract: Machine Learning models are prone to fail when test data are different from training data, a situation often encountered in real applications known as distribution shift. While still valid, the training-time knowledge becomes less effective, requiring a test-time adaptation to maintain high performance. Following approaches that assume batch-norm layer and use their statistics for adaptation, we propose a Test-Time Adaptation with Principal Component Analysis (TTAwPCA), which presumes a fitted PCA and adapts at test time a spectral filter based on the singular values of the PCA for robustness to corruptions. TTAwPCA combines three components: the output of a given layer is decomposed using a Principal Component Analysis (PCA), filtered by a penalization of its singular values, and reconstructed with the PCA inverse transform. This generic enhancement adds fewer parameters than current methods. Experiments on CIFAR-10-C and CIFAR- 100-C demonstrate the effectiveness and limits of our method using a unique filter of 2000 parameters.
summary: Machine Learning models are prone to fail when test data are different from training data, a situation often encountered in real applications known as distribution shift. While still valid, the training-time knowledge becomes less effective, requiring a test-time adaptation to maintain high performance. Following approaches that assume batch-norm layer and use their statistics for adaptation, we propose a Test-Time Adaptation with Principal Component Analysis (TTAwPCA), which presumes a fitted PCA and adapts at test time a spectral filter based on the singular values of the PCA for robustness to corruptions. TTAwPCA combines three components: the output of a given layer is decomposed using a Principal Component Analysis (PCA), filtered by a penalization of its singular values, and reconstructed with the PCA inverse transform. This generic enhancement adds fewer parameters than current methods. Experiments on CIFAR-10-C and CIFAR- 100-C demonstrate the effectiveness and limits of our method using a unique filter of 2000 parameters.
abstract_zh: 当测试数据与训练数据不同时，机器学习模型很容易失败，这种情况在实际应用中经常遇到，称为分布偏移。虽然仍然有效，但训练时的知识变得不太有效，需要在测试时进行调整以保持高性能。按照假设批量归一化层并使用其统计数据进行适应的方法，我们提出了一种主成分分析的测试时适应（TTAwPCA），它假设一个拟合的 PCA 并在测试时根据 PCA 的奇异值调整频谱滤波器，以实现对损坏的鲁棒性。 TTAwPCA 结合了三个组件：使用主成分分析 (PCA) 分解给定层的输出，通过其奇异值的惩罚进行过滤，并使用 PCA 逆变换进行重建。这种通用增强功能比当前方法添加的参数更少。 CIFAR-10-C 和 CIFAR-100-C 上的实验证明了我们使用 2000 个参数的独特过滤器的方法的有效性和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主成分分析的测试时适应方法（TTAwPCA），通过调整谱滤波器增强模型对分布偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法依赖批归一化统计信息，参数较多且泛化能力有限，需更简洁有效的适应策略应对分布偏移问题。
AI.method: TTAwPCA通过PCA分解网络层输出，利用奇异值惩罚机制过滤噪声，再结合PCA逆变换重构特征，仅引入2000参数实现适应。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-C和CIFAR-100-C数据集上验证了方法有效性，但对特定类型数据损坏的鲁棒性存在局限。
AI.conclusion: TTAwPCA提供了一种参数高效且通用的测试时适应框架，但需进一步优化以提升复杂场景下的适应能力。

authors_text: Sven Koehler,Tarique Hussain,Hamza Hussain,Daniel Young,Samir Sarikouch,Thomas Pickhardt,Gerald Greil,Sandy Engelhardt
title: Self-supervised motion descriptor for cardiac phase detection in 4D CMR based on discrete vector field estimations
title_zh: 基于离散矢量场估计的 4D CMR 心脏相位检测的自监督运动描述符
comment: accepted for the STACOM2022 workshop @ MICCAI2022
comments: accepted for the STACOM2022 workshop @ MICCAI2022
abstract: Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) sequences visualise the cardiac function voxel-wise over time. Simultaneously, deep learning-based deformable image registration is able to estimate discrete vector fields which warp one time step of a CMR sequence to the following in a self-supervised manner. However, despite the rich source of information included in these 3D+t vector fields, a standardised interpretation is challenging and the clinical applications remain limited so far. In this work, we show how to efficiently use a deformable vector field to describe the underlying dynamic process of a cardiac cycle in form of a derived 1D motion descriptor. Additionally, based on the expected cardiovascular physiological properties of a contracting or relaxing ventricle, we define a set of rules that enables the identification of five cardiovascular phases including the end-systole (ES) and end-diastole (ED) without the usage of labels. We evaluate the plausibility of the motion descriptor on two challenging multi-disease, -center, -scanner short-axis CMR datasets. First, by reporting quantitative measures such as the periodic frame difference for the extracted phases. Second, by comparing qualitatively the general pattern when we temporally resample and align the motion descriptors of all instances across both datasets. The average periodic frame difference for the ED, ES key phases of our approach is $0.80\pm{0.85}$, $0.69\pm{0.79}$ which is slightly better than the inter-observer variability ($1.07\pm{0.86}$, $0.91\pm{1.6}$) and the supervised baseline method ($1.18\pm{1.91}$, $1.21\pm{1.78}$). Code and labels will be made available on our GitHub repository. https://github.com/Cardio-AI/cmr-phase-detection
summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) sequences visualise the cardiac function voxel-wise over time. Simultaneously, deep learning-based deformable image registration is able to estimate discrete vector fields which warp one time step of a CMR sequence to the following in a self-supervised manner. However, despite the rich source of information included in these 3D+t vector fields, a standardised interpretation is challenging and the clinical applications remain limited so far. In this work, we show how to efficiently use a deformable vector field to describe the underlying dynamic process of a cardiac cycle in form of a derived 1D motion descriptor. Additionally, based on the expected cardiovascular physiological properties of a contracting or relaxing ventricle, we define a set of rules that enables the identification of five cardiovascular phases including the end-systole (ES) and end-diastole (ED) without the usage of labels. We evaluate the plausibility of the motion descriptor on two challenging multi-disease, -center, -scanner short-axis CMR datasets. First, by reporting quantitative measures such as the periodic frame difference for the extracted phases. Second, by comparing qualitatively the general pattern when we temporally resample and align the motion descriptors of all instances across both datasets. The average periodic frame difference for the ED, ES key phases of our approach is $0.80\pm{0.85}$, $0.69\pm{0.79}$ which is slightly better than the inter-observer variability ($1.07\pm{0.86}$, $0.91\pm{1.6}$) and the supervised baseline method ($1.18\pm{1.91}$, $1.21\pm{1.78}$). Code and labels will be made available on our GitHub repository. https://github.com/Cardio-AI/cmr-phase-detection
abstract_zh: 心脏磁共振 (CMR) 序列可随时间以体素方式可视化心脏功能。同时，基于深度学习的可变形图像配准能够估计离散矢量场，这些矢量场以自监督的方式将 CMR 序列的一个时间步扭曲为以下时间步。然而，尽管这些 3D+t 矢量场包含丰富的信息源，但标准化解释具有挑战性，并且迄今为止临床应用仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何有效地使用可变形矢量场以导出的一维运动描述符的形式描述心动周期的底层动态过程。此外，根据收缩或舒张心室的预期心血管生理特性，我们定义了一组规则，无需使用标签即可识别五个心血管阶段，包括收缩末期 (ES) 和舒张末期 (ED)。我们评估了运动描述符在两个具有挑战性的多疾病、中心、扫描仪短轴 CMR 数据集上的合理性。首先，通过报告定量测量，例如提取相位的周期帧差异。其次，通过定性比较我们在时间上重新采样并对齐两个数据集中所有实例的运动描述符时的一般模式。我们方法的 ED、ES 关键阶段的平均周期帧差异为 $0.80\pm{0.85}$、$0.69\pm{0.79}$，略好于观察者间变异性（$1.07\pm{0.86}$、$0.91\pm{1.6}$）和监督基线方法（$1.18\pm{1.91}$， $1.21\pm{1.78}$)。代码和标签将在我们的 GitHub 存储库上提供。 https://github.com/Cardio-AI/cmr-phase-detection

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散向量场估计的自监督运动描述符，用于4D心脏磁共振成像（CMR）中的心脏相位检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管变形向量场包含丰富的动态信息，但其标准化解释困难且临床应用有限，需开发无需标签的相位检测方法。
AI.method: 通过变形向量场生成1D运动描述符，并基于心脏生理特性定义规则，识别包括收缩末期（ES）和舒张末期（ED）在内的五个相位。
AI.result: 在两个多疾病、多中心数据集上验证，ED和ES的关键帧差异分别为0.80±0.85和0.69±0.79，优于人工观察者差异和监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需标签即可实现高精度心脏相位检测，为临床应用提供了可行的自监督解决方案。

result: 在两个多疾病、多中心数据集上验证，ED和ES的关键帧差异分别为0.80±0.85和0.69±0.79，优于人工观察者差异和监督基线方法。
conclusion: 该方法无需标签即可实现高精度心脏相位检测，为临床应用提供了可行的自监督解决方案。
search_text: Self-supervised motion descriptor for cardiac phase detection in 4D CMR based on discrete vector field estimations 基于离散矢量场估计的 4D CMR 心脏相位检测的自监督运动描述符 Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) sequences visualise the cardiac function voxel-wise over time. Simultaneously, deep learning-based deformable image registration is able to estimate discrete vector fields which warp one time step of a CMR sequence to the following in a self-supervised manner. However, despite the rich source of information included in these 3D+t vector fields, a standardised interpretation is challenging and the clinical applications remain limited so far. In this work, we show how to efficiently use a deformable vector field to describe the underlying dynamic process of a cardiac cycle in form of a derived 1D motion descriptor. Additionally, based on the expected cardiovascular physiological properties of a contracting or relaxing ventricle, we define a set of rules that enables the identification of five cardiovascular phases including the end-systole (ES) and end-diastole (ED) without the usage of labels. We evaluate the plausibility of the motion descriptor on two challenging multi-disease, -center, -scanner short-axis CMR datasets. First, by reporting quantitative measures such as the periodic frame difference for the extracted phases. Second, by comparing qualitatively the general pattern when we temporally resample and align the motion descriptors of all instances across both datasets. The average periodic frame difference for the ED, ES key phases of our approach is $0.80\pm{0.85}$, $0.69\pm{0.79}$ which is slightly better than the inter-observer variability ($1.07\pm{0.86}$, $0.91\pm{1.6}$) and the supervised baseline method ($1.18\pm{1.91}$, $1.21\pm{1.78}$). Code and labels will be made available on our GitHub repository. https://github.com/Cardio-AI/cmr-phase-detection 心脏磁共振 (CMR) 序列可随时间以体素方式可视化心脏功能。同时，基于深度学习的可变形图像配准能够估计离散矢量场，这些矢量场以自监督的方式将 CMR 序列的一个时间步扭曲为以下时间步。然而，尽管这些 3D+t 矢量场包含丰富的信息源，但标准化解释具有挑战性，并且迄今为止临床应用仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何有效地使用可变形矢量场以导出的一维运动描述符的形式描述心动周期的底层动态过程。此外，根据收缩或舒张心室的预期心血管生理特性，我们定义了一组规则，无需使用标签即可识别五个心血管阶段，包括收缩末期 (ES) 和舒张末期 (ED)。我们评估了运动描述符在两个具有挑战性的多疾病、中心、扫描仪短轴 CMR 数据集上的合理性。首先，通过报告定量测量，例如提取相位的周期帧差异。其次，通过定性比较我们在时间上重新采样并对齐两个数据集中所有实例的运动描述符时的一般模式。我们方法的 ED、ES 关键阶段的平均周期帧差异为 $0.80\pm{0.85}$、$0.69\pm{0.79}$，略好于观察者间变异性（$1.07\pm{0.86}$、$0.91\pm{1.6}$）和监督基线方法（$1.18\pm{1.91}$， $1.21\pm{1.78}$)。代码和标签将在我们的 GitHub 存储库上提供。 https://github.com/Cardio-AI/cmr-phase-detection 本文提出一种基于离散向量场估计的自监督运动描述符，用于4D心脏磁共振成像（CMR）中的心脏相位检测。 Sven Koehler,Tarique Hussain,Hamza Hussain,Daniel Young,Samir Sarikouch,Thomas Pickhardt,Gerald Greil,Sandy Engelhardt cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Alzayat Saleh,David Jones,Dean Jerry,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
title: A lightweight Transformer-based model for fish landmark detection
title_zh: 一种基于 Transformer 的轻量级鱼类地标检测模型
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to the Computers and Electronics in Agriculture journal
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to the Computers and Electronics in Agriculture journal
abstract: Transformer-based models, such as the Vision Transformer (ViT), can outperform onvolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in some vision tasks when there is sufficient training data. However, (CNNs) have a strong and useful inductive bias for vision tasks (i.e. translation equivariance and locality). In this work, we developed a novel model architecture that we call a Mobile fish landmark detection network (MFLD-net). We have made this model using convolution operations based on ViT (i.e. Patch embeddings, Multi-Layer Perceptrons). MFLD-net can achieve competitive or better results in low data regimes while being lightweight and therefore suitable for embedded and mobile devices. Furthermore, we show that MFLD-net can achieve keypoint (landmark) estimation accuracies on-par or even better than some of the state-of-the-art (CNNs) on a fish image dataset. Additionally, unlike ViT, MFLD-net does not need a pre-trained model and can generalise well when trained on a small dataset. We provide quantitative and qualitative results that demonstrate the model's generalisation capabilities. This work will provide a foundation for future efforts in developing mobile, but efficient fish monitoring systems and devices.
summary: Transformer-based models, such as the Vision Transformer (ViT), can outperform onvolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in some vision tasks when there is sufficient training data. However, (CNNs) have a strong and useful inductive bias for vision tasks (i.e. translation equivariance and locality). In this work, we developed a novel model architecture that we call a Mobile fish landmark detection network (MFLD-net). We have made this model using convolution operations based on ViT (i.e. Patch embeddings, Multi-Layer Perceptrons). MFLD-net can achieve competitive or better results in low data regimes while being lightweight and therefore suitable for embedded and mobile devices. Furthermore, we show that MFLD-net can achieve keypoint (landmark) estimation accuracies on-par or even better than some of the state-of-the-art (CNNs) on a fish image dataset. Additionally, unlike ViT, MFLD-net does not need a pre-trained model and can generalise well when trained on a small dataset. We provide quantitative and qualitative results that demonstrate the model's generalisation capabilities. This work will provide a foundation for future efforts in developing mobile, but efficient fish monitoring systems and devices.
abstract_zh: 当有足够的训练数据时，基于 Transformer 的模型，例如 Vision Transformer (ViT)，在某些视觉任务中可以优于卷积神经网络 (CNN)。然而，（CNN）对于视觉任务有很强且有用的归纳偏差（即平移等方差和局部性）。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的模型架构，称为移动鱼地标检测网络（MFLD-net）。我们使用基于 ViT 的卷积运算（即补丁嵌入、多层感知器）制作了这个模型。 MFLD-net 可以在低数据条件下实现有竞争力或更好的结果，同时重量轻，因此适用于嵌入式和移动设备。此外，我们表明 MFLD-net 可以在鱼类图像数据集上实现与某些最先进的 (CNN) 相当甚至更好的关键点（地标）估计精度。此外，与 ViT 不同，MFLD-net 不需要预先训练的模型，并且在小数据集上训练时可以很好地泛化。我们提供定量和定性结果来证明模型的泛化能力。这项工作将为未来开发移动但高效的鱼类监测系统和设备奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的基于Transformer的鱼类地标检测模型MFLD-net，结合ViT结构与卷积操作，适用于移动设备且在小数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在充足数据下优于CNN，但CNN具有平移等变性等归纳偏置，适合小数据场景。现有模型或需预训练或不适应移动设备，需开发轻量且无需预训练的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于ViT的Patch嵌入和多层感知机，设计卷积操作的MFLD-net架构，无需预训练，通过卷积增强局部特征提取能力以适应小数据训练。
AI.result: MFLD-net在鱼类数据集上达到与先进CNN相当或更优的地标检测精度，且在小数据场景下泛化能力良好，模型轻量化适合嵌入式设备。
AI.conclusion: MFLD-net为开发高效移动鱼类监测系统提供了基础，未来可进一步优化模型结构以提升实际应用中的鲁棒性与效率。

authors_text: Zhenfeng Xue,Jiandang Yang,Jie Ren,Yong Liu
title: Exemplar-Based Image Colorization with A Learning Framework
title_zh: 使用学习框架进行基于示例的图像着色
comment: 17 pages, 12 figures
comments: 17 pages, 12 figures
abstract: Image learning and colorization are hot spots in multimedia domain. Inspired by the learning capability of humans, in this paper, we propose an automatic colorization method with a learning framework. This method can be viewed as a hybrid of exemplar-based and learning-based method, and it decouples the colorization process and learning process so as to generate various color styles for the same gray image. The matching process in the exemplar-based colorization method can be regarded as a parameterized function, and we employ a large amount of color images as the training samples to fit the parameters. During the training process, the color images are the ground truths, and we learn the optimal parameters for the matching process by minimizing the errors in terms of the parameters for the matching function. To deal with images with various compositions, a global feature is introduced, which can be used to classify the images with respect to their compositions, and then learn the optimal matching parameters for each image category individually. What's more, a spatial consistency based post-processing is design to smooth the extracted color information from the reference image to remove matching errors. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the method, and it achieves comparable performance against the state-of-the-art colorization algorithms.
summary: Image learning and colorization are hot spots in multimedia domain. Inspired by the learning capability of humans, in this paper, we propose an automatic colorization method with a learning framework. This method can be viewed as a hybrid of exemplar-based and learning-based method, and it decouples the colorization process and learning process so as to generate various color styles for the same gray image. The matching process in the exemplar-based colorization method can be regarded as a parameterized function, and we employ a large amount of color images as the training samples to fit the parameters. During the training process, the color images are the ground truths, and we learn the optimal parameters for the matching process by minimizing the errors in terms of the parameters for the matching function. To deal with images with various compositions, a global feature is introduced, which can be used to classify the images with respect to their compositions, and then learn the optimal matching parameters for each image category individually. What's more, a spatial consistency based post-processing is design to smooth the extracted color information from the reference image to remove matching errors. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the method, and it achieves comparable performance against the state-of-the-art colorization algorithms.
abstract_zh: 图像学习和着色是多媒体领域的热点。受人类学习能力的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种带有学习框架的自动着色方法。该方法可以看作是基于样本和基于学习的方法的混合，它将着色过程和学习过程解耦，从而为同一灰度图像生成多种颜色风格。基于样本的彩色化方法中的匹配过程可以看作是一个参数化函数，我们采用大量的彩色图像作为训练样本来拟合参数。在训练过程中，彩色图像是基本事实，我们通过最小化匹配函数参数的误差来学习匹配过程的最佳参数。为了处理具有各种成分的图像，引入了全局特征，该特征可用于根据成分对图像进行分类，然后分别学习每个图像类别的最佳匹配参数。此外，设计了基于空间一致性的后处理，以平滑从参考图像中提取的颜色信息，以消除匹配错误。进行了大量的实验来验证该方法的有效性，并且它实现了与最先进的着色算法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合示例学习和机器学习的自动图像着色方法，通过解耦着色与学习过程实现多风格着色。
AI.motivation: 传统示例基着色方法灵活性不足，学习基方法缺乏风格多样性，需融合两者优势以实现更自然的着色效果。
AI.method: 构建参数化匹配函数并用彩色图训练参数，引入全局特征分类图像组成，设计空间一致性后处理优化颜色信息。
AI.result: 实验验证方法在着色质量上达到现有算法水平，能生成多种风格化着色结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效结合示例学习与机器学习优势，为图像着色提供新思路，具有实际应用价值。

To deal with images with various compositions, a global feature is introduced, which can be used to classify the images with respect to their compositions, and then learn the optimal matching parameters for each image category individually. What's more, a spatial consistency based post-processing is design to smooth the extracted color information from the reference image to remove matching errors. Extensive experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of the method, and it achieves comparable performance against the state-of-the-art colorization algorithms. 图像学习和着色是多媒体领域的热点。受人类学习能力的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种带有学习框架的自动着色方法。该方法可以看作是基于样本和基于学习的方法的混合，它将着色过程和学习过程解耦，从而为同一灰度图像生成多种颜色风格。基于样本的彩色化方法中的匹配过程可以看作是一个参数化函数，我们采用大量的彩色图像作为训练样本来拟合参数。在训练过程中，彩色图像是基本事实，我们通过最小化匹配函数参数的误差来学习匹配过程的最佳参数。为了处理具有各种成分的图像，引入了全局特征，该特征可用于根据成分对图像进行分类，然后分别学习每个图像类别的最佳匹配参数。此外，设计了基于空间一致性的后处理，以平滑从参考图像中提取的颜色信息，以消除匹配错误。进行了大量的实验来验证该方法的有效性，并且它实现了与最先进的着色算法相当的性能。 本文提出一种结合示例学习和机器学习的自动图像着色方法，通过解耦着色与学习过程实现多风格着色。 Zhenfeng Xue,Jiandang Yang,Jie Ren,Yong Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Dong Wang,Zhao Zhang,Ziwei Zhao,Yuhang Liu,Yihong Chen,Liwei Wang
title: PointScatter: Point Set Representation for Tubular Structure Extraction
title_zh: PointScatter：管状结构提取的点集表示
comment: ECCV2022 (Oral)
comments: ECCV2022 (Oral)
abstract: This paper explores the point set representation for tubular structure extraction tasks. Compared with the traditional mask representation, the point set representation enjoys its flexibility and representation ability, which would not be restricted by the fixed grid as the mask. Inspired by this, we propose PointScatter, an alternative to the segmentation models for the tubular structure extraction task. PointScatter splits the image into scatter regions and parallelly predicts points for each scatter region. We further propose the greedy-based region-wise bipartite matching algorithm to train the network end-to-end and efficiently. We benchmark the PointScatter on four public tubular datasets, and the extensive experiments on tubular structure segmentation and centerline extraction task demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangzhao2022/pointscatter.
summary: This paper explores the point set representation for tubular structure extraction tasks. Compared with the traditional mask representation, the point set representation enjoys its flexibility and representation ability, which would not be restricted by the fixed grid as the mask. Inspired by this, we propose PointScatter, an alternative to the segmentation models for the tubular structure extraction task. PointScatter splits the image into scatter regions and parallelly predicts points for each scatter region. We further propose the greedy-based region-wise bipartite matching algorithm to train the network end-to-end and efficiently. We benchmark the PointScatter on four public tubular datasets, and the extensive experiments on tubular structure segmentation and centerline extraction task demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangzhao2022/pointscatter.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了管状结构提取任务的点集表示。与传统的掩模表示相比，点集表示具有灵活性和表示能力，不会受到掩模固定网格的限制。受此启发，我们提出了 PointScatter，这是管状结构提取任务的分割模型的替代方案。 PointScatter 将图像分割为散点区域，并并行预测每个散点区域的点。我们进一步提出基于贪婪的区域二分匹配算法来端到端且高效地训练网络。我们在四个公共管状数据集上对 PointScatter 进行了基准测试，并且对管状结构分割和中心线提取任务的广泛实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/zhangzhao2022/pointscatter 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointScatter方法，利用点集表示替代传统掩码表示，用于管状结构的提取任务。
AI.motivation: 传统掩码表示受限于固定网格，灵活性和表达能力不足，而点集表示更具灵活性和表达能力，因此提出PointScatter作为分割模型的替代方案。
AI.method: PointScatter将图像分割为散点区域并并行预测各区域点，提出基于贪心的区域级二分匹配算法进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在四个公开管状数据集上进行基准测试，实验结果表明该方法在管状结构分割和中心线提取任务中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: PointScatter通过点集表示有效解决了管状结构提取任务中的网格限制问题，验证了其作为分割模型替代方案的可行性。

authors_text: Zijie Wang,Aichun Zhu,Jingyi Xue,Xili Wan,Chao Liu,Tian Wang,Yifeng Li
title: CAIBC: Capturing All-round Information Beyond Color for Text-based Person Retrieval
title_zh: CAIBC：捕获除颜色之外的全方位信息以进行基于文本的人物检索
comment: Accepted on ACM MM '22
comments: Accepted on ACM MM '22
abstract: Given a natural language description, text-based person retrieval aims to identify images of a target person from a large-scale person image database. Existing methods generally face a \textbf{color over-reliance problem}, which means that the models rely heavily on color information when matching cross-modal data. Indeed, color information is an important decision-making accordance for retrieval, but the over-reliance on color would distract the model from other key clues (e.g. texture information, structural information, etc.), and thereby lead to a sub-optimal retrieval performance. To solve this problem, in this paper, we propose to \textbf{C}apture \textbf{A}ll-round \textbf{I}nformation \textbf{B}eyond \textbf{C}olor (\textbf{CAIBC}) via a jointly optimized multi-branch architecture for text-based person retrieval. CAIBC contains three branches including an RGB branch, a grayscale (GRS) branch and a color (CLR) branch. Besides, with the aim of making full use of all-round information in a balanced and effective way, a mutual learning mechanism is employed to enable the three branches which attend to varied aspects of information to communicate with and learn from each other. Extensive experimental analysis is carried out to evaluate our proposed CAIBC method on the CUHK-PEDES and RSTPReid datasets in both \textbf{supervised} and \textbf{weakly supervised} text-based person retrieval settings, which demonstrates that CAIBC significantly outperforms existing methods and achieves the state-of-the-art performance on all the three tasks.
summary: Given a natural language description, text-based person retrieval aims to identify images of a target person from a large-scale person image database. Existing methods generally face a \textbf{color over-reliance problem}, which means that the models rely heavily on color information when matching cross-modal data. Indeed, color information is an important decision-making accordance for retrieval, but the over-reliance on color would distract the model from other key clues (e.g. texture information, structural information, etc.), and thereby lead to a sub-optimal retrieval performance. To solve this problem, in this paper, we propose to \textbf{C}apture \textbf{A}ll-round \textbf{I}nformation \textbf{B}eyond \textbf{C}olor (\textbf{CAIBC}) via a jointly optimized multi-branch architecture for text-based person retrieval. CAIBC contains three branches including an RGB branch, a grayscale (GRS) branch and a color (CLR) branch. Besides, with the aim of making full use of all-round information in a balanced and effective way, a mutual learning mechanism is employed to enable the three branches which attend to varied aspects of information to communicate with and learn from each other. Extensive experimental analysis is carried out to evaluate our proposed CAIBC method on the CUHK-PEDES and RSTPReid datasets in both \textbf{supervised} and \textbf{weakly supervised} text-based person retrieval settings, which demonstrates that CAIBC significantly outperforms existing methods and achieves the state-of-the-art performance on all the three tasks.
abstract_zh: 给定自然语言描述，基于文本的人物检索旨在从大规模人物图像数据库中识别目标人物的图像。现有方法通常面临\textbf{颜色过度依赖问题}，这意味着模型在匹配跨模态数据时严重依赖颜色信息。事实上，颜色信息是检索的重要决策依据，但过度依赖颜色会分散模型对其他关键线索（例如纹理信息、结构信息等）的注意力，从而导致检索性能次优。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出通过联合优化的多分支架构来捕获 \textbf{C}all-round \textbf{I}nformation \textbf{B}eyond \textbf{C}olor (\textbf{CAIBC})，用于基于文本的人物检索。 CAIBC包含三个分支，包括RGB分支、灰度(GRS)分支和颜色(CLR)分支。此外，为了均衡、有效地充分利用全方位信息，还建立了相互学习机制，使负责不同方面信息的三个部门相互交流、学习。我们在 CUHK-PEDES 和 RSTPReid 数据集上进行了广泛的实验分析，以在基于文本的人物检索设置中评估我们提出的 CAIBC 方法，这表明 CAIBC 显着优于现有方法，并在所有三个任务上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAIBC方法，通过多分支架构捕捉超越颜色的全方位信息，以提升基于文本的人像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖颜色信息，忽视了纹理、结构等关键线索，导致检索性能次优。需平衡利用多模态信息以提高准确性。
AI.method: 设计包含RGB、灰度和颜色分支的多分支架构，并引入互学习机制，使各分支协同学习不同方面的信息。
AI.result: 在CUHK-PEDES和RSTPReid数据集上，CAIBC在有监督和弱监督设置下均显著优于现有方法，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合多维度信息并缓解颜色依赖，CAIBC有效提升了基于文本的人像检索效果。

authors_text: Joohyung Lee,Jieun Oh,Inkyu Shin,You-sung Kim,Dae Kyung Sohn,Tae-sung Kim,In So Kweon
title: Moving from 2D to 3D: volumetric medical image classification for rectal cancer staging
title_zh: 从 2D 转向 3D：直肠癌分期的体积医学图像分类
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, accepted to MICCAI 2022
comments: 11 pages, 2 figures, accepted to MICCAI 2022
abstract: Volumetric images from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) provide invaluable information in preoperative staging of rectal cancer. Above all, accurate preoperative discrimination between T2 and T3 stages is arguably both the most challenging and clinically significant task for rectal cancer treatment, as chemo-radiotherapy is usually recommended to patients with T3 (or greater) stage cancer. In this study, we present a volumetric convolutional neural network to accurately discriminate T2 from T3 stage rectal cancer with rectal MR volumes. Specifically, we propose 1) a custom ResNet-based volume encoder that models the inter-slice relationship with late fusion (i.e., 3D convolution at the last layer), 2) a bilinear computation that aggregates the resulting features from the encoder to create a volume-wise feature, and 3) a joint minimization of triplet loss and focal loss. With MR volumes of pathologically confirmed T2/T3 rectal cancer, we perform extensive experiments to compare various designs within the framework of residual learning. As a result, our network achieves an AUC of 0.831, which is higher than the reported accuracy of the professional radiologist groups. We believe this method can be extended to other volume analysis tasks
summary: Volumetric images from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) provide invaluable information in preoperative staging of rectal cancer. Above all, accurate preoperative discrimination between T2 and T3 stages is arguably both the most challenging and clinically significant task for rectal cancer treatment, as chemo-radiotherapy is usually recommended to patients with T3 (or greater) stage cancer. In this study, we present a volumetric convolutional neural network to accurately discriminate T2 from T3 stage rectal cancer with rectal MR volumes. Specifically, we propose 1) a custom ResNet-based volume encoder that models the inter-slice relationship with late fusion (i.e., 3D convolution at the last layer), 2) a bilinear computation that aggregates the resulting features from the encoder to create a volume-wise feature, and 3) a joint minimization of triplet loss and focal loss. With MR volumes of pathologically confirmed T2/T3 rectal cancer, we perform extensive experiments to compare various designs within the framework of residual learning. As a result, our network achieves an AUC of 0.831, which is higher than the reported accuracy of the professional radiologist groups. We believe this method can be extended to other volume analysis tasks
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 的体积图像为直肠癌术前分期提供了宝贵的信息。最重要的是，术前准确区分 T2 和 T3 分期可以说是直肠癌治疗中最具挑战性和临床意义的任务，因为通常建议 T3（或更高）分期癌症患者进行放化疗。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种体积卷积神经网络，可以通过直肠 MR 体积准确区分 T2 期和 T3 期直肠癌。具体来说，我们提出了 1) 一个基于 ResNet 的自定义体积编码器，它通过后期融合（即最后一层的 3D 卷积）对切片间关系进行建模，2) 聚合编码器生成的特征以创建体积特征的双线性计算，以及 3) 三元组损失和焦点损失的联合最小化。通过病理证实的 T2/T3 直肠癌的 MR 体积，我们进行了广泛的实验，以在残差学习的框架内比较各种设计。结果，我们的网络达到了 0.831 的 AUC，高于专业放射科医生小组报告的准确性。我们相信这种方法可以扩展到其他体积分析任务

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于3D卷积神经网络的医学影像分类方法，用于直肠癌术前分期中的T2与T3阶段区分。
AI.motivation: 准确区分直肠癌的T2和T3阶段对治疗方案选择至关重要，而传统方法在处理3D医学影像时存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计了包含3D卷积的定制ResNet体积编码器，结合双线性特征聚合与三元组损失和焦点损失的联合优化框架。
AI.result: 在病理确认的数据集上达到0.831的AUC值，优于专业放射科医生组的报告准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推广至其他体积医学影像分析任务，为临床提供更精准的辅助诊断工具。

search_text: Moving from 2D to 3D: volumetric medical image classification for rectal cancer staging 从 2D 转向 3D：直肠癌分期的体积医学图像分类 Volumetric images from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) provide invaluable information in preoperative staging of rectal cancer. Above all, accurate preoperative discrimination between T2 and T3 stages is arguably both the most challenging and clinically significant task for rectal cancer treatment, as chemo-radiotherapy is usually recommended to patients with T3 (or greater) stage cancer. In this study, we present a volumetric convolutional neural network to accurately discriminate T2 from T3 stage rectal cancer with rectal MR volumes. Specifically, we propose 1) a custom ResNet-based volume encoder that models the inter-slice relationship with late fusion (i.e., 3D convolution at the last layer), 2) a bilinear computation that aggregates the resulting features from the encoder to create a volume-wise feature, and 3) a joint minimization of triplet loss and focal loss. With MR volumes of pathologically confirmed T2/T3 rectal cancer, we perform extensive experiments to compare various designs within the framework of residual learning. As a result, our network achieves an AUC of 0.831, which is higher than the reported accuracy of the professional radiologist groups. We believe this method can be extended to other volume analysis tasks 磁共振成像 (MRI) 的体积图像为直肠癌术前分期提供了宝贵的信息。最重要的是，术前准确区分 T2 和 T3 分期可以说是直肠癌治疗中最具挑战性和临床意义的任务，因为通常建议 T3（或更高）分期癌症患者进行放化疗。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种体积卷积神经网络，可以通过直肠 MR 体积准确区分 T2 期和 T3 期直肠癌。具体来说，我们提出了 1) 一个基于 ResNet 的自定义体积编码器，它通过后期融合（即最后一层的 3D 卷积）对切片间关系进行建模，2) 聚合编码器生成的特征以创建体积特征的双线性计算，以及 3) 三元组损失和焦点损失的联合最小化。通过病理证实的 T2/T3 直肠癌的 MR 体积，我们进行了广泛的实验，以在残差学习的框架内比较各种设计。结果，我们的网络达到了 0.831 的 AUC，高于专业放射科医生小组报告的准确性。我们相信这种方法可以扩展到其他体积分析任务 该论文提出了一种基于3D卷积神经网络的医学影像分类方法，用于直肠癌术前分期中的T2与T3阶段区分。 Joohyung Lee,Jieun Oh,Inkyu Shin,You-sung Kim,Dae Kyung Sohn,Tae-sung Kim,In So Kweon eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Shengzeng Huo,Fangyuan Wang,Luyin Hu,Peng Zhou,Jihong Zhu,Hesheng Wang,David Navarro-Alarcon
title: A Dual-Arm Collaborative Framework for Dexterous Manipulation in Unstructured Environments with Contrastive Planning
title_zh: 具有对比规划的非结构化环境中灵巧操作的双臂协作框架
comment: 11 pages, 13 figures
comments: 11 pages, 13 figures
abstract: Most object manipulation strategies for robots are based on the assumption that the object is rigid (i.e., with fixed geometry) and the goal's details have been fully specified (e.g., the exact target pose). However, there are many tasks that involve spatial relations in human environments where these conditions may be hard to satisfy, e.g., bending and placing a cable inside an unknown container. To develop advanced robotic manipulation capabilities in unstructured environments that avoid these assumptions, we propose a novel long-horizon framework that exploits contrastive planning in finding promising collaborative actions. Using simulation data collected by random actions, we learn an embedding model in a contrastive manner that encodes the spatio-temporal information from successful experiences, which facilitates the subgoal planning through clustering in the latent space. Based on the keypoint correspondence-based action parameterization, we design a leader-follower control scheme for the collaboration between dual arms. All models of our policy are automatically trained in simulation and can be directly transferred to real-world environments. To validate the proposed framework, we conduct a detailed experimental study on a complex scenario subject to environmental and reachability constraints in both simulation and real environments.
summary: Most object manipulation strategies for robots are based on the assumption that the object is rigid (i.e., with fixed geometry) and the goal's details have been fully specified (e.g., the exact target pose). However, there are many tasks that involve spatial relations in human environments where these conditions may be hard to satisfy, e.g., bending and placing a cable inside an unknown container. To develop advanced robotic manipulation capabilities in unstructured environments that avoid these assumptions, we propose a novel long-horizon framework that exploits contrastive planning in finding promising collaborative actions. Using simulation data collected by random actions, we learn an embedding model in a contrastive manner that encodes the spatio-temporal information from successful experiences, which facilitates the subgoal planning through clustering in the latent space. Based on the keypoint correspondence-based action parameterization, we design a leader-follower control scheme for the collaboration between dual arms. All models of our policy are automatically trained in simulation and can be directly transferred to real-world environments. To validate the proposed framework, we conduct a detailed experimental study on a complex scenario subject to environmental and reachability constraints in both simulation and real environments.
abstract_zh: 大多数机器人的物体操纵策略都基于这样的假设：物体是刚性的（即具有固定的几何形状）并且目标的细节已被完全指定（例如，确切的目标姿势）。然而，有许多任务涉及人类环境中的空间关系，这些条件可能很难满足，例如，弯曲电缆并将其放置在未知容器内。为了在避免这些假设的非结构化环境中开发先进的机器人操纵能力，我们提出了一种新颖的长期框架，该框架利用对比规划来寻找有希望的协作行动。使用随机动作收集的模拟数据，我们以对比的方式学习嵌入模型，该模型对来自成功经验的时空信息进行编码，这有助于通过潜在空间中的聚类来规划子目标。基于基于关键点对应的动作参数化，我们设计了一种用于双臂协作的领导者-跟随者控制方案。我们政策的所有模型都会在模拟中自动训练，并且可以直接转移到现实环境中。为了验证所提出的框架，我们对模拟和真实环境中受环境和可达性约束的复杂场景进行了详细的实验研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比规划的双臂协作框架，用于在非结构化环境中实现灵巧操作，解决柔性物体和未明确目标姿态的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略依赖于刚性物体和明确目标姿态的假设，难以应对现实环境中柔性物体操作和目标不明确的任务需求。
AI.method: 通过随机动作收集仿真数据，采用对比学习构建时空信息嵌入模型，结合关键点对应的动作参数化设计主从控制方案，实现双臂协作规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中验证了框架的有效性，成功完成复杂约束下的电缆弯曲装入未知容器等任务，无需额外调参即可迁移至现实场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过对比规划和双臂协作机制，有效提升了机器人在非结构化环境中的灵巧操作能力，为现实应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yufeng Zhao,Haiying Che
title: SkIn: Skimming-Intensive Long-Text Classification Using BERT for Medical Corpus
title_zh: SkIn：使用 BERT 对医学语料库进行略读密集型长文本分类
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures
abstract: BERT is a widely used pre-trained model in natural language processing. However, since BERT is quadratic to the text length, the BERT model is difficult to be used directly on the long-text corpus. In some fields, the collected text data may be quite long, such as in the health care field. Therefore, to apply the pre-trained language knowledge of BERT to long text, in this paper, imitating the skimming-intensive reading method used by humans when reading a long paragraph, the Skimming-Intensive Model (SkIn) is proposed. It can dynamically select the critical information in the text so that the sentence input into the BERT-Base model is significantly shortened, which can effectively save the cost of the classification algorithm. Experiments show that the SkIn method has achieved superior accuracy than the baselines on long-text classification datasets in the medical field, while its time and space requirements increase linearly with the text length, alleviating the time and space overflow problem of basic BERT on long-text data.
summary: BERT is a widely used pre-trained model in natural language processing. However, since BERT is quadratic to the text length, the BERT model is difficult to be used directly on the long-text corpus. In some fields, the collected text data may be quite long, such as in the health care field. Therefore, to apply the pre-trained language knowledge of BERT to long text, in this paper, imitating the skimming-intensive reading method used by humans when reading a long paragraph, the Skimming-Intensive Model (SkIn) is proposed. It can dynamically select the critical information in the text so that the sentence input into the BERT-Base model is significantly shortened, which can effectively save the cost of the classification algorithm. Experiments show that the SkIn method has achieved superior accuracy than the baselines on long-text classification datasets in the medical field, while its time and space requirements increase linearly with the text length, alleviating the time and space overflow problem of basic BERT on long-text data.
abstract_zh: BERT 是自然语言处理中广泛使用的预训练模型。然而，由于BERT与文本长度成二次方，因此BERT模型很难直接用于长文本语料库。在某些领域，收集的文本数据可能会相当长，例如在医疗保健领域。因此，为了将BERT预训练的语言知识应用于长文本，本文模仿人类在阅读长段落时使用的略读密集阅读方法，提出了略读密集模型（SkIn）。它可以动态选择文本中的关键信息，使得输入BERT-Base模型的句子显着缩短，可以有效节省分类算法的成本。实验表明，SkIn方法在医学领域的长文本分类数据集上取得了优于基线的准确率，同时其时间和空间要求随着文本长度线性增加，缓解了基础BERT在长文本数据上的时间和空间溢出问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BERT的医疗长文本分类模型SkIn，通过模仿人类快速浏览的阅读方式解决长文本处理效率问题。
AI.motivation: BERT模型在处理长文本时存在计算复杂度高、资源消耗大的问题，而医疗领域文本通常较长，亟需高效处理方案。
AI.method: 设计Skimming-Intensive模型，动态筛选文本关键信息并缩短输入长度，结合BERT-Base实现分类任务。
AI.result: 在医疗领域长文本数据集上，SkIn方法分类准确率优于基线模型，且时间空间需求随文本长度线性增长。
AI.conclusion: SkIn模型有效缓解了BERT处理长文本的资源瓶颈，在保持分类性能的同时显著提升计算效率。

search_text: SkIn: Skimming-Intensive Long-Text Classification Using BERT for Medical Corpus SkIn：使用 BERT 对医学语料库进行略读密集型长文本分类 BERT is a widely used pre-trained model in natural language processing. However, since BERT is quadratic to the text length, the BERT model is difficult to be used directly on the long-text corpus. In some fields, the collected text data may be quite long, such as in the health care field. Therefore, to apply the pre-trained language knowledge of BERT to long text, in this paper, imitating the skimming-intensive reading method used by humans when reading a long paragraph, the Skimming-Intensive Model (SkIn) is proposed. It can dynamically select the critical information in the text so that the sentence input into the BERT-Base model is significantly shortened, which can effectively save the cost of the classification algorithm. Experiments show that the SkIn method has achieved superior accuracy than the baselines on long-text classification datasets in the medical field, while its time and space requirements increase linearly with the text length, alleviating the time and space overflow problem of basic BERT on long-text data. BERT 是自然语言处理中广泛使用的预训练模型。然而，由于BERT与文本长度成二次方，因此BERT模型很难直接用于长文本语料库。在某些领域，收集的文本数据可能会相当长，例如在医疗保健领域。因此，为了将BERT预训练的语言知识应用于长文本，本文模仿人类在阅读长段落时使用的略读密集阅读方法，提出了略读密集模型（SkIn）。它可以动态选择文本中的关键信息，使得输入BERT-Base模型的句子显着缩短，可以有效节省分类算法的成本。实验表明，SkIn方法在医学领域的长文本分类数据集上取得了优于基线的准确率，同时其时间和空间要求随着文本长度线性增加，缓解了基础BERT在长文本数据上的时间和空间溢出问题。 本文提出一种基于BERT的医疗长文本分类模型SkIn，通过模仿人类快速浏览的阅读方式解决长文本处理效率问题。 Yufeng Zhao,Haiying Che cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Lu Ying,Xinhuan Shu,Dazhen Deng,Yuchen Yang,Tan Tang,Lingyun Yu,Yingcai Wu
title: MetaGlyph: Automatic Generation of Metaphoric Glyph-based Visualization
title_zh: MetaGlyph：自动生成基于隐喻字形的可视化
abstract: Glyph-based visualization achieves an impressive graphic design when associated with comprehensive visual metaphors, which help audiences effectively grasp the conveyed information through revealing data semantics. However, creating such metaphoric glyph-based visualization (MGV) is not an easy task, as it requires not only a deep understanding of data but also professional design skills. This paper proposes MetaGlyph, an automatic system for generating MGVs from a spreadsheet. To develop MetaGlyph, we first conduct a qualitative analysis to understand the design of current MGVs from the perspectives of metaphor embodiment and glyph design. Based on the results, we introduce a novel framework for generating MGVs by metaphoric image selection and an MGV construction. Specifically, MetaGlyph automatically selects metaphors with corresponding images from online resources based on the input data semantics. We then integrate a Monte Carlo tree search algorithm that explores the design of an MGV by associating visual elements with data dimensions given the data importance, semantic relevance, and glyph non-overlap. The system also provides editing feedback that allows users to customize the MGVs according to their design preferences. We demonstrate the use of MetaGlyph through a set of examples, one usage scenario, and validate its effectiveness through a series of expert interviews.
summary: Glyph-based visualization achieves an impressive graphic design when associated with comprehensive visual metaphors, which help audiences effectively grasp the conveyed information through revealing data semantics. However, creating such metaphoric glyph-based visualization (MGV) is not an easy task, as it requires not only a deep understanding of data but also professional design skills. This paper proposes MetaGlyph, an automatic system for generating MGVs from a spreadsheet. To develop MetaGlyph, we first conduct a qualitative analysis to understand the design of current MGVs from the perspectives of metaphor embodiment and glyph design. Based on the results, we introduce a novel framework for generating MGVs by metaphoric image selection and an MGV construction. Specifically, MetaGlyph automatically selects metaphors with corresponding images from online resources based on the input data semantics. We then integrate a Monte Carlo tree search algorithm that explores the design of an MGV by associating visual elements with data dimensions given the data importance, semantic relevance, and glyph non-overlap. The system also provides editing feedback that allows users to customize the MGVs according to their design preferences. We demonstrate the use of MetaGlyph through a set of examples, one usage scenario, and validate its effectiveness through a series of expert interviews.
abstract_zh: 基于字形的可视化与全面的视觉隐喻相结合，实现了令人印象深刻的图形设计，通过揭示数据语义帮助受众有效掌握所传达的信息。然而，创建这种基于隐喻字形的可视化（MGV）并不是一件容易的事，因为它不仅需要对数据的深入理解，还需要专业的设计技能。本文提出了 MetaGlyph，一种从电子表格生成 MGV 的自动系统。为了开发MetaGlyph，我们首先进行定性分析，从隐喻体现和字形设计的角度来理解当前MGV的设计。基于结果，我们引入了一种通过隐喻图像选择和 MGV 构造来生成 MGV 的新颖框架。具体来说，MetaGlyph 根据输入数据语义自动从在线资源中选择具有相应图像的隐喻。然后，我们集成了蒙特卡罗树搜索算法，该算法通过将视觉元素与给定数据重要性、语义相关性和字形非重叠的数据维度相关联来探索 MGV 的设计。该系统还提供编辑反馈，允许用户根据自己的设计偏好定制 MGV。我们通过一组示例、一个使用场景来演示 MetaGlyph 的使用，并通过一系列专家访谈来验证其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaGlyph系统，旨在自动从电子表格生成具有隐喻意义的符号可视化（MGV）。
AI.motivation: 当前隐喻符号可视化设计需专业技能且耗时，缺乏自动化工具支持。
AI.method: 通过分析现有MGV设计，结合语义匹配的隐喻图像选择与蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，实现数据维度与视觉元素的智能关联，并提供用户自定义功能。
AI.result: 通过案例展示与专家访谈验证，证明系统能有效生成符合设计需求的MGV。
AI.conclusion: MetaGlyph降低了MGV设计门槛，为非专业用户提供自动化可视化生成方案。
